review_text:
What a wonderful experience in Costa coffee Wimbledon station yesterday. It was so nice, refreshing and rare to experience actual exceptional customer service these days and yesterday we got it. 🎇🎉🎊🍾☕☕☕☕

Alfie a true rockstar barista was attentive, eloquent, professional and friendly. And was truly on the ball when it came to allergies and intolerances with the order. The wonderful Christmas drinks and treats were served with a smile, efficiency and professionalism that every other shop fails miserably at!!  Costa you must wake up and smell the coffee here and realise you have awesome staff members who are representing your brand perfectly. It was so nice to see a team so friendly, interact with the customers and being top pros at the same time.  Cheers for the great drinks and superb customer service....see you again soon 💪🏼💪🏼

Usually service is slow compared to Nero's, not good if you're waiting for a train. Their system of one person taking orders and one making the coffee is less efficient than Nero's where both staff make coffees. Other than that pretty good
Had a fantastic experience this morning.  Fabulous service with engaging and kind staff who took a real interest in their customers. The coffee was great too!

Rude staff forgot to make my tea as they was busy I can understand mistakes. When I approached to say that more than 4 people had got my drinks before me the woman named Dorota made my tea in seconds, when I asked for an apology she just blanked me and said to her workmate she is not stressing today! Horrible person won’t be coming here again

Really lovely service with a smile, and really genuinely helpful staff. I never understand why some companies in the catering or retail companies industry make staff cover up their piercings though. In this day and age it’s really sad when people are not allowed to celebrate their individuality, and for me it reflects badly on the company. I mean if it was unhygienic I’d understand, but surely we’ve come a lot further than this.

Really lovely service though and full points to the staff 👌🙌🙌🙌😍

I  visited this Costa Coffee at its opening time, 6:30 am. The atmosphere was very calm, very clean, with all the croissants and pastries ready. It’s clear that the staff must have been working since 5:30, yet I was welcomed very kindly, a sign of people who truly love their job, which is a rare thing.
The restrooms were also very clean. Both the entrance and the restrooms are accessible for people who need to use a wheelchair.
Perfect for workers who get up early to go to work like me, as well as for studying or meeting friends. Certainly, at different times of the day the coffee shop will be full of people. I will make sure to come back and add something more to this review, hopefully only positives (and not negatives).
Parking until 8.30 free, in Carlton Dr ( two minutes walk)
Excellent service from Max today, went above and beyond usual Costa service. Also, very patient with other customers who don’t understand the concept. Great customer service.

Amazing! my favorite place in the area, the coffee is top quality, the atmosphere is incredibly nice and welcoming, the manager and staff members are consistently polite and attentive.
Highly recommend!

Use a lot and seen other reviews.  Agree Gutherberg, Magda, and particularly Melika and newcomer Jack/Jake doing a serious good job  - fabulous drinks!   Long may they remain!!.  Thanks
Only negatives - toilets sometimes not so good,  and lady - tall, long dark hair (nurioa?)  perhaps a touch tense and does not engage as well as others/at times a touch rude?!!

Great location, however the staff were completely uninterested in serving us (fyi and reference, this is Christmas time and the staff are wearing Christmas jumpers and Christmas items in their hair....) This is the season of goodwill and being friendly to people yet we were definitely served by a female Scrooge who couldn't have been more unfriendly, uninterested and couldn't even bring herself to make any eye contact with us. It was like we were imposing on her own personal time. Not that she is being paid to provide customer service or anything. I was staggered how unaware she was that this lack of professionalism to her is ok. Once we received the items just plonked down on the table , the drinks seemed more like a nightmare before Christmas drink rather than anything from the festive menu. No care, love or artistry for the Christmas drink offerings. The final slap in the face was my terrys chocolate orange hot chocolate had no more Terry's chocolate orange segments left, so they gave me an after eight mint instead..??? Great, so I want orange, chocolate and mint flavoured hot chocolate.... It's such a half hearted and non caring customer service we all receive now which is a wider scaled issue in many coffee and other establishments now...and we pay through the nose for these 'experiences' now..........awful...

Five stars simply for being 24 hour in my view, as can't be that profitable to be open at 3am for the odd (very appreciative) customer.   Coffees, inc decaf, are decent, hot and large.  Use the app for 1 free coffee in 10, and occasional discounts (e.g. 30% off order, 30% off food).

If this cafe was in Kingston centre, it would be empty. Food is tasteless, but overpriced, service is slow and not particularly friendly. It’s a shame to keep this mediocre cafe in a place where people need something to keep their spirit high without robbing them.

10 whole minutes to get an average coffee - I'm not a fan of their beans but it's the only option in this part of the hospital. They have 2 tills and 2 separate machines but not enough staff or management will to organise more efficiently. They have a monopoly in this part of the hospital so maybe they just don't care! I'm wondering if making medics wait  for coffee could be a contributing factor to the lengthening waiting lists?!

The team are diligent and friendly. Hongdae helped me so much after my surgery and made me the perfect drink which was just what I needed. People here are lovely and the quality is always top notch! Thank you!

I've visited this Costa branch multiple times throughout the year, my latest visit was this week (June 24). Staff at this Costa could not give less of a damn if they tried, I understand that there is a high demand and they must be very busy and stressed. However this is a customer facing role in a Hospital, being rude and having a moody expression is the last thing people want to experience. Not to mention the inconsistencies of heated items, myself and my partner got 2 wraps, one was scalding hot all over and the other one was hot on the outside and fridge cold in the middle, despite being heated at the same time. Just to further point out that the promotional / limited edition drinks are never in stock, every time I've ever asked for a new interesting drink being advertised on screen, I'm told that one or more ingredients are not in stock.

The worse waitress in the word , no education at all , never help suggesting what you can have they don't even look at you ....
Very bad people for to be in a health center .
No consideration
And be careful if they can charge you more they will.

Staff member who served me was disinterested. I asked for toast at 11.35 and was told rudely no toast after 11am. Why? I asked about the costa app and the lady replied “we are not Costa”? Training is needed here lets down the usual friendly Costa experience!
Absolutely awful. Had a breakfast and it was terrible.  Bacon hard & inedible . Sausages not much better . Servicewas poor the waitress was not very polite & miserable.

I've been here twice and I now realise why the usually nice strong Costa coffee is weak. I thought it was just me. But today another customer complained that the coffee was too weak.
I was sat here for about an hr as my dad was getting a procedure and I watched the way they make coffee, the take the cup away before the expresso shot had been dispensed and the rest is just discharged/wasted. So if you're wondering why your coffee tastes disgusting this is why.

Coffee tastes week
Service is rude
Would not come here again

This is located behind the reception area on the ground floor of Queen Mary's Hospital, Roehampton.  It is not managed by Costa, so I could not swipe my Costa card here, nor did it have the usual Costa wi-fi.

I’ve been here twice now, once with friends and once with a book. The ambience is good and I enjoyed my mint hot chocolate. The staff are friendly and efficient. The only part that is less than good are the prices, which feel steep. £5 for a small hot chocolate was a bit much in my opinion.
I come lately to revise, and the atmosphere and service is good. Store is clean, and customer service is amazing. My main coffee shop now

As a barista, the coffee was divine, Nocolo knows what he is doing! The other staff were friendly and fast at cleaning and sanitizing the area. However the food choices behind the counter and in the sandwich section were almost bare. Too bare for middle of the day in my opinion.

Their clothes were clean, their work station was clean. The cups on top of the coffee machine need sorting out tho. Few minor tweaks but all in all a wonderful customer experience.

On the Too Good to Go the  surprise bag shouldn’t be how small the amount is. Lady with the glasses always provides the smallest amount, 3 items that I can get for the same price at Sainsbury’s isn’t worth it.
Not too bad service wise but the place absolutely reeks of mildew, not sure if there’s a mold problem but it stinks. 😷

Actually impressive how they managed to get a roster of literally the most unpleasant female staff they could find.
I mean, if these girls hate the customers so much, maybe look for a job that doesn't need interaction with humans??

The staff here are amazing and always have time (if you do) for a friendly chat or to help you out in any way they can. They have the luxury of not being the busiest branch of Costa in London, but that just means you don’t have to worry about finding a seat and can concentrate on relaxing, working, or just watching the world go by.

Directly opposite Clapham South station and alongside Clapham Common, it’s well located. Being a Costa you know what you are going to get; and the free wifi worked perfectly too.

If you found my review or photos helpful please leave a quick thumbs up 👍 Thank you! ☕️

Balham it’s nice and busy area with a few options for a coup of coffee or tea . If you walk only 2 min away from the underground station to Costa coffee shop never regret for this choice because this place have a lovely staff, good and fast service, I recommend this coffee shop. Was busy in this afternoon but the service was really good because I no need to wait much. Also the rest room very clean as well.

I thought this was a nice cosy and friendly coffee shop. There were a couple of hiccups because they nearly served me a strong coffee although I asked for a decaf and I had to remove some used cups from my table. However they were playing some nice music and it’s very convenient because it’s just opposite Clapham South tube station and near to Clapham Common. There is also a Burger King nearby.
I’m also had a soft settee to myself so it was worth the visit. The staff seemed very friendly.

Me and my boyfriend visited this place yesterday and both of us were very impressed. As coffee lover I like Costa, but especially in this Costa Coffee I found a lot of warmth, coziness and a pleasant atmosphere. Food and drinks were nice as in any Costa.

However, what makes this place special in our eyes are the staff, especially Nicolo! The service provided, the kindness and attentiveness are at the highest level! It was pleasure!
I come nearly every morning. It Cosy and a wonderful environment.  The service is superb! The staff are excellent and wonderful people.

Honestly, the service and staff at this Costa are the best. Happy, assertive and welcoming.

Drinks are quickly served so no long waits and it never seems busy.

Plenty of desks for those working remotely or looking to just have a coffee and chill.

Two toilets, one for disabled use.
Not bad, but could be better if people DO not judged by clothes or face) right?

The service at first was great but then 1 of the 2 Indian gentlemen thatcwork there was slightly sarcastic. So I had to be sarcastic back. And then thr coffee cream dissolved in 2 seconds waste of money.
I had been there for 3 hours on a work day as wifi connection at home went bad. The staff cleaned the tables frequently and the cafe was neat and quiet.
very nice and tasty coffee from the Costa express...there are 2 machines available... also in that place bakery and snacks also available

I must commend this particular Costa establishment, as it consistently provides an exceptional experience. As a full-time caregiver for my mother, who is in the early stages of Alzheimer's, I deeply appreciate that this location serves as a secure and comforting environment for her. The clientele who frequent this establishment are consistently pleasant and respectful.

I would particularly like to acknowledge Frida, the Manager, and her colleagues Maya and Yasmin. Their customer service skills are exemplary; they are consistently polite, diligent, and perform admirably under demanding circumstances. It is a genuine pleasure to bring my mother to this safe haven. Furthermore, the quality of the beverages offered is consistently outstanding.

Costa Coffee is my go to for my Chai lattes and the. Costa Coffee at  Bell Green, Sydenham is usually very good. However, on Friday afternoon my granddaughter and I went to Costa, for a treat. I ordered my usual Chai latte, cheese and ham toastie and a fruit drink for my granddaughter. On first tasting my Chai latte it  tasted as if had been watered down as it had a watery consistency, and not like my usual Chai latte. I then asumed that it could have been made with skimmed milk. When i later asked was told that my drink was made with semi skimmed milk, which is what i would have expected. On leaving I collected the Chai latte I preordered and paid for. as a takeaway drink for my husband and watched as this was made.The Assistant  took the milk jug over to the sink, emptied the contents and appeared to add water, then added what appeared not to add a full quota milk to the jug.  The cheese toasties appeared not to be fully heated, or cut and I had to ask for a knife and napkins, which were not provided to us. During the weekend i was unwell, from Friday evening  with a horrible  bloty feeling and stomach cramps. And as I only drunk and eaten from this restaurant attributed it to the food and drink purchased. I've also noted that the customer service is dependent on whoever is serving, the teams on duty tend to change.A very  disappointing experience from a loyal Costa Coffee customer.

The staff has made a beautiful mango fleppie bubble tea for me!
The Google maps location was incorrect, Costa is located inside the Next on the first floor.
The staff in this branch are wonderful! Such lovely, helpful smiley girls!

Top service
Great drinks & cakes

Staff are super friendly here, they are always so helpful and we come with lots of chaos and babies. Also really happy with the addition of all the vegan offerings as I can finally eat something! The vegan smoky ham and cheeze toastie is lovely.

I use to go here every other day sometimes for food and sometimes for drinks what has happen to the lovely happy staff that were there before refurb  always had time to smile chat and joke with the new staff are as miserable as hell the new lady was rude to me last week and i refused to go back there if i see her which has been a lot so unfortunally i havent been back there such a shame bring back the old staff asap
We arrived it enjoying a  drink coffee.  Very  Good service. Appreciate and thank you.
Delicious coffee costa and pastry and great atmosphere  recommended👌

I have been visiting this branch of Costa Coffee (Forest Hill) for a few months now and I must say that overall the staff here have been consistently friendly, helpful and keen on providing good service with a smile! I have only seen a long face once on a staff member, which confirms that they are human after all and not AI (robot - for you non-techies )! The cafe is always stocked with a great selection of food (although limited on the healthy options). Overall, the staff here are doing a great job and I for one do appreciate you guys! Let's drop our petty moanings and show some Love for a change! Peace :-)

It is a nice costa. I enjoy I a lot but unfortunately the service is not great. I spend nearly 30 per week here. I get no greeting, they speak in portugese amongst each other. I would like it if they become more customer focused
We ordered from here, and half the order was missing. All the hot food and drinks missing. Not impressed at all. There was literally no point in them sending the order with most of it missing
The coffee was very nice and the Hot Chocolate too. The plain butter croissant was awesome and the taste of butter was felt in every bite.

Today morning,we have worst customer experience in the shop regarding to rude behaviour. I don’t want to mention team member name but every time we walk into store she started behaving rude and not polite way to serve customers. Please costa coffee resolve this issue. Thank you

Not a nice place to spend time. Air-conditioning way too low, dirty seats and it is far too big resulting in an uncosy feel. No soft furnishings so the echoing noise so much you struggle to hear yourself think. I won't be returning.
Staff is polite and the shop is always clean and tidy. This costa shop is also opened till late which is good for weekend and sometimes after work.

The staff is kind and the drinks are very nice. During Christmas holidays I usually get the gingerbread latte with coconut milk and vegan cream on top.
There are vegan food options, but unfortunately all the food is wrapped in plastic, which is a downside for the environment.
I order thru the app a lot and service is always amazing and order always ready for collection.

⭐️⭐️⭐️ (3 out of 5)

I came in for a coffee to start my morning—a simple comfort to begin the day. The coffee itself was good, no complaints there. However, the experience was unfortunately let down by the attitude of the staff.

The woman at the counter seemed visibly unhappy to be there. She avoided conversation, looked annoyed when I asked a question, and handled everything with a level of frustration that made the interaction uncomfortable. It honestly set a negative tone for the start of my day.

I understand that everyone has rough mornings, but in hospitality, a little kindness and professionalism go a long way. A smile, or at least a respectful demeanor, makes a big difference—especially when people come in hoping for a positive start to their day.

I hope this was just an off day, and that future visits will reflect more warmth and care in the service to match the quality of the coffee.

Rude girl serving wears hijab doesn't know how to smile say pls or thankyou
Also her drink making is shocking

I stopped to wait my friend.
Atmosphere is so good.
I was alone but I felt very comfortable.
I wonder if Wi-Fi are installed, become better.
A standard chain cafe in a busy shopping centre and tube station. There is a good range of food and drinks to choose from and there is a reasonable amount of seating.

Lovely to see Reda and team today ,I’ve availed my free birthday cake and bought some coffee .
Costa offer the best coffee in my liking and  the only coffee shop  to remember the birthdays of their  regular customers and give treats.
Location is accessible and the atmosphere are relaxing and welcoming.
Customer care is always displayed with the friendly staff.
Good luck and thank you for my yearly birthday cakes .

A lovely pit stop on my way home after my hospital appointment.  This Costa in the Bus Station opposite Tescos, the District line Train and Piccadilly Line Train is a 30 second walk away. A nice, quiet and clean café.  The food is simple but nice.  I had porridge and a decaf latte.  Needed to take my medication with food. The Lady with the two ponytails made my coffee and asked if I wanted to use my free coffee on my app.  NO ONE EVER SAYS THAT TO ME!  I paid with card.  I will use the free one another time. Thank you Costa Café in Broadway Shopping Centre - Bus Station. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Breakfast at Costa Coffee offers a delightful array of options that cater to various tastes and preferences. Whether you're in the mood for something savory or sweet, Costa Coffee's menu has you covered. You can start your day with a classic bacon roll or opt for a more indulgent choice like a sausage bap. For those who prefer a lighter breakfast, their selection of freshly baked pastries, such as croissants and muffins, paired with a steaming cup of expertly brewed coffee, makes for a perfect morning treat. Additionally, Costa Coffee provides vegetarian and vegan options, ensuring that everyone can enjoy a satisfying breakfast. The welcoming atmosphere and the aroma of freshly ground coffee beans make it a cozy spot to kick off your day.

This is the first time I have been entering this coast, and I must say that the place, although small, and well organized and welcoming, with a friendly and warm staff, especially matiateresa, who prepared a frappè with salty caramel, like I had never drunk before, But apart from the drink, his kindness and his professionalism made it possible for me to return as soon as possible, congratulations to the company, you could not hire a better employee, I will definitely return

Feedback for Maria Tereza (Barista)

I just wanted to take a moment to recognize and appreciate the wonderful service you've been providing. Every time you make my coffee, you do it with a warm smile and a kind attitude, and that truly makes a difference in my day.

Your friendliness, helpfulness, and positive energy don’t go unnoticed. It’s clear that you care about what you do and about the people you serve. Keep being exactly who you are — your kindness and professionalism are a real asset.

Thank you for always being so welcoming and helpful!

Maria at the till was extremely rude to a couple of ladies before me. She was clearly under stress and overwhelmed but she spoke to them with absolute disrespect. Spanish latte was nice and the sandwich was good. It was busy and the other two ladies at the counter were working their hardest but they were clearly embarrassed by the situation.

Oh this is great Costa you know lots of families sitting down together having coffee together coffee is great snacks are great not maybe I like some carrot cake don't mind if I die a little treat for me you know but the only problem is my children are like I don't know if I don't want to sit down and have a nice conversation. This is a shame because all other families they sit down you know children they sit down with their parents have some coffee have nice conversation apart from that the Costa is great and it is very good environment very nice stuff not long kills usually so I can get my coffee and get some more if I need to give whatever.

"Teresa, thank you for the amazing coffee — but even more, thank you for the positive energy you bring! Your smile and kindness made my day start on the right note. The coffee was perfect, but your vibe made it even better. Keep being awesome — people like you make a big difference!"

I really like this Costa coffee, staff are very friendly and keep this Costa coffee in a really clean and tidy condition. The coffee was excellent, very well made, and the food was delicious. Seating is comfortable and plug sockets means we could stay here for a while. WiFi very quick! Good part of the shopping mall.

The girl from Cuba
Staff at this branch should be more respectful. One team member was very rude and ignored questions about our order. She handed the drinks over carelessly and with no basic courtesy or friendliness. Not the customer service you expect from Costa.

If you want a nice quiet breakfast place in the mornings forget it at Putney High Street.
Too damned bright, too noisy. Who wants too be in a disco with the most appalling music blaring out at 8.30am ?
I had to go outside to receive a phone call.
3 of us couldn't even use the loo because the staff claimed sometimes the door locked itself from the inside?‼️‼️
The staff are presumably immune to this assault on the senses!
They don't really need to be doing their job you know

Best frappe our there. Super flavor, no to sweet and those sprinkles on the top give extra kick. My fave summer coffe
Peace 🤙
We had an unpleasant experience with one of the employees. She was impatient and showed aggressive behaviour.
Good Costa store. Staff are friendly and super fast. Clean and has the great Cappuccino!

Possibly the longest distance runner that I ever had the pleasure of meeting was able to shout ‘What’s afloat you young goat’ at me when I entered COSTA COFFEE IN PUTNEY.
Well met by Moonlight … as Jonathan Coe wrote
Google says open till 21:00. At 18:50 numerous staff say "sorry we're closed". If Costa was a football team, they should start worrying about relegation.
Says its open till 6pm on a Sunday, went there at 5.15pm, 'sorry we're closed, we close an hour early to take stock'. Why does it say its open then?!

The staff are always so lovely at this Costa... they are the friendliest out of all the costas I have been to up and down the country!
Thanks for always being so cheery... xx

I used to come to this Costa quite often because I had a few hospital appointments. At first, I was just stopping by as a patient, but now I find myself coming back just for this Costa. Most of the time, I’ve been served by a really kind and gentle barista. I don’t know his name as his badge just said Barista, but I do remember he had a tattoo on his arm. He always made sure my coffee was exactly how I liked it and was genuinely friendly and easy to talk to, such a sweet soul, bless him🧿. Him alongside his colleagues really made my visits enjoyable. And the staff is really well mannered and attentive towards the customer’s needs, I’ll definitely keep coming back✨.

I have visited the Costa branch at Charing Cross Hospital on several occasions and have consistently received efficient and pleasant service. The selection of food and beverages is of good quality, and the staff are always welcoming.
During my visit on 16 January 2026, I was served by a cashier named Any, who demonstrated exceptional politeness and friendliness. I would like to commend her professionalism and highlight that staff members of her calibre are a valuable asset to Costa.

The lady that I think is a supervisor is very rude, extremely rude. I work in the hospital and I feel trapped with her customer service in this Costa branch. Please get rid of her!!!! She's awful to customers and staff. She covers her name with a scarf, so I couldn't see her name, otherwise I would mention it. No manners in addressing issues of any sort. The rest of the staff is quite kind and polite. It's a shame 1 person in charge ruines everything.

Staff were very rude today at cxh. Was waiting ages for my coffee. We are customers and should not be shouted at. New ordering system, no one tells you that you should look out for an order number. I just got a receipt for my payment. Very bad I paid for a latte that cost me £4.55 and by the time i got it, it was cold. The staff argued with me instead of giving me a hot drink. Very disappointed staff member. You will never get this at other Costas. They listen to the customer. I did not get time to speak to the manager or supervisor as i was due to get back to my training. Please look into this as I have proof of my payment.
Great service and super friendly staff! Good selection of drinks and sweet treats at the hospital. Only thing is the premium charged is not nice both for staff and patients!

Costa Coffee is my 'go-to'coffee shop in Hounslow. The experience made even more pleasurable by one guy behind the counter - a true customer service expert! I see him befriend many customers, doing exactly what every shop assistant ought to be doing. Daniel is a real gentleman!

Located inside a Shell recharging station on the corner of Fulham Road and Landridge Road. A quiet and relaxed atmosphere when I stopped there, with friendly and efficient staff, a clean environment, and tables to sit at (it is not just an Express outlet like you usually find in such places). There is also a convenience store adjoining  it.
It's a really nice Costa in a shell recharge station. Staff was nice and typical but clean Costa style.
I wanna say thanks for staff, very loyal and friendly, coffee was good. Thanks a lot.
Very friendly and attentive staff

Nice atmosphere at Costa Coffee, perfect for relaxing ! The cafe is always clean, you can see the effort of the staff to keep everything spotless. The hospitality of the workers impressed me - they are friendly and attentive. I come back again and again !

I stopped over for a tuna melt and the store had it in stock. Short queue and didn’t wait long to be served too. Plenty of seating spaces provided with social distance observed too. Clean restaurant with friendly staff too.

Decent Costa Coffee.

We ended up here after attempting to try an independent coffee café which was super busy.

The food and drinks were good, service was questionable though...

I thought they had a newbie at the till as the two staff members started to panic when the queue became longer as they were concentrating too much on Deliveroo orders.

Nice and cute. Very lovely place to have a coffee ☕, wold recommend.
It's big form the inside and have a panty of tables.
I've seen few fellows seating at the end off the cafe with Mac books working on something, still nice and quiet.
There one toilet downstairs for customers which is BIG,  clean and have everything you need at such place.
The staff was friendly and nice, just as you would expect .

Recommend.
Great place to sit down for a break or for a relaxed place to work. Plenty of cozy chairs and plug sockets around the room, and there's almost always space. Staff are friendly and attentive :)

British brand, the only coffee chain is the Costa Coffee, it used to be in Singapore. Anyways I saw this shop and since I am in UK, let's taste the local cafe instead. The breakfast deal £5+ with large flatwhite and croissant. Coffee is  thick and delicious. Have not tried the croissant yet!
Quiet cafe for a morning, served quickly and a decent hot choc and toastie.

A smallish but cosy Costa with lovely lighting and decorations (for the time of year). Very warm and a good spot to catch up with a friend or have a solo coffee.

I was served by a very friendly younger man today who was helpful in quickly cleaning the table for me, without me asking, and then making my order perfectly.

Lower rating for the carrot cake as it was slightly drier on the upper layer and yet sickly sweet (as though it had been soaked in something) on the bottom.

At first, I came here just because I often saw Costa Coffee, but it turns out to be a great one-stop spot for coffee lovers in London ☕️🇬🇧. The service is fast and friendly, and first-timers will get recommendations from the barista. The café is clean! Highly recommended✨❤️

As an American, I was very pleased to find an alternative to the omnipresent Star***ks. The coffee was very, very good, the staff friendly, and variety and quality of food was perfect. This shop became our daily stop before taking the tube or ambling around Earls Court.

Lovely quiet little Costa up next to the Sainsbury's. Reachable via lift or stairs, but always worth a visit. Friendly staff, good coffee, nice and chill atmosphere, neat, clean - what more could you want?

Such an amazing place. I came with two young boys. Both were hungry and tired. The staff were patient, understanding and so kind. My experience was amazing. I only wish I lived closer so I can visit the place more often.

Thank you so much Costa staff

I would like to thanks so much for hard work team does in this venue .
Customer service is at a very high level.
I was served promptly no waste of time.
I would like to emphasise on member of team which name I remember Polina very kind member of staff.
Hope to come back soon.
Really great place to work, quiet, spacious.
Por service, too busy taking orders and not serving, display board takes ages to show all drinks, lack of atmosphere and food specials advertised, weren't available.

Dear Sir or Madam,

I am writing to formally complain about an incident involving one of your staff members who was serving at the till during my recent visit.

I was accompanying a close friend who has a disability. My friend politely asked the staff member for warm or hot water. This was a simple and reasonable request. However, the request was denied in a dismissive manner, without any clear explanation or attempt to assist.

What was particularly upsetting and unacceptable was the staff member’s behaviour immediately afterward. He appeared to laugh following the refusal, which was deeply disrespectful and humiliating for my friend. As someone advocating on behalf of a person with a disability, I found this behaviour offensive and discriminatory.

Staff members should be trained to treat all customers with dignity, kindness, and understanding — especially individuals with disabilities. The lack of empathy shown in this situation falls far below acceptable customer service standards.

I am requesting that this incident be taken seriously, reviewed appropriately, and that further training be provided to ensure no customer is treated in this manner again.

I would appreciate a response outlining how this matter will be addressed.

I was really disappointed with the customer service. While waiting in the queue, I allowed a disabled customer in a wheelchair to go ahead of me, something I was more than happy to do. However, when it was my turn, the barista tried to ignore me and told me to go to the back of the queue, I explained politely that I was in the queue and had simply given way to someone who needed it more, but the way he handled my order felt disrespectful. It also seemed like he charged me more than usual, which left me feeling uncomfortable.
To make things worse, I saw him offering trays to other customers, yet when I ordered two coffees, he didn’t bother to offer any help. The difference in how I was treated compared to others was noticeable and really disappointing.
Overall, the experience felt unfair and unprofessional. I hope the staff receive better training on customer service and treating everyone with the same respect.

My daughter is 6years old and has dysphagia (a swallowing condition and can not drink anything without thickener) the members of staff know exactly how to make my daughters drinks which makes life a little bit easier and to know that she can have a treat there and not have to worry the members of staff’s have gotten to know me and my daughter and know exactly what we want. I really appreciate you for taking time to understand and help thank you

They regularly and cheerfully sell stale pastries from at least a day before but don’t seem to care. I bought two one morning and they were rock hard. Came back another morning and saw a woman refusing to buy a pastry from them for the same reason. It had clearly been on display since the day before
Asked for tea bag outside the cup but indian guy refused. Tea is tea but This is a one in a million request and you guys can’t do it? Do better. I’m so disappointed

The place was very quiet when I visited and the girl behind the counter immediately greeted me, hence the stars. Apart from that the place needs upkeep. Dirty cups were lying around and coffee was mediocre for the price. Also, the pain au raisin was served cold and dry.

Very high standard, quick and efficient. 2 Indian guys Woking together very polite and helpful. Clean also.

It's rare to find standards being high so I have to leave a great review for these two guys.

The guy upsold me to a large latte for an extra 20p then made me a medium. I asked where the large was as you upsold me and he poured the medium into a large cup and plonked it on the table and said I only charged you for a medium. None of it made sense. I said I won't be back and he said good. Be careful who you employ as not everyone has the same idea of customer service due to their backgrounds. It will ruin what is already a brand under immense pressure.

The two men who were working here today were unhygienic and very rude!! Trying to rush me to make my order when there is no queue, only me! And did not make my drink how I asked even after I asked them twice and I paid for it! 😡
Would give 0 stars if I could.
Want a cup of milk with some light coffee flavour, come here. A flat white is some kind fo milkshake to these baristas

The male manager white man medium build is very rude. I have complained to get him fired but they still employ him. Thr woman working beside him is very rude aswell. Wouldn't give tissues to someone who really needed it and made a massive argument about it.

This is a review for the Costa inside the platform 9-10 waiting room (there didn’t seem to be a separate place to review), I was served by Slyvia, she made my coffee swiftly & exactly right. The place was cleanly & there’s plenty of seating. Out of Costa’s whipped range I wouldn’t recommend the white chocolate one, the sauce is really grainy in your mouth & the other options are much better. Of course this is out of the employee’s control & is just how the drink is made.

The servers are so lovely and remember my order (one shot caramel latte)! It is so nice seeing a friendly face every morning. I am starting a new job and probably won't be coming for a while, I will miss it brightening morning!
Despite it being incredibly late, vansh and Shaneel were very delightful, energetic and ready to help. A pleasant surprise!
I've had a few coffea from this branch and they always taste weird and makes me feel sick. Will not use again

Whenever I have visited this particular branch of Costa I have always received lovely customer service. Occasionally I have had to remind the barista of my order, but they have always rectified it with grace and without any delay.

Tables are usually clean and there are plenty of seats.

If there was more stars I can give to service, I definitely would, the man who served me today has great attention to detail not just a barista but as a server, he asked me if everything was alright with the drinks, I would definitely recommend this Costa to anyone out with friends and family

Worst costa I've ever been to the female staff member was particularly uncaring and down right rude  when asked for my usual medium black forest mocha then they got funny because I wanted cream and sauce telling me it doesn't come like that when I've bought it every day for the past 3 months she said she had no sauce but then after me moaning she finally put one tiny blob of sauce on top I said I'd be writing a bad review and was told we don't care and laughed at absolutely disgusting behaviour

Lovely store located inside Denmark Hill hospital near the main Entrance
Clean
Very welcoming
Great friendly staff
Open 24 hours 7 days a week
Lots of choices from savoury to sweet
Hot and cold sandwiches

I was in the Costa coffee shop at West Middlesex hospital a couple of weeks ago. Enjoying my favourite sausage in a bun.
The café very conveniently had a toilet. So I was able to spend a penny. The whole place was very clean and hospitable which I think keeps the customer satisfied. Thanks to the friendly helpful staff.

I had a disappointing experience at this Costa today. I asked politely if my drink could be remade with a different syrup flavour as I didn’t like the one I chose, and explained that I hadn’t really drunk it. The staff initially refused and then agreed, but the interaction felt very cold and unfriendly. Unfortunately, the replacement drink was rushed and didn’t taste right either.
It was quite disheartening, as I’ve always enjoyed Costa and value good customer service. I hope the team can work on being a bit more approachable and kind in situations like this.
Amazing service! I dropped my drink by mistake, and the staff replaced it for free. Really appreciate the kindness and professionalism.

Come all the time.  Thank you to the staff for providing great coffees and a service that would make me come back again. This includes Peckham branch.  I also love the Woolwich Drive through Costa and London bridge branch.

Unfortunately they are using the same one set of tongs for all the cakes. They have  cake advertised as vegan so need to have separate utensils. Please watch out if you have allergies as clearly they are not clued up on cross contamination
Great place to hang out and catch up on some unfinished work on the laptop
Really nice quick spot to grab breakfast. A great meal deal. The employees are really helpful and kind. Great prices delicious sandwich. We had the pesto and mozzarella.
Lovely shop with lots of seating. Staff are attentive, efficient and helpful. Great place to avoid Victoria station crowds. Also a good place to work remotely.

Very big Costa chain that should have huge potential given the location, but the pastries are below average, the almond croissant tasted like it was made 2 days ago. The food choices in general lack, and coffee was nothing great, not sure why they are voted the best in the UK.

Whenever You tell them to add extra chocolate or ask for something special which they can do easily but they won’t. I asked to put extra chocolate in hot chocolate and rather to put extra they basically put less chocolate. Pathetic service

Always a pleasure to come here in my break time! I pop by around 2/3 times during the week and the team are unfailing friendly and efficient. Dana even remembers my usual order, which really is great service given the thousands of passengers that pass through daily. I use my reusable cup which means I get double ‘beans’ on the Costa app and the free cup of coffee comes round quickly!
Coffee is good but the staff is a little bit cold compared with other places. Nice atmosphere with charger equipment. I like the Xmas cup!

Stopped in for a mid-afternoon coffee and ordered two large servings. Better described as huge, our two cappuccinos were all (plus some more) we needed to reinvigorate us after a full-on day of royal tourism. At £2.50 (discounted today) the carrot cake we shared tasted just right too.

They have two Costa coffee shops at Victoria station. One downstairs and one upstairs. The downstairs one has loads of seating and is bright. The staff are super efficient and friendly. Great service and great location.

I asked for a hot chocolate and they served me boiling hot water with poorly mixed chocolate powder immediately, no milk. No safety. It's still painful to temperature test the contents 33 minutes later.

Unhealthy and unsafe service. Rushing when there wasn't a queue.

The coffee was disgusting and the person who served us was really rude.
On top of that, the prices are outrageously high for the quality of the products — which is basically none.
There are much better places around, and we’ll never come back here.
Asked for pot of porridge. This is instant porridge where they add water to the pot. Very little water was added so when it came to eating I had a couple of spoons of porridge and a cup of powder..

Stopped by Costa for a quick cappuccino, and it turned into the best part of my day. The coffee was rich, smooth, and comforting,but what made it special was the service. A cute girl from South India served with such grace and warmth. Her gentle smile and polite charm added a cozy touch that made the whole experience memorable. A perfect brew, made even better by a lovely soul behind the counter.

This Costa definitely stands out because of the lovely staff that work there! Manuela and  all the others are so welcoming and always so friendly and pleasant! We sometimes go there just because how friendly and nice they all are, and the coffee is good as well:)
Almond croissant is like rubber 🤮completely stale but will miss y train if I go back

I ordered a large hot chocolate and normally the ladies always use semi-skimmed milk but I watched her top up the remaining 1/3 with skimmed milk. I mentioned it to her and she looked me in the eyes, lied and said “no it’s semi skimmed” I watched her top it up with skimmed milk not semi skimmed. Got a remade drink but this shouldn’t have happened in the first place.

With the importance of allergens especially concerning by dairy, what she did was unacceptable.

Don’t know if I got the spelling right but Mitish (maybe the manager?) has to be the worst staff I’ve come to meet. Extremely unpleasant. I come here nearly everyday for coffee, don’t know why one will choose to be mean. Because of him, I definitely won’t be returning. Will rather grab a coffee from M&S or the other coffee shops outside hospital.

I went to this costa and was served by Joy. The transaction clearly went through but then the till crashed. Joy refused to give me what I had paid for and made me pay again. I now have two transaction on my bank account. I highlighted this to her manager Patricia. Who insisted I wait a few days to see if it goes through even though it is clearly on my bank account. I have never had someone force me to pay twice because THEIR tills crashed. Absolutely rude and horrific surface. I have made a complaint and both need to be fired. Disgusting people.

I had a very unpleasant experience here on the night of 26/10/2025 during my night shift.  When it was finally my turn to be served, she simply raised her eyebrows at me instead of greeting or speaking politely While ordering a coffee. I politely asked for a sleeve because the cup was too hot for me to hold. The lady staff member rudely raised her voice and pointed at my cup, saying, “You already have two cups, why do you still need a sleeve?” Everyone’s sense of heat and comfort is different, and there was no need for that kind of attitude. Very poor customer service and absolutely no courtesy. completely unacceptable behavior.

Costa Coffee,
Kings College Hospital,
Denmark Hill

This particular Costa Coffee Shop had two ladies working.
The shop was clean and tidy.
The two ladies serving were polite and attentive.  They knew about the working of the app.

I visited the Costa Coffee at Queen’s Hospital today to have my usual Spanish Latte. After waiting for quite a while, I finally placed my order. This time, the coffee was made by the manager instead of the usual staff. Unfortunately, it didn’t taste like a Spanish Latte at all—it was more like a regular latte.

I politely approached the manager to share my concern, explaining that I have this drink every day and know how it normally tastes. However, he responded quite dismissively and said that if I ordered the same again, it would still taste the same. His tone was unhelpful, and he smiled in a rather unpleasant, dismissive way.

I had a very unpleasant experience here on the night of 26/10/2025 during my night shift kings college hospital. When it was finally my turn to be served, she simply raised her eyebrows at me instead of greeting or speaking politely. While ordering a coffee, I politely asked for a sleeve because the cup was too hot for me to hold. The staff member rudely raised her voice and pointed at my cup, saying, “You already have two cups, why do you still need a sleeve?” Everyone’s sense of heat and comfort is different, and there was no need for that kind of attitude. Very poor customer service and absolutely no courtes. completely unacceptable behavior.

Awful service. I asked for oat milk, because I do not drink dairy, he said no you did not say that. He was extremely rude and angry when I said that’s not what I asked for that i just told him to leave it and not to remake it. He made me feel guilty he didn’t hear me. What awful people you hire. There’s people in this hospital saving lives that have more patients than all these workers at Costa combined. You should be ashamed to be working at Kings. Get rid of it asap.

Staff in Costa today are especially aggravating and unhelpful. My app wasn’t working immediately and they told me they couldn’t see where I had a free drink, where as other staff have told me before.
This particular cashier is always not very kind when I place orders. The barrista, started Supporting the rudeness from across the machine. They actually laughed when I challenged their unhelpful behaviour. Awful experience today.

Excellent service. Wasim was particularly helpful in sorting out our baby milk. He even remembered us the next day and knew the precise temperature we wanted. He is brilliant and deserved to be recognised.

In the Costa coffee shop as you enter the dental institute.There is a mid age white lady brown hair in a ponytail. Seeming to be from Eastern Europe judging by the accent.
She is so rude, no smile and unpleasant.
I asked her for an extra empty cup as the coffee she gave me was extremely hot, she barked at me that the cups are 50p. (Not ever heard of this. Last week I got coffee from the same shop and she didn’t mention the extra 50p). She then huffed like she was so frustrated and annoyed serving me.

I’m writing to share a negative experience I had during my visit to your store on the 13/09/2025 at 8:15am . I have a coffee intolerance, so I usually request drinks that are either coffee-free or can be made without espresso. In this case, I asked if I could have a cold version of a white hot chocolate — essentially just milk and white chocolate syrup, served cold. I’ve had this drink made for me before without any issues and have always been happy to pay the regular price.
However, the barista I spoke with told me this wasn’t possible. I explained my situation multiple times, and while I remained polite and cooperative, she became increasingly rude. At one point, she even accused me of lying when I mentioned that other staff members had made the drink for me before. This was upsetting and felt unnecessarily confrontational.
Later, I spoke to one of her colleagues, who confirmed that the drink could in fact be made as I had requested. I felt that the initial barista’s tone and unwillingness to accommodate such a simple request were not in line with the kind of service I’ve come to expect from your store.As you can see it was a very easy drink to make. I’ve read a couple of the negative reviews and I believe it’s the same female barista everyone is referring to with an awful attitude and terrible customer service.

06.05.2022 Went for morning coffee the cabinet were full with a wide range of  food.
The place was clean and tidy.
The customer service was terrible the lady behind the till couldn't understand plain english. The gentleman who making the coffees offered me coffee that was siting on the side for how I do not know and  refusing to make me a fresh one.
After a while he made me a fresh one under protest.

I’ve never met such kind and wonderful people at Costa as I did at this branch today.
The service was outstanding — everything was just perfect!
The staff(Yousuf and Sadiya) were very attentive, incredibly fast, and true professionals at what they do. 👍👍👍 Highly recommend!

Such a lovely Costa store! We visit every Friday and the staff there are so friendly and make my daughter and I feel welcome every time we visit. They now know my order off by heart and it’s those little things that make it our favourite Costa in London 🩷

The service here is terrible. You need to re-train your baristas because they don’t seem to understand what ‘less Ice’ means and do not make good coffee. The particular lady was very defensive and irritated, you should not be in a customer service job if you are that sensitive. (I didn’t get her name but She was the only woman working at 1:16pm on Saturday 6 September).

The coffee itself is exceptional!
If you're looking for a coffee spot that offers both outstanding drinks and a great atmosphere, look no further than Costa Blackheath. I enjoy every moment with a great cup of coffee, this place never disappoints! Speaking of the baristas, the staff here is what makes this place truly stand out. They’re not only skilled but also incredibly welcoming and attentive. They take the time to recommend drinks, chat with regulars, and ensure every order is just right. Their passion for coffee and customer service shines through in everything they do. Highly recommend!

Lovely, modern Costa in the middle of a trading estate in Blackheath. Drive-thru on site, so easy to get a quick drink. Plenty of seating inside and out, friendly staff. Plenty of parking, just be careful if you have a large SUV. 100% recommend.

Blackheath hill Costa coffee,
The customer service at the London Costa coffee shop is the best. They prepare the coffee exactly how you want it, and the staff are friendly too. Overall, the manager is amazing.

Great branch of Costa with excellent staff. Coffee is also excellent. Sunny outdoor area makes it a good place to visit if you have a dog. Costa as company overall became too mean with regards to portion control and pricing so we chose to move on independant coffee shops that provide better value. This in no way reflects on those who work here, though, who are mostly really nice people.

Had an amazing experience at this Costa this morning. The staff here are absolutely amazing. Very helpful and friendly. Purchased some glass bottles as gifts for Christmas and was absolutely amazed that the person serving had kept all the original packaging so my goods won’t get damaged. Really appreciate this type of attention to detail. Not to mention the store is absolutely immaculate. With this type of friendly service, it can turn any bad say around. You guys are 10/10

Costa Coffee – A Welcome Return to Familiar Flavors

Costa Coffee used to be my absolute top spot for coffee. After years away, I found myself in Greenwich and decided to step in and it felt like coming home.

The coffee? Unchanged. Exactly as I remembered it. Consistent, bold, no surprises in the best possible way. Costa doesn’t experiment unnecessarily; they stick to what they do well, and they do it solidly.

And the blueberry muffin? My old favorite. Moist, packed with blueberries, perfectly sweet not overdone, not dry. That first bite brought back exactly what I felt years ago. Simple satisfaction from a product that knows what it’s supposed to be.

The location in Greenwich maintains Costa’s signature aesthetic red chairs, warm lighting, floor-to-ceiling windows. Clean, functional, welcoming without trying too hard.

It’s not groundbreaking. It’s not trying to reinvent coffee culture. But sometimes you don’t need innovation, you need reliability. Costa delivered that, just like it always did.

Worth the revisit?

Absolutely. Sometimes the best experiences are the ones that remind you why something became a favorite in the first place.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

Staff here seem like they all hate their job. Slow, rude, unfriendly. Queuing system is confusing.

Honestly don’t bother going here - lots of nicer, friendlier independent cafes on this road with much nicer coffees and service.

Yummy toasties served here, and a good range of drinks. Also lots of seating, and is pretty empty even at midday on weekends. It’s right next door to the Greenwich centre, so it’s a good place to grab a snack or drink after going there, and is also a nice place to do some work, and there is also free WiFi.

I ordered two mac n cheese online and a drink. They only sent the drink. It may have been unavailable but it let me order it online. Again, could be the fault of the delivery service. Or maybe it's staff duty to let them know it's unavailable. Even so, this has happened in the past with other Costa coffee branch and one of the staff members was kind enough to call me to explain and let me decide to go ahead with the order of one item or they offered me a replacement item instead. Unfortunately on this occasion, this Costa coffee branch just sent me a drink by itself and I had to pay the service charge too.

Christmas cups are here..... Like this store, friendly staff, good food and cake selection, outside seating available but on a busy road. Close to bus stops so easy access into Greenwich or the 02. Can be a bit messy at times but doesn't change the taste... Thumbs up 👍🏼
#update Still a great store, manager very nice, love the wide choice of drinks and milk alternatives 👍🏼

The first thing I noticed, the staff were very welcoming and friendly!. The place was relatively quiet, I was able to sit and work on my laptop for a few hours as there were working sockets to charge devices.

Came in to pick up a slice of cake that you get for your birthday. The male staff member picked up a knife which made me wonder why. After I got home I realised he took the slice of cake that’s supposed to be served and sliced it in half! Is the tiny slice I got is supposed to be £4.20? I hope that’s a joke as I would not pay for it that much if I was buying and if he put the other half up for sale again. I thought you get the whole slice thats on display? The taste of the cake was fine.

This is a very professional coffee shop with enough space. You can choose to sit in the public space in the mall or go to the store. There are toilets and enough tables inside, and the staff here will be happy to help you.

The hot latte was really hot, so I chose to dress up. They quickly packed it for me, which made me very happy.

Although they are very busy because there are so many guests coming, they are all very patient and calm.

Haven't been here since a while, because Costa quality went downhill for me. Today I popped in Costa at Lewisham Shopping Centre unplanned, and I was extremely surprised, staff were very very very helpful and polite and what I ordered was spot on. Once again when is full package costumer service + well made drink, is a win win!

I always love visiting this branch of Costa. The staff are friendly and welcoming, and they normally remember my coffee order - despite not visiting regularly!

Nice selection of sandwiches and cakes, though they do often sell out of vegetarian/vegan options very early. Occasionally I have had to go elsewhere because of this issue.

Tables are usually cleared quite quickly, and staff are normally good at ejecting groups of school children who sometimes come in (without purchasing) and hog the tables.

My reason for only giving four stars is the lack of WiFi. If you sit inside the coffee shop your phone can’t receive any signal either, so you can’t use your phone for anything other than offline work. There is a cordoned off seating area outside of the store (within the shopping centre where WiFi is available) but I don’t feel comfortable sitting there as it’s too exposed, and makes you an easy target for potential thieves to steal phones and bags.
I go to this famous coffee shop several days a week, and today I want to give a special shout-out to Samuel and Nikola, wonderful people, always so attentive and smiling. Thank you so much! ❤️

This week I decided to treat myself with a sweet treat at my local Costa as a loyal costa club customer . I was deeply disappointed by the absolute disgusting level of service I received while there especially from a employee there called Imogen. Whilst serving the customer before she was sweet and cheerful but when it was time to be served her whole demeaner changed and she was very cold, unwelcoming and very dismissive of my  allergen concerns. Maybe this branch should invest in  some Diversity and Inclusion workshops in order to learn how to treat customers who are not of white skin with the same level of respect.
The store is clean and beautiful, the goods are arranged very neatly, and there are some public areas to explore. It‘s very quiet. There are many seats, and you can also sit outdoors.
Lovely clean Costa with efficient friendly staff! Hot chocolate absolutely delicious!

The staff at this particular branch is very friendly and attentive. Store was clean and tables were cleared promptly. I had a latte and a slice of cake and enjoyed both. They even brought the tray to me seeing I’ve got my hands full. Great place to relax and enjoy the view. Will definitely come back!

I’ve been a loyal Costa customer for years, but my experience at this location was beyond disappointing. When I was trying to load the Costa app to redeem my points, I had some technical difficulties. Instead of being patient or offering to help, the store manager let out an exaggerated sigh and shot me a dirty look, making me feel like I was an inconvenience rather than a valued customer.

Her attitude was completely unprofessional and unnecessary. A little bit of patience and basic customer service would have gone a long way, but instead, I was made to feel embarrassed for something that wasn’t even my fault. It’s really frustrating to see this kind of treatment, especially when Costa promotes itself as a friendly and welcoming brand.

If this is how they treat regular customers, I can’t imagine how they handle new ones. I’ll definitely be rethinking whether I want to return to this location in the future. Disappointing and unacceptable service!
I had Cinnamon Bun with my Tea. Just didn't like it so much may be the reason there are so many fresh and hot pastries  are available in Blackheath cafes. Big competition on pastries side...
Would've been 5 stars but toilet is revolting- hasn't been introduced to bleach in years. Staff member could've been deep cleaning it rather than standing vaping outside!

Staff friendly and welcoming, they truly are.
Costa of coffee and food is now so over priced just not worth going.  Alas another company that has lost the plot.
£5.00+ for a coffee.....seriously!!!
Goodbye
Typical Costa experience - no filter coffee or cold brew. Bathroom is cramped and very dirty and their delivery is left on the customer tables.

Went for a coffee for the first time the other day. Was very pleased as it was almost empty. Staff was pleasant and friendly. I went and sat in the area near the loo, had a great view of the rain outside. Was happy and enjoyed my flat white..would definitely recommend it,..

This particular Costa is extremely dirty and the staff are inexperienced... The toilet did not have any toilet paper and the floors were wet. The staff didn't know  if they would accept Amex as a payment method, also the plugs were out of order.

A hidden Costa! Even living in the area for a while I did not know the Costa was located by one of the main Squares in Deptford. A short walk from the rail station and next to the High Street. Inside the shop is large consisting of the main service area and two seating areas. Range of seating from comfy chairs to high bar by the window for a quick break. Outdoor seating under awning dependant on weather. Standard Costa offering with the fridge well stocked and baked goods. WiFi on offer and mobile signal works well. Toilet is under a passcode so need to ask the staff for access. Over the years the service always pleasant and the shop is clean in good condition.

It was okay but our orders are usually getting messed up, weve given it a few opportunities but decided no more. I've asked for frappes and paid extra for coffee in it - no coffee put in. I've asked for alternative milk - wasn't done. The coffee wasn't tasting right.

Recently they hired a trainee which i thought awesome but I was concerned to walk in the last time and find that she was serving all drinks alone with no supervision.
Understandably at some point that is fine but she was still in training which means she should not be. The drink wasn't what I had ordered but she was on her own and thats not her fault.

Excellent and Hard working staff. I have been here often to relax and have a good cup of coffee, and the staff never disappoint. They have many choices of food. Good place to rest, re-energise and recuperate. Keep up the good work!!!

Convenient location- Charlton Shopping- in the Next store- first floor. Easy signage. Loads of seating space, and a good clean vibe.
The staff were friendly and smiling.
Big windows all around- so it is brilliant location on the days we have lovely weather.
And ofcourse free parking at the Charlton Retail Park.

Located conveniently at Charlton Shopping, inside the Next store on the first floor with clear signage. Plenty of comfortable seating and a fresh, clean atmosphere. The friendly staff are always smiling. Big windows surround the space, making it perfect for sunny days. Plus, there's free parking available at Charlton Retail Park.

It is a decent size coffee shop, with a balanced environment. There were enough comfortable sitting spaces inside the next shop with wide outside view. The decor of the shop is stand. It is a great place to hang out with alone, friends, family or colleagues in between the shopping. The stuffs were helpful, kind and welcoming. I had the chocolate coffee latte, enjoyed it!
It's on the top floor of a clothing store (Next) which seems like an odd place to put a coffee shop. But I dunno, it kinda works.
Had the worst stomach ache and vomiting and spent hours in the loo all because of this Costa coffee got the chocolate frappe and I’ll never again do that.
This Costa is located inside the cinema entrance to the left. Staff were really friendly and helpful. It wasn’t busy so was nice without too much commotion.

Kiah the barista was absolutely amazing, very knowledgeable. She was running the whole place herself and doing an amazing job!
She deserves a raise!
Its located inside Odeon Cinema. Its a little store but its just nice that you have options to buy coffee or pastries here.

Nice little Costa inside the Odeon cinema, perfect to grab a tea or coffee before a screening. It has seats and armchairs and it's not usually too busy so it's great. Maybe they could just make it brighter inside as the lights are a bit dim, but it's ok. It closes at 7pm.

Rude server, got my order wrong and gave me a look when I told her that. Said the costa reward doesn't work in this shop. Didn't tell us when our drinks were ready. Ruined the experience for catching up with friends.

Lovely experience at Costa Coffee! I ordered a small hot chocolate, but the portion was surprisingly generous, much more than I expected for a small size. The taste was rich, warm, and comforting, and I really loved the quantity they served. Perfect for a cozy treat!

The cappuccino is very good (I’m Italian).
The staff is very friendly and smiling .
Very clean ,toilet inside , wheelchair accessible . Mobile Charger Wireless.
In front of Mark and Spencer, 30 seconds from Sainsbury’s .

I love coming here in the morning for an oat flat White. The service and atmosphere are so lovely. I always see staff welcoming with a smile and positive attitude, and it is a big pleasure to see through the large Window walls how the surrounding world wakes up in the early mornings, with a book in hands and a cup of creamy and comforting coffee.

Good drinks
Lemon muffin & blue
Super drinks
Super service by the blonde lady on Saturday evening @around 5/6pm
Very helpful with my orders
African lady very plight with greet& meet& bye!! Only problem slightly tables are messy but then again a lot of trade and mums with kids so all good
Large spacious area for seating inside and out
Free electric top up/parking
The staff here are so so wonderful, the cafe is always clean and coffees are excellent. HQ need to support them with the constant thieves who come in and steal things..

Costa Coffee – North Acton
Stopped by Costa Coffee in North Acton and got a free cake for my birthday — such a nice surprise..
Great coffee, friendly staff, and an awesome way to start the day.

I have a severe nut allergy and Kasia took her time and went above and beyond to ensure that I was being looked after. I wanted to personally write this review because this is the standard that all companies should strive for. It was something as small as tea but she took her time, was persistent and made sure I was being looked after despite the shop being extremely busy. Please give this woman a raise or promotion!  I am so serious. I'm not even a huge fan of Costa or of Coffee shops in general but the customer service there is unmatched. There are so many huge companies in London who thrive on purely making profits but forget the essence of simple care and interaction and making customers feel heard and seen.

A pleasant, spacious and bright Costa outlet, with excellent service and kept very clean.  The only criticism I have, which takes the rating down by one star, is the wi-fi which you cannot connect to automatically but have to ask the staff for a one hour password.  I have never seen this in any other Costa.

Bad service, mid coffee.

Staff kept pursuing me to buy the food even I had clearly stated several times that I only wanted a drink. After multiple failed attempts to sell me food, staff attitude turned really bad. When I got my COLD drink and asked for a straw, they refused to give it to me and said ‘you don’t need a straw for that.”
Svitlana and Honey are amazing baristas and workers in general. Everytime I come to this place I always see them very active nonstop. Well done!

I had a wonderful experience at Costa Coffee Acton Central, and it continues to be one of my favorite coffee shops in the area. On my most recent visit, I ordered a hot chocolate, and it was absolutely delicious. It was rich, smooth, and perfectly balanced not too sweet and not too heavy. Every sip was comforting and clearly made with care. It was exactly the kind of drink you want when you’re looking to relax or treat yourself, and it tasted consistently amazing from start to finish. What truly makes this Costa stand out, however, is the staff. Every time I visit, I am welcomed with warm smiles and friendly attitudes. The team is incredibly kind, polite, and genuinely welcoming, which makes a big difference in the overall experience. They take the time to listen to your order, are patient, and always make you feel valued as a customer. Their positive energy really brightens the atmosphere and makes the shop feel inviting and comfortable. Another thing worth mentioning is how clean and well maintained this Costa Coffee is. The shop is always spotless whenever I visit, from the counters to the seating areas. Tables are cleared promptly, and the whole place feels fresh, organized, and pleasant. It’s clear that cleanliness is a top priority for the team, which makes it an even more enjoyable place to sit and enjoy a drink.
Overall, Costa Coffee Acton Central offers excellent service, a welcoming environment, and consistently great drinks. The yummy hot chocolate, friendly staff, and clean surroundings make it a place I’m always happy to return to. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a cozy spot with great service and delicious drinks.

The quality is what you would expect from any Costa Coffee,croissants, toast, etc.
The cappuccino is good, with the perfect temperature.
The staff is very kind and smiling, which is not something you can take for granted at 6:30 in the morning.
The place is very spacious, with lots of light and background music that isn’t too loud. It’s a suitable environment for meeting friends, studying, and perfect for early workers,many of whom are regulars at this Costa.
The environment is very clean and also suitable for those who unfortunately need to use a wheelchair.
There is an internal restroom accessible to people with disabilities as well.

I especially bought your signature coffee. OK, we understand that you have terrible coffee in these kinds of chain coffee shops, but also, your toilets are very dirty. They are literally the perfect place to catch a disease. I don't share photos here. Because I don't want to make anyone sick.

A busy Costa outlet on Acton High Street, with a spacious seating area.  I thought a little more effort could have been put into the presentation of my coffee and toasted sandwich, as the coffee cup was not full and the toasted sandwich was only toasted on one side.

Staff were friendly and efficient. Good upselling too.
The iced matcha was horrible. Not even premixed and a horrible flavour for £5 just for a medium
The lemon drizzle cake was tasteless with a hint if lemon only
The hot chocolates are just laden in sugar.

Ill never return to costa for their overpriced drinks and the loitering men who sit outside smoking all day. I miss the Starbucks that closed down at least they had some class and better presentation

I’m extremely disappointed with my recent visit to one of your branches. I ordered my usual coffee frappe with cream on top, along with an iced whipped white chocolate latte. From the moment I walked in, the service was cold and unwelcoming. The barista barely acknowledged me, and their colleague looked visibly annoyed to be preparing the drinks.

When the order arrived, the iced latte was incredibly watery, and the cream on the frappe was curdled and sour. I asked for them to be remade, and instead of apologizing, the staff told me they had run out of whole-fat milk and used skimmed milk—without informing me beforehand. That’s not acceptable.

We then asked for two coffee frappes instead, but they were made carelessly. Both were overloaded with ice, lacked the smooth texture frappes are supposed to have, and tasted off. We only drank them to take a photo and show how poorly they were made.

This is my regular drink, and I’ve never had such a bad version of it. Between the poor service, lack of transparency, and terrible drink quality, this visit was a complete letdown.

Great service and very friendly staff. The quality of the food is good and the seating area is really nice and comfortable. Central Cafe in Bognor Regis has a lovely atmosphere and is a great place to relax and enjoy a Coffee ☕️.

I’ve been coming to this Costa since it first opened, but sadly it has become more and more unwelcoming over the years. The management seems focused on every single penny rather than the customer experience.

For example, I’ve seen staff refuse something as basic as a straw unless asked repeatedly — with responses like “you can sip from the cup” instead of just providing what the customer needs. I’ve also witnessed vulnerable people asking to use the toilet and being rejected without any compassion.

Another issue is the constant noise from their blender, which has been going on for months. Instead of fixing it, they simply tell customers “it’s a small store, that’s why it’s noisy.” That’s not an excuse — it just shows a lack of care.

And it’s not just a one-off problem. On more than one occasion, they’ve had people painting the stairs and walkway while customers were seated nearby, with paint droplets putting everyone at risk. That’s completely unprofessional in a place where people are supposed to relax.

It makes me feel that spending money here simply isn’t worth it if this is the image Costa wants to give of how they treat people — because one day, it could be me in that vulnerable position.

Meanwhile, competitors are innovating, welcoming, and offering better service — even giving water freely to anyone who walks in, regardless of whether they buy something. If Costa keeps ignoring these basics, it’s no surprise so many of their stores are closing

The food was fine but unfortunately the toilets were revolting. I visited at 5:30 on a Monday and according to the cleaning log they hadn't been cleaned since lunchtime then day before. That certainly looked and smelled about right.

Nice environment.People can feel relax to stay here.The cappuccino and tea is delicious.But the staff won’t use the costa ceramic mugs to store coffee for eat here customer. The snack in break deal can only choose the croissant.
I visited here twice the overall experience is fine.

Sandwich was lovely, well toasted, tasty, fresh. Ambience clean and the lady was lovely.
Coffee however was very very disappointing. Asked for extra hot, got luke warm. The taste was just not nice.

I keep coming back here to have my morning coffee and get work done not just because of the clean and inclusive atmosphere but because the customer service is fantastic - it’s quick and staff are extremely friendly. They have a really good rapport with each other as well as the customers of different backgrounds. I’ve watched as they help the more elderly customers order, get seated and comfortable.

I'm a very regular user of this branch of Costa, and have always found it to be particularly good. Coffee is great, staff and service are both efficient and exceptionally friendly. Often I come here,even if I'm not shopping at the Sainsburys where it's located. It's very nice that the majority of staff even remember my name(I try equally to remember all of theirs😃😃) Certainly a coffee shop I'd happily recommend, whether shopping at Sainsburys or not. Worth the extra bit of a drive for me to get there,plenty of parking too. Nice bright atmosphere and always exceptionally clean.
I really love this place, the coffee is good,rhe surroundings very clean and the staff are really2x kind and friendly, all of the staff have a good customer service❤️

It is located inside the big Sainsburys off Ladbroke Grove, to the right of the entrance.  There is a large seating area, and I was surprised by the panoramic windows with a view over the canal.  Service was excellent, with my coffee and muffin being brought to the table.

Saturday afternoon was quite quiet in the hospital. I popped into the Costa coffee cafe. To grab a quick snack. All of the food and beverages looked very good and wholesome. The staff were very helpful and friendly. I was very impressed that the café was selling some hot snacks at discounted prices. So I couldn't resist a sausage bun. Which was heated to the right temperature without being too hot.

For the second day running this store has no ice and therefore cannot sell any of their frappes or cooler drinks range. Surely someone is responsible knowing the weather is going to be warm to make sure the store gas plenty of ice as its expected their would be a demand for these cold drinks . Not good enough costa

I visited the hospital for a health issue and after I was hungry.

I saw they had a Costa shop and I went there to rest, eat and drink because they had a sitting area too.

The sitting area was bright ,a lot of light was coming in, through  the windows.

The only thing I didn't like ,was that the tables weren't very clean but I understand it because it was very busy at that time.

They had many choices,and their drinks were very interesting(tiramisu,lavender,salted caramel,white chocolate).Next time I will definitely try one of those.

I had a  premium meal deal ,that was a falafel wrap and it was delicious. An iced coffee and chicken satay.

The prices are a bit expensive but I totally understand it ,because it's like that ,everywhere in central London nowadays.

Ashwina served me and she was nice, polite and helpful. Also she was quick and she paid attention to every customer ,she didn't ignore them or delay them.
