Thank you to the staff member Yemisi at Costa in St Thomas’ Hospital. She helped me find the halal and non-halal options and was very kind and polite. I really appreciate her excellent service ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️

Does not care about sustainability. I asked for a ceramic cup and they said they only have reusable cups for customers! If they cared mor about sustainability, I’d be a loyal costa customer. Noe I choose nero❤️

The Costa Coffee at St Thomas’ Hospital, located near the main entrance, between WHSmith, post office and M&S, providing continuous service to patients, visitors, and staff.  ￼ While the café offers a convenient spot for refreshments, some patrons have noted that the food quality has room for improvement. Overall, the establishment provides a satisfactory experience, with an overall rating of 7 out of 10.

Costa at the Hospital has been a lifeline for us every day for two weeks. Open & Airy atmosphere. Extremely kind staff serving us every single time. Brightens us up to come down from the ward & take some time out.
Top marks on kindness to the staff here!

Lovely Costa located inside St Thomas Hospital
Great selection of food and drinks
Hot or cold Sandwiches
Great selection of cakes
Snacks
Lovely selection of coffee
Ice coffee

Open 7 days a week 24 hours a day

I love the Mango and Passionfruit smoothie
Wilshire Ham and Cheese Toastie

You can also buy flavours Syrup
Costa Coffee grains
Cups

We stopped by yesterday evening just to grab a quick coffee from Costa. We had to us the toilet and the waitress pointed us to use the adjoining toilets of Odeon. But when we tried to use it, a security guard stoppedu us and said we needed a receipt to enter.

We usually don’t take printed receipts to avoid unnecessary paper waste, so this felt quite frustrating. Being denied access to basic amenities after making a purchase is a poor customer experience and feels very outdated.

Definitely disappointing, especially for such a central and well-known location.

Got a 2 good to go bag (supposed to reduce food waste) about 5 mins before shop closes. Told I can pick 3 items only from a MASSIVE pile. The rest? Will be thrown out or possibly given to staff according to the girls who work there. What's the point in being in a waste medical scheme to not use it properly?

Usual selection from Costa however the service from the young lady was exceptional.
The Xmas special Hot Chocolates were very good.
Only down side was there are building works around it and it was quite difficult to see how to get in (we actually saw a number of people give up and walk away and go elsewhere)

Nice indoor place to have a rest with coffee and toilets. Lol
We ordered a hot medium Latte £3.25, tastes milky not much coffee beans.
Feel warm and very glad to receive a flower balloon from next table, Gracias!

Enjoyed a lovely Costa Cappuccino and a toasted ham and cheese sandwich. Costa Coffee can be found inside the Odeon cinema. It has seating outside, and was perfect for a warm sunny Autominal Sunday. Great for people watching in Leicester Square. Toilets can be found on the ground floor just beyond where the barista prepare the coffee.

Great freindly staff. They seemed overworked and didn't have time to keep the customer area clean, but that's not the fault of them as it was extremely busy, but they kept smiling.

It's not too overpriced considering where it is.

Disabled access was terrible when we visited as the lift broke, as did the escalator again just one of those days. Normally, it would be fine.

Coffee was really nice. Seating is communal and limited, so we did have to stand, unfortunately.

It's a lovely station but very busy most of the time, so if you struggle with crowds, then avoid peak travel.

The announcement kept saying lots of bag theft had taken place, so just be mindful of that.

I ordered a hot chocolate and was given a coffee!! Naturally I trusted they gave me the correct order and got in my train. Wrong! They essentially just stole £5 from me because I got nothing other than the task of having to get rid of a pointless drink. They were not that busy, there was no excuse for making that much of a
mistake other than stupidity.

If you like over roasted coffee and horrible tasting coffee, go here. One of the worse coffees I've ever had. I should know better but I was tired from travel but wow! Grim! I asked for two, only got given one but they did give me the second for free. I couldn't drink it though because it tasted so bad, so I gave it away. £3.80 is steep for a very bad Americano! Might be better to get a flat white or latte to make it taste better.

Excellent service and super friendly staff. The coffee is fresh and hot! Conveniently located next to the station. The downside was that the egg sandwich is tasteless, no flavor; they forgot to put salt and seasoning in it! Great they provide power stations in the cafe!
The staffs are responsible and friendly. When my order was cancelled by uncertain situation, they responded it quickly and gave me compensation. A super nice experience here.

After a long day I got into the this venue hence it looks  very nice from outside and atmosphere was very pleasant to enjoy nice mug of coffee to ease your mind after a hepatic day. But unfortunately the coffee maker (attender) was not pleasant, ignoring and rude to me the way he served to myself. He is young boy who served to me on 05th November between 5.30pm to 6.00pm. The reason I was trying to highlight the person who served me was ,  absolutely wrong hiring for the front line job and he ruined my rest of the day.
Normally my experience with Costa always great and after this incident I might have an ambiguity to get into the Costa moving forward.
Good luck for your business

I saw an advert for the Bubble Burberry Frappe and was eager to try it, but when I visited 2 other Costa Coffee locations, they didn’t have it. I was starting to lose hope, but I decided to give this Costa a go, and I was thrilled when they told me they had it. And It was exactly what I’d hoped for!
Thank you Maya for making my unusual drink ☕ 🍋. It was great and also hot. Thank you! You're a star ⭐.

This is not my first time, love this costa yummy coffee and delicious raspberry cupcake. I tried Chi Latte last Dec and yesterday. Frap slated caramel it was perfect and refreshing. Nice atmosphere  and great location.

It’s so cold in there. Yesterday, It was pouring down outside - all day long. I stopped in there with my daughter to dry off a bit and grab a hot drink and the Aircon was blasting cold air at us the whole time! I asked the staff to turn it off and they did for 10 min then turned it back on! I asked the girl why do they have the Aircon on when it’s so cold outside and she said that I have to ask the manager because he wants it like this!?!! Who is the manager? A snowman??!

Costa Coffee at Hatton Garden in Farringdon is a pleasant enough place to relax and enjoy a small-plate meal or snack. The specialty coffee selections are all excellent, and the sandwiches, although pre-made, are very good. Service is very good also; they’ll heat that sandwich up for you too. At Hatton Garden Hotel next door there is no breakfast offered so this place is very convenient and satisfactory to fill that gap. For your reference, a latte, sandwich, and pastry cost me about £15. This is in the middle of the “diamond district”, so much of the clientele here are wheelers ‘n’ dealers and money talkers, which for me was somewhat annoying, but it is what it is; just be aware.

Great store with plenty of seating and a nice selection of food and drink. To improve the value for money could be better but the staff were helpful and friendly and the toilets inside were clean. I’ve never been to this Costa Coffee location before but I was very happy with it and would definitely visit again! It was easy to do business with them and the seating area ambiance was nice too. I would recommend it to friends and family and would definitely return, thank you!
It’s fine, the AC is working, but please note there is no WiFi. Would really help to introduce this

"I had the pleasure of visiting Costa Coffee Hatton Gardens today and was truly impressed by the wonderful staff, with special recognition for their Store Manager Nowrin. The customer service was outstanding, and the welcoming atmosphere made my visit enjoyable. Nowrin and the team showcased their expertise in coffee, ensuring a perfect brew. The shop was impeccably clean, and even during a busy time, they served efficiently. They went above and beyond to personalize my experience. It's evident that teamwork and a commitment to quality are core values here. Moreover, their active engagement with the community and innovative menu options make this Costa Coffee shop a true gem. Thank you for a memorable visit!"

It's been a while (like several weeks) since I dine in at costa. I forgot the only thing that I always order (which is the cortado) and the service crew help me remember it by narrowing the list of coffee based on the little information/description i gave. They are friendly too. Great experience!

Incredible customer service by Brijesh. He is greeting well and farewell with nice words. His coffee always so nice with same taste.
Really nice place and friendly staff.

A couple of years ago, someone made a review about a blonde, Eastern European woman. I believe that this encounter was with that very same person. A couple of days ago, my friends and I went to a Costa branch in Central London, near Holborn, because  we had read a blog detailing a free coffee promotion for results day. In hindsight, I realise that this was misinformation. However, that does not excuse what happened at this branch. When I enquired about the promotion to the barista, she decided to hysterically laugh in my face for roughly 45 seconds, in a manner one could only begin to describe as manic. She did not answer my question. I politely repeated it, to which I received the same response, only more charged and enthusiastic. She then asked where I had come from, which I felt was a little peculiar. Overall, the customer service that I received was appalling; her vile demeanour and shockingly rude attitude left me feeling belittled and diminished. I was left with no choice but to awkwardly retreat from the shop with my friends, which was a shame as I might have purchased something, regardless of the lack of free products.
Nice shop

​Ali and Konal consistently provide exceptional service, combining efficiency with a personal touch that makes every visit enjoyable. They take the time to get to know their customers, fostering a welcoming atmosphere that keeps patrons returning. Over the years, their dedication has been evident in countless positive interactions.​

Earlier this week, I witnessed their professionalism firsthand. A customer requested "hot milk," which, due to an accent, was misheard as "oat milk." When the mix-up was realized, the customer responded not well. Despite this, Ali and Konal handled the situation with remarkable calmness and courtesy, offering a free coffee and an upgrade to rectify the mistake. Their composed and generous response in the face of this was truly commendable.​

Their unwavering commitment to excellent customer service, even during challenging situations, sets them apart. Ali and Konal are undoubtedly the nicest duo around, making every visit a pleasant experience.
Quite coffee shop, excelent place for meeting and have a great moment with friends
Staff are always polite and welcoming. Service is extremely fast yet the quality remains excellent.

Calm place. Has nice seating area down stairs, lots of seats and very nice lay out and future.

Spacious but can't get very packed.
Just passing by for a coffee and a cake, the baristas were really friendly, talkative and professional. The drink was really good too!!! Thankyou
Noman was great and accommodated to our last minute order!! 10/10
Plenty of parking across and customer service is second to none
The barista/gentleman at this Costa makes the best flat whites.  I wish more of the Costa locations would deliver this level of excellence.
Had some time to kill so popped in for a pot of English Breakfast Tea, good value for London didnt have anything to eat, friendly efficient service.

I used to take a Costa, nice coffee, but every time I come over to this place and some issues with the staff.
No good foam in the coffee or just no blended ice.
That is the different to be kind and good employee or just a basic employee

Update: new staff, she is very friendly and it's a nice place to meet up with friends.

There is a morning female staff, very rude and just gives me a hating look every time I go in the coffee shop in the morning, I guess she hates her job and passed her hate to customers? maybe better staff training is needed!

Delish coffee and very good vibes. Plenty of seating and all the ladies working were lovely :) such a busy road but you can really relax and enjoy a coffee and a cake. Thanks for the nice atmosphere !

Ordered a large latte because I wanted a larger drink than my reusable cup would hold (usually a small size). Felt very light when I picked it up, so I waited until I got on the train, then poured it into my small reusable cup... and it fit, with space for the lid too. Latte was nice but I would like the amount that I actually paid for.

I'd asked for a medium iced green latté, for which you obviously pay more. I hadn't realised that it would come 3/4 consistency of ice cubes. Dirty, sly tactic to make money and cash in at your expense. "Give the punters mostly frozen water then put the least amount of content in." This method of serving did them no favours as I will never go into a Costa again. I cannot recommend this outlet.
author_name: G Maps randomly deletes reviews & pix

review_text:
Baristas need to stop chitchatting and ignoring the customers they are halfway through serving and trying to tell another customer before me that their payment didn't go through. The young lady with the headscarf didn't even listen to my order which she got completely wrong (gave me the wrong milk for my drink) and didn't give me a chance to scan my app. I was in a rush to get the train so didn't want to waste another minute.
Generally I find the service ok when I visit once in a while but this particular day was not impressive.

Always amazed how friendly and helpful the staff manage to stay here, extremely busy spot with no let up in customers. Never had a problem with food or drinks here (despite some reviews moaning about quality) Seating is shared with the other food outlets on the level, so can be a bit of a scrum, but this is better than it used to be now Prezzo has closed.
Small branch within St.Pancras Railway Station. With o/s seating and three tables. Nearest to Platform 1.  Which was ideal for me. Staff friendly too.

Small Costa inside Odeon cinema.

Don't get such a low score, but everyone's experience is unique.

Mine was good, attentive staff, handed my order quickly and they didn't look miserable like majority of population now.

They serve banging bacon rolls, super soft, bacon is full of flavour. Only thing it’s missing is ketchup. Highly recommend this.

Chocolate one was the best imho.

Clean and tidy store.
It wasn't crowded. Customer services beyond expectations. Delicious cake and delicious chocolate that has been made especially for Christmas. Prices are very fair. I will definitely come back there.

A really sweet and cosy Costa!
There are seats outside the shop (none inside) but it’s comfy and accommodating.
the girl working today was so friendly too and very welcoming :D really makes all the difference.
the cafe has a light range of sandwiches and pastries. it also has some great sweet treats!!

One of the worst Costa I have been to.

Asked for a latte and I received a gray-ish beverage (almost see thru) that tasted like reheated water. Asked the "barista" to remake it and received a hot chocolate instead.
To be honest the hot chocolate was delicious and definitely better choice than latte.

Costa Coffee store serving hot drinks and some iced drinks alongside impulse items like brownies, shortbread, wafers and biscuits. Takeaway only, but great to have fresh barista made coffee right on the doorstep of where I work!
Friendly helpful staff, with fast service.  Plenty of indoor seating and a clean calm environment.  Bravo

Extremely slow service. Counter unmanned as member of staff had gone on a break. Unable to add beans to Costa card but could be added if receipt kept. Didn’t offer receipt. Had run out if cream/topping for hot chocolate but still same price. Staff member grumpy and unprofessional. Did not have to wait for a table but wait to be served was over 10 minutes bearing in mind I was the only one in the queue!

Service with a smile Madalina was very busy when we went Sunday morning. But she handled each customer with a smile, a pleasant word and of course great service. So not only was our coffee and bacon bun great, Madalina made it even better!

Not all Costa Coffee stores are the same, but this particular one stands out. I felt it was important to leave a review. They always get my order right—a vanilla oat latte. I consistently experience excellent customer service. Although I don’t have much time, Maldalina is usually at the store and takes my order quickly. There are also two other staff members, one male and one female, who were not present today, so I wasn’t able to get their names. However, you can always ask for Maldalina when you visit.

Came here to buy something to eat just to use the toilet. The only toilet I found in the costa was the disabled one and locked. I asked the girl on the till if there were any other toilets available and she said to use the ones in the hotel. I went into the hotel frantically looking for the toilets which needed a key card to open. Asked a nearby woman where the toilets were who told me to use my keycard through the door. I explained I don’t have one as I was sent here from costa. She then gave me a dirty look and shrugged her shoulders as if there was nothing she could to do to help. Not very disabled friendly. Don’t know if the woman worked at the hotel but if so she needs to be a bit more considerate and work on customer service.

If I could give zero stars, I would. The service was the worst we had during our stay in London with multiple employees. All three of our coffees were undrinkable, which looking at the picture I took of almost the entire cup filled with milk, it makes sense. Save your money and go anywhere else.
Thanks to Anna and her team my daily 1 hour train journey is filled with warm breakfast and great chatter. Thanks Team ❤️
This is definitely my go to Costa coffee shop as I come by often the staffs always get my orders right and my allergens taken care of
Very poor salted caramel frappe, next to no flavour as there was hardly a drop of syrup in the drink. Would not recommend this outlet.

This rating is for coffee, not any other products or services. Costa's latte is the weakest. They throw away half of the espresso. You can ask them not to throw it away, but you have to pay for it, like a ransom. So you pay for a triple shot and it still tastes like milk with a hint of coffee. This policy is standard in all their franchises, as far as my experience goes

Modern, bright and recently refurbished premises.  I hadn't seen self service ordering machines in a Costa before and hope they don't replace the friendly baristas as one of the attractions of coming to Costa is to order from a human being.  However maybe in this outlet they are justified for a clientele of office workers ordering take outs.

Both times I have been to this costa one lady in particular has been rude, not only to me but one of the members of staff! My friend asked for a straw and she was rude about giving one to her even tho she bought the drink. When ordering for myself, I saw there was one item of the food that I wanted left so I ordered it, I ended up waiting for ten minuets  and finally spoke to the lady who clearly didn’t want anything to do with me - she had given the last item of food that I wanted to another customer who came in after me. When bringing this up she was rude about it once again! This has nothing to do with the wonderful lady who was nice and doing everything professionally I think her name was Claudia (colourful hair).

I just want to start by giving a massive shout out to Claudia, she was lovely lady with coloured hair. I do not envy what she puts up with! The staff next to her was yelling at her causing a horrible atmosphere for us customers. I then proceeded to ask for a straw and this rude staff member told me no I have to sip the cup I then politely asked again for a straw which she rolled her eyes to and practically threw the straw at me across the counter getting dirt all over the straw. Overall this deserves a one star just as Claudia was amazing wonderful lady

Lovely team who are always super warm, remember your orders, and always make your morning as they bring their service with a smile and are super attentive! Also the refurbishment means it’s got plenty of space and seating inside which is rare in most Coffee shops in the city - Best Costa in the City without a doubt!

The ladies are not only super friendly but also bring such a warm, welcoming energy to every interaction. Their hard work, kindness, and attention to detail really shine through. They’re doing an absolutely amazing job.

I visited this café today to grab a coffee, but , my experience wasn’t great. When I went to order, the staff were busy laughing and chatting with each other instead of paying attention to customers. I eventually got my coffee, but it tasted really bad — I couldn’t even finish it. Overall, pretty disappointing visit. I hope the staff can focus more on service and quality in the future.

My fav coffee in London 🥰 have it in or take away for a nice walk around city centre. Cappuccino and Caramel Latte are a must! Order a Gingerbread with cream on top on Christmas period 🤤🔝
Their loyalty card is great! Offers, discounts and free drinks 🔝👏🏻🥳
The girls at Costa City Thameslink always make my morning with their cheerful service (and make those morning work scaries a bit less scary!). Shoutout to Vasiliki who always remembers my order 🥰

Let me share a little bit about what happened to me today and how this particular branch is incredibly nice , providing outstanding service. I was drinking my frappe at the high table, and somehow managed to break my cup ! My beverage was litterally spread everywhere : from the table to my dress to my coat to my hands  and of course onto the floor! So embarrassing to be that clumsy. The staff though was incredible they told me not to worry and they immeditely cleaned everything up for me . They even helped me clean myself up! I can’t imagine any other brand going above and beyond to help the customer this way. They Kept saying don’t worry. I am incredibly thankful for the kindness and help trying to clean everything up, including myself! I love these guys ❤️❤️

The shop is so small that all 4 of us could barely fit in. The woman behind the till was stressful and didn't seem to understand the order and I ended up without my cinemon bun. Other than that the food and drink are obviously what you expect for costa

Moorfields Costa Coffee ( In the hospital )

Exceptional Customer Service given by two members of staff. Upbeat, cheerful, clear communication, approachable. Every customer who came in left with a smile on their face. This is rare to see with services across industries generally. Please extend my thanks and appreciation to the team working there today ( 03/12/25).

This is a convenience coffee chain catering mainly for hospital staff & patients. Selection of coffees & snacks were not bad considering this was a small venue. I had their Autumn special with pumpkin syrup & an almond slice. Coffee was a touch on the sweet side for me & the cake was less than amazing. But staff was efficient & helpful, true to the tradition of Moorfields.

We came on the 17th November and we were charged twice. I understand that this does happen which is fine I brought it up with the staff and they printed a receipt and assured me that as the transaction was pending it would be returned. It wasn’t both transactions were settled so I disputed it.

It’s two £10.10 transactions within a minute of each other. I have now had a notification that the merchant has disputed my claim. The fact I alerted staff at the time and followed what I should do and they still dispute it has led me to put this bad review up. It’s not even the first problem we’ve had with this particular store as my other half has put a complaint in before about rude treatment.

Overall we will never use this Costa again when visiting Moorfields.

Tired, nervous and irritable before an appnt at the eye clinic I treated myself to a coffee. I am now relaxed and in a better mood thanks to the fabulous ladies behind the counter, fast efficient super friendly and obviously loved by the regulars and hospital staff. An oasis of calm, I can face the coming issues now. Thank you

Inside Moorfields, great coffee, lovely nice staff, seating areas, drinks brunch and desserts.
Staff are really helpful and kind.

Mr Responder I think is mor important to make the change then investigate it
This was today’s experience
Still no improvement

It’s a cozy and clean spot with friendly staff.
I recently got a TooGoodToGo bag from there, and the staff were especially welcoming and helpful. It's a great place to relax with a coffee!
went here today around 1 pm - peak lunch time rush hour - Karla was all alone - managing the till, warming food and making drinks for customers - and still had a smile on her face - just amazing :-)
It not only has the best coffee but also the best MAC&CHEESE. Also, for all the Jain or Vegetarian students studying in London, this mac&cheese is a must try. It’s filling and delicious!
Ordered a maple latte with whole milk, came with a skimmed milk latte. She confirmed it’s whole milk but it actually not! Not sure why the staff is so incompetent!

Flat white perfection! The Costa Coffee at Cannon Street never disappoints. The brew was rich and creamy, exactly what I needed to kickstart my day. A big shoutout to Md Anowar Hossain for his exceptional service — friendly, efficient, and truly attentive. Highly recommend this spot for your caffeine fix!

🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
Absolutely Refreshing!
The mint tea was perfectly brewed—refreshing, aromatic, and soothing to the senses. A true comfort drink! Special thanks to Md Anowar Hossain for the warm and professional service. His attention to detail and kind attitude made the experience even better. Highly recommended!
This video is from today.. How can you serve food with flies on? I just left the store without buying anything. Disgusting...
Really enjoyed the Christmas Spice muffin (especially with £1 off!) and a usual excellent skinny latte for free.

I am a regular customer of Costa. I have visited several shops, but for me, this particular Costa is the best because of their excellent service and the friendly behavior of the staff. I ordered a coffee and some snacks and received instant service with a warm gesture. The staff were very friendly and helpful. I truly appreciate their prompt service. The environment was attractive. As a customer, I would rate this shop 10/10. I can’t wait to visit again soon.

At the Tower of London. Enter at the back and sit on the outside patio. Nice place to rest. Not too fancy not too old. Modern setting inside. Coffee is good and hot . Nice place rest with a great view of the Tower of London. Lots of space for group is that is how your traveling. Snacks to be had. As for London, things are not cheap.

Amazing service!!!! Friendly staff! Clean bathroom! The man working the till was so polite and friendly will definitely be coming back! he made a very tasty hot chocolate too! Lastly the view of the Tower of London is amazing!

I brought a friend here on a walking tour of the City of London, mainly as a spot to rest before we continued our walk. The staff working on 25/1 around 1 pm were just delightful! Cakes and tea were good, but honestly the staff made it a 5 star spot.

Could be one of the best Costa cafes in London.

The windows seat view of Tower of London is smashing. I'd bring tourists here next time if we needed a place to sit.

Take the entrance from the main road, not the south side if you want to avoid the steps.

It's right by Tower of London, which was when I first visited London, one of my favourite paid attractions.

Cafes can get pretty busy and some you don't feel like you can stay. This one seemed pretty laid back. I've found when I do go to  Costa, staff are generally pretty chilled.

I popped in on a Wednesday evening and it was quiet. I only stayed for about 5 minutes. It was one of those gorgeous blue sky everyone is out enjoying the sunshine moments. There was so much happy positive vibes everywhere and I was so happy to be strolling the London streets soaking it all in.

What I like about Costa is that being a member- it's free, just download the app - you get free cake which you can pick up any time in the week after your birthday.

I love anywhere that treats you for your birthday. More places should be offering these kinds of freebies. It buys a serious amount of goodwill and I am happy to go to a Costa because I think about how lovely it is they give me something like this.

They have a strawberry and lemon cake which I got to take away. It's kind of like a Victoria Sponge.

The counter staff were friendly and so lovely, even though it was the end of probably a very long day.

27th of December at 15:09.2025
Complaint Regarding Manager’s Attitude – Costa Coffee Tower Vaults
Dear Costa Customer Service Team,
I am writing to raise a complaint about my recent experience at the Costa Coffee branch at London Tower Vaults.
I have been a loyal Costa customer for over 15 years, Unfortunately, during my recent visit, I was very disappointed by the rude and unprofessional attitude of the manager. The way I was spoken to was unpleasant and did not reflect the high standards of customer service I have always associated with Costa Coffee.
As a regular customer, this experience was upsetting, and I believe it should be addressed to ensure better service for customers in the future.
I hope to continue enjoying Costa Coffee as I have done for many years.
Kind regards,
Sami Thaci

I stopped by Costa Coffee on Tooley Street and was impressed by the wide selection of sandwiches – the Brie, Bacon & Cranberry Panini was especially delicious. The staff were friendly, and the café itself felt clean and welcoming. A little tip: grab a seat by the window for a lovely view of The Shard. A perfect spot for coffee or a quick bite.

Good coffee shop wih loads of seating inside only. They have welcoming decor. Staff are friendly and efficient. They have sandwiches, treats and savoury snacks. The shop is located down the road from London bridge station. They have toilets, baby chairs and loads of window seating. Hot chocolate is very good.

Popped into Costa absolutely exhausted after a long London tour, and it turned out to be the perfect pick me up! Store manager Jude was super nice his warm service and spot-on coffee recommendations made our visit extra special. The coffee was superb, and we left feeling refreshed and totally satisfied. Thanks, Jude!

I walk past the Costa on Tooley Street almost every day and the outside seating is almost always a mess. There are only three tables, yet they’re often left covered in empty cups and sandwich wrappers long after customers have gone. The wind often blows the litter onto the pavement, making the area look dirty. It reflects poorly on the brand and suggests either a lack of training or just no care. It really shouldn’t be that hard to keep three tables clean.

I just want to say how good the team are here. Good place to sit and work. Lots of charging points. I really appreciate how nice the team are - always the first people to say good morning to me each day..

Our first visit to Costa Coffee was this location down the street from our hotel early on a Friday morning before flying back home. My husband and I had cappuccinos and croissants.  They were delicious. The coffee was stronger here than other coffee places we tried in London. It was quiet, they had just opened and the sun was coming up. We look forward to enjoying Costa coffee on our next trip. Thank you ☕️
My server Nusrat was very caring, paid attention to my requests and a lovely Coffee art!

I ordered my usual. Extra hot, no foam.
Couldn't taste the coffee at all!
The service (in terms of being polite) was good, though slow. It wasn't busy.
Atmosphere seemed a little chaotic.

A cafe with large selection of coffee and pastries. They have a delicious lotus cheesecake that is a must. It’s located on a Main Street closer to many train stations. The staff were not as friendly and that is why I gave them 3 stars.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Always a great experience at this Costa! The atmosphere is warm and welcoming, and the staff are consistently cheerful and friendly. Special shoutout to Maria—she’s fantastic! Always smiling, super helpful, and goes the extra mile to make customers feel appreciated. You can tell the whole team enjoys working here, and it shows in the positive vibes. Highly recommend

My young daughter absolutely adores their blueberry muffins and babyccino - it’s become a little tradition for us. The staff, especially Asif, are always warm and friendly, which makes the experience even better.

The location is great with plenty of seating, perfect for a relaxed coffee break. Highly recommend for families and anyone looking for a cozy spot in the market.

Gobinda is honestly one of the friendliest people at Costa. He always greets you with a smile and takes the time to chat, which makes such a difference. His coffee is consistently the best — always made just right and never rushed. You can tell he really cares about what he does and about the customers. He’s a big reason I keep coming back.

The staff took long to get 3 drinks to my friends and I, and still they had gotten the drinks wrong. Furthermore, they had also forgotten the orders (had to ask several times) and mixed them up. The drinks (pink lemonade + dragonfruit and guava refresher) tasted like chemicals and dishwashing soap.

Hygiene also appears to be an issue considering how the same staff member is wearing the same pair of gloves going between the toilets and the kitchen. I do not recommend this Costa at all. Do not waste your money and time.

the food/drink quality is typically average for a costa (chains tend to be the same across the board), but the staff are so rude. i was waiting to order at the till and the barista was making drinks for the people ahead of me, but for some reason turned to me and snapped with "can you just wait, im busy making other drinks."
i hadn't said a thing, hadn't even made a noise to warrant such a stray remark. all i did was stand there looking up at the menu. ive worked in hospitality for years so i understand feeling stressed or dealing with rude customers, but i hadn't even opened my mouth.
i was also buying food that could be heated up, and when she asked if i wanted it hot, i answered yes and she very visibly rolled her eyes and made a rude noise. why bother offering if you don't want to give the service?

it's a shame the employees are so rude because two of the other costas in the area that have seating have shut down, so its forcing people to go here where they're very obviously not welcome

it was early evening time. i come and order latte coffee, Girl in the till she is very busy with someone video call, she make coffee for me fully cold.i don't know what they doing another staf also busy with phone. i sit nearly 1 hour girl still toking with video call . management need to be look at this.
The guy woking here today is quick,effective and friendly. Excellent customer service.

Always a winner in my books. The atmosphere is inviting and I always enjoy a coffee here when in the area.  The staff are friendly and service always comes with a smile. The coffee is fabulous and the desserts yummy. Perfect place to hide from the cold and warm up!

One of the best Costa Coffee stores.

Atmosphere: awesome

Customer services : excellent. Staffs are very friendly, helpful and approachable.

You would definitely enjoy sipping your coffee here  while charging your phone or laptop as this place has many sockets around the tables. Also there is wireless charging place while you wait for the coffee to be served .  😍

Amazing staff! They went above and beyond to make my son’s day by finding his absolute favourite, a tomato and cheese toastie. Such a thoughtful and kind gesture that meant so much to him. Thank you for the wonderful service and for making us feel so welcome.
Everything was excellent. Zygi’s service and efficiency were outstanding. The quality of the food and drinks is great. The atmosphere is pleasant and the music is enjoyable. Highly recommended

I visited this Costa branch recently for a coffee and some cake before visiting a local theatre.

I had to wait a few minutes for staff to appear, but I wasn’t in a rush and the staff member was very apologetic about the delay.

Service was quick and my coffee and cake were fabulous.

There’s not a lot of seating inside, but there are additional seats outside within the Galleria.

I will definitely be visiting again.

One of the best located Costa shops. You have a view of the mini shop in Hays Galleria as there is plenty of seating inside and outside. Loads of snacks, sandwiches, treats and drinks to choose from. Staff are friendly. I got my usual soya hot chocolate which was delicious! The shop has a relaxing vibe and it does not get as busy as London bridge station Costa. The shop is a few minutes walk from London bridge station.

Located in Hays Galleria,refurbished recently and good coffee.
On the improvement side,the spot lights like a dazzling truck headlights not helping to enjoy a cosy atmosphere.
All in all yes,big improvements happened and I recommend it for a coffee ☕️

It was my first time at Costa Coffee London Bridge, and I’m so happy with the service from Aashriti! She is very kind, polite, and she serve with a warm smile and positive energy. Her dedication and friendly attitude made my visit really enjoyable. Thankyou so much

I was eating at this Costa yesterday, I had with me a small paper shopping bag that had started to disintegrate from the rain. When I approached the counter to request a paper bag, I was told by the man behind the counter (I assume he was the manager) that I’d have to buy something. I informed him I’d purchased  and was currently having 2 hot drinks, 2 cold drinks, 2 cakes, and a panini with my partner at a table.

This man again refused, saying and I quote: “they are for takeout only, I have to reorder bags if I use too many”. I explained the situation (I believe I was polite and friendly during our entire interaction) about my shopping bag, and his response again was “no I can’t do it, you’ll have to buy another item”.
If he had run out/was running low I could understand, but I was in a bind, and he had bags to use, but was just holding me hostage over giving me one for some strange reason.

When I told him we were full from the panini, cakes, and FOUR drinks, and would just like ONE SINGLE paper bag to go, he shook his head and carried on with something else.

I don’t believe I was rude or demanding in any way, I tried to be cordial and explain my situation, but this manager showed a selfish, rude, and frankly pathetic behaviour. What a way to show the Costa Christmas spirit, an absolute miserly Scrooge of a man.

During my recent visit to the Costa Coffee branch near Mile End, I had a great experience. The staff were friendly and welcoming. I ordered a blueberry muffin and a drink on the app, and was impressed by how quickly the drink was made.

There is a good number of seats here and the store was tidy.

Great Costa run by great people!!! One of the few nice spots in Mile End where it is possible to both enjoy some drink and food with friends, as well as to get some work done with a laptop. Highly recommended!

Lou has been fantastic and has given us great service!
She’s been amazing and always happy in the morning!

Having a coffee shop on my way to university was such a bonus especially for 9am classes. I was able to order from my phone with the app and it was ready to collect from the shop. Loved that app service! The only reason I give it 4 is because of the cleanliness of the bathroom and the delay in queues due to slow customer service but other than that it's a nice warm place to sit and relax.
The service is excellent and manager is very friendly . I loved the top floor seating area which is very clean spacious .
The best service anywhere. The girls here are amazing. Today I received my coffee with a lovely message written on the lid.
This branch of Costa is my favourite. It is made my favourite because of the lovely team.
Good for a quick pit stop when wandering around the city. Friendly staff and good service. Nice cappuccino and toastie kept me going. Toilet is clean too.
Attention to detail , comfy seating and great customer service. Staff are always courteous and patient- not an easy task when you are in one of the most busy locations in London.

I had to leave a review as I'm changing jobs and won't be in this part of London again. I walk past 3 other Costa Coffees and a little out my way to come here in the morning. The team here are amazing, you can tell they have a regular clientele, and they care about what they do and the people they serve. I'll miss my visits here (PS I'm only in London at most once a week so I'm not a regular and I doubt they remember me, but I feel like they do)

Went around 10.30 am. Good coffee as it is Costa. Service was slow. Counter girl was busier to chat and lough with friend/colleague in her own work, probably Italian. Waited minimum 15 minutes for a cappuccino though another lady was served coffee before me. Restaurant was little bit messy but it’s ok. Decoration is nice and attractive. You can seat even outside where few chairs and table are available. Nice place to have some food and enjoy. Good location.

Great, quiet Costa, always has plenty of room to sit down. Just around the corner from the Royal London Hospital, if you are ever there and makes a nice break from it. Staff are friendly, it's disabled access with 2 toilets, one of which is accessible. My only criticism would be that it's not always the tidiest.

Probably my favourite Costa Coffee ever!

Good selection of sandwiches, panninis, toasties and cakes. Perfect seating layout.

Staff are very welcoming and friendly. Great five star service every time I visit.

This is a small cosy Costa, tends to get busy unless you're there early morning. Staff are nice and the coffee is great. There is no Wi-Fi, not enough sockets and they've started serving coffee in take away cups which ruins the experience of sitting in to drink your coffee!!!
Does what it says on the tin. Nice coffee and friendly staff. 4 stars given only because the food seems to run out sometimes. I'm a frequent Costa flyer due to location and am happy to recommend.

we ordered 2 warm hot chocolates for the kids but they ended up only charging us for 1 and made it really hot. The service is really bad because they don't listen to what you say and they dont repeat the order. The staff need to be trained harder. The staff that was on duty was Jumel.

upstairs seating very cramped, had token xmas decorations in shop but looked just thrown together as if they were not wanted.
asked for black coffee but asked if I wanted milk in it. coffee good though.
Quite friendly and clean downstairs area. Upstairs space a bit cramped. Could do with some more sockets for phone charge. Okay otherwise.

This is the worst place ever I have seen!!!!!

I had a terrible experience at Costa Coffee today!!!!! We ordered a sandwiches and hot drinks. After done then my husband takes my son to the toilet for his pee.

The blonde girls is dressed up like sexy short dress who are nothing to pay for the food or drink to receive the receipt code for the door and asked for the toilet but the manger was knocked the door for many time and ask my husband and my son to come out of the bathroom door but my husband cannot hear the door because he is deaf.
