Nicely located branch but noisy area due to metro works. Needed a pick me up so l got myself my fave hot caffeine fix, a lovely latte with brown sugar yummy. Plenty of seating and nice staff. Big selection of food and drink. Wholeheartedly recommend this place.

The primark greggs' Food and hygiene is great. Sharif named staff is very rude and arrogant. He didn't let us sit down in the area even when we had already paid to sit and eat in the dining area. The other staff has never been behaving in a rude manner the way sharif has been. The company says zero tolerance policy but Mr. Sharif doesn't seem to follow the company policy.

First thing in the morning 🌄 & wanting some hot bake food, it's cold ❄️ 🥶 like it's been left out over night. Service fast, but lots of tramp and beggars outside sleeping or begging for food. Avoid, better go into the Greggs in Primark

I just want to sat a huge thank you yo shift manager Carl and Ressan who served me today at Greggs. I had been having a really bad day and just popped in for a quick snack, but they way they treated me completely turned things around. They were so welcoming, and genuine kind. They made me feel comfortable and even forget about the bad day I had. Thank you both

Went to this Gregg's in the morning as missed my breakfast 🍳
Ordered chicken bake & steak bake like 9AM & a hot drink. Both bake were cold!!!! U want me to pay over £2 for a cold bake that was suppose to be kept at least warm??? Trading standards needs to investigate them for serving food that's probably from yesterday if it's that cold in the morning. I know times are hard with the electric💡 but as a company that's making so much profit, the Franchise owner needs to stop be so tight on the electric bill.

It's been cash only for almost a week now. Sometimes there's a sign on the door letting you know, but what annoyed me today was there was just one sign by the till. Wasted my time going in and picking things up only to find out that I could only pay by cash.

This restaurant is operated very well. It can get very busy over lunch due to the numerous colleges and the uni nearby but the team always work quickly to get the queue down. Always well stocked here too

One of the worst Greggs . One second it’s card payments then for two weeks it’s cash only it’s 2026 no one carries cash !! As a shop you should fix your card payments quickly not have the shop be cash only for weeks !!!

There was a bearded guy who kept me waiting far longer. He kept handing orders to people who arrived after me. When I finally asked about my order, he snapped back aggressively and even mocked my accent. Completely unacceptable behaviour.

Great service. I was staying in the Premier Inn hotel and this was my go to place for breakfast in the morning and they didn't disappoint me. Great staff. Defo will come again when in Birmingham again x

Greggs are generally perfect all round. All the stores are good.

This particular store was very clean, they have good variety of food and drinks.

Prices are not bad and they are always fresh.

Still don't know why they charge you for eating inside though. If anything; should be slightly cheaper for eating in.

There isn't really anything bad you could say about Greggs. A good selection of food to grab at breakfast or keep you going at lunch. Service is good and staff are friendly. Reasonable price. And, if you eat here often I'd recommend the Greggs app - great offers and rewards.
Worst Greggs in the country. Never has cheese & onion and stopped selling croissants
Why everyone not sugar grgges l not happy with service
Service with a smile from the young Muslim woman. Breakfast on point. ThanQ for wishing me a nice day it counts alot :)

So disappointing ! I asked for a pizza at 10am and was rejected fully knowing I can request it if I wait, and other shops do this also. Then I asked for hot water and the girl behind the counter with a scarf had to go ask her manager if she can give me hot water. And the manager said no!! Greggs is a joke ! Especially this one !! Never again
Received used mayo dip. The issue is not some £0.50p dip it’s the lack of standard and paying attention to what they are selling. How can you be sure nothing else hasn’t been tempered with?

The WORST GREGGS I have EVER Experienced!

How can a Greggs store get it so wrong? You are known for your steak bakes and sausage rolls, and yet you couldn't even get that right!

The service was so slow it would have made a sloth look like a speed demon. There seemed to be at least 4 members of staff 'working', with the contents of the displays looking like every time had been dropped on the floor and then kicked around NEW Street Station before being out on display.

My Steak Bake was served to me with all the gravy that is usually inside the pastry delight covering the paper pamphlet of sadness. Now I can excuse a messy food bag, it is fast food after all... though it was lacking one vital ingredient, the actual steak and gravy on the INSIDE of the steak bake!

Ahether this is a stag training issue... Management... Or Greggs literally have grown so big that they are no longer concerned with customer service and enjoyment, I don't know.

MY ADVICE... There's a WHSmiths next door , grab yourself a meal deal that you will definitely enjoy from there. Or give some money to a homeless person outside in exchange for some old newspaper and eat that, it'll have more taste and filling than you'll find in this store!

Absolutely shocked and appealed! (I usually save my time to write positive reviews, I couldn't let this go however)
Steak bake was cold and I got over charged by £2 by a ignorant worker if you can't handle working in a busy place then find another job! £10:50 for a meal deal and steak bake is a mug off !
Queuing out the door empty fridges and no staff the food is the same at every Greggs, reviews are for customer service ? This store has none

Yaz deserves a pay rise and promotion. Spoke about this before with friends and collegues, he has by far the best customer service out of any fast-food I've been too. Always a smile on his face, quick efficient and very friendly.

Greggs inside Primark Birmingham is an absolute gem! After a busy morning of shopping, there’s nothing better than grabbing a delicious bite right there in-store. The location is perfect, and the setup is clean and well-organised.

The food? As amazing as ever! Freshly baked vegan rolls, warm pastries, and their signature coffee hit the spot. The staff were incredibly friendly and efficient, even during the lunch rush. It’s such a convenient and brilliant idea to have Greggs in Primark a match made in heaven!

Highly recommend stopping by whether you’re shopping or just in the area. It’s the perfect place to recharge. 10/10 experience!
Very busy Greggs with a very long queue a lot of the time, but the staff are friendly and very very efficient and the queue moves so fast. Really strong team who obviously work very hard every day

The service Yaz provided today was impeccable! I would not expect this type of service from someone from Greggs. It was almost like I was at 5 star restaurant! He is a valuable member of the team there! Thank you.
My favourite Greggs in Birmingham central.  Fast, friendly and efficient service.  Like your sausage rolls

I went in and bought a steak bake along with two sausage rolls, and after paying and being handed my food, I realised they were ICE cold.

I gave the sausage rolls straight back and told the staff to throw them in the bin, because that’s literally the only place they belonged. They were not worth even a penny, and I wouldn’t feed them to anyone in that state. The least Greggs could do is have the decency to tell customers when the food is cold before taking money off them. A lot of people, myself included, would not have spent a single penny if we knew we were paying for something that’s basically inedible.

It’s unacceptable and feels like a waste of both money and time. Greggs has a reputation for its sausage rolls, but if you can’t even guarantee they’re warm, you’re letting your customers down.
Typical.greggs but this one had a few more staff working which ment we all got served with in ten minutes. Fast service ,clean premises and polite staff.  Thankyou.
Nice wee Greggs if you are in the area. Great bacon rolls. The servers were polite, prompt and well presented. It's squeezed into a mini trade park, so parking can get busy, but at least it's free.
Fantastic staff hilarious it’s worth coming just for the smiles … best way to start the day … ) Food is just as good
Regular place to go with the best pizza and fresh options to choose from. Very good location close to nearby parking and footy ground.

I ordered pepperoni pizza from here yesterday around 3:30pm and this is what I received. It was very burnt and not looking fresh as well so I ended up throwing it away .This is not fair at all . Is there a way I could get refunded

it's a Greggs like any other. I enjoyed it, everything's been alright, has great selection and product line albeit the quality is just alright lol. Wouldn't recommend their coffee but the pastries and meal deals have been fun

This was my go to greggs but never again! When I finish work I’ll go into greggs at around 7:30. The workers are always more concerned about closing the shop quickly. They refuse to bake anything fresh and the excuse is that they are closing. The closing time is 9PM!! Not 7:30!! Someone higher up needs to check this shop! Also the staff members are very rude- especially the white, big manager.

I absolutely love the vegetable pizzas (nom nom!), and for a long time I was told by staff that they’re served after 16:00 — which has always been true in my experience. But recently the consistency just isn’t there at all.

On my last visit, I stood at the counter to order and the lady told me “we serve them at 16:00.” I had to remind her it was actually 17:30. She apologised and made them, but I ended up waiting quite a while - in. the. cold.

Today I went specifically for the veggie pizzas and was told, “we’re not doing them today.” No explanation. They also seem to start cleaning up quite early and don’t really bother serving customers who are clearly waiting.

It’s such a shame because I really just want my veggie pizzas — please be consistent!

I have been staying at the student accommodation for summer as a temporary accommodation due to my son being in the children’s hospital in Birmingham. I have visited on multiple occasions and I cannot fault any of the staff. They are all very attentive, always happy to help. The manager on one occasion made my little boys day by surprising him with a novelty bun after he dropped his. On other occasions where it has been busy with a lunch rush the staff worked hard to serve and minimise the queue and when serving their customer service has been excellent 👌

Generally never had any issues with this store.

Nice seating, staff are quick to serve and food is made fresh.

Understandably the food finishes quickly due to high demand but they're always restocking.

Loving the new red peppers, feta and spinach flavour.
Third time I have visited the store in the morning,and the hot breakfast counter is not working. No other breakfast options available. Lack of communication from staff aswell, really poor.

Bacon was absolutely cremated - they make it and hope you will drive away and not be bothered to return. I went back in and straight away the lady says we are already cooking more fresh - so why not say in the beginning instead of giving me rubbish. I love Greggs but this is not the first time it’s happened. Bin the rubbish and stop trying to sly it onto customers.
Saj at greggs provided excellent customer service! He was friendly, helpful, and made the experience really pleasant. Thank you, Saj!
Clean shop with great food. Better then the other Greggs I have tried so 5 stars from me :)

Yesterday morning came to this greggs inside primark to have my breakfast and i asked for a straw from a indian guy who works there. And he refused me to give the straw. As a regular customer this is the first time i had experience like this. He said me , “you should buy something before asking a straw” . So before buying something ,can’t i ask for a straw? Is this the way you are treating your regular customer greggs? I am also working in customer service for more than 3 yrs and i never do like this to customers. Very bad customer service from that guy (who has beard and skinny guy). Because  i was disappointed, I went outside greggs and had my breakfast from them. Luckily that store gave me a straw before i order. How people forget their humanity over a straw. Disgusting 🤢plz teach him how to do good customer service. I will never come to this store to eat again.
Amazing customer service by Faraaz
smiling team, fantastic free coffee in the canteen, clean toilet , acceptable waiting time for the drop load
Bought a pizza slice and it was frozen cold,  I gave it to the pigeons
Nice friendly staff, quick to tip
Lift work in process so if u have goods make urs arrangments before goi g there. 3 weeks will take to make it operational
Love the food. Missed the custard cake

Wanted something light to keep me going. Greggs to the rescue but mainly due to time constraints. The branch is small but has lots to choose from. It was staffed accordingly and situated in a location that isn't that visible but l have been going here for the past 20 years. I was served by Murad who was attentive and helpful. Lucky for me the margarita pizza was fairly fresh so l grabbed it with both hands and a Latte to boot. Good offer with margarita pizza and latte for £3.35. Suits me to the ground. Pizza was nice and asked Murad if l could have the latte after l had eaten the pizza. He agreed to my request and l went back to the branch after 10 minutes.  He started preparing the latte as soon as he saw me. Everything was nice so no complaints from me. Overall l would recommend this branch to patrons of Greggs.
Always a pleasant experience thanks to Michael, he knows how to put a smile on every customers face, so polite and friendly.

My mate Greg (6ft 10”, plays for Cheshire Phoenix Basketball team) couldn’t believe his luck when he spotted this rather posh Greggs -
He was after his usual Tandoori Chicken Baguette which appeared out of stock, but the kind lady assistant procured one for him from behind the counter just as he was about to leave in a huff. Slam dunk!

Found a dead fly in the baguette! Disgusting.
Also “seating area are not to be used” doesn’t make sense as to why they have chairs then?
Make it make sense pls.

Very poor customer service. Will not be returning.
There was a black lady who was very rude to me behind the till. She wouldn’t serve me and told me to go back into the queue & called up another customer instead.

Pizza was also burnt. Honestly felt unwelcomed. I would not suggest this Greggs to anyone! My advice is to save your money and go elsewhere

Aleena has excellent customer service not just with myself but everyone who she served. It makes the difference between having a great day or just an ordinary day. She really wowed me with her smile and skills and that takes a lot to do, she is a natural. Thank you.

I come here regularly but when I'm served by an older white woman short hair. She is extremely rude. Numerous times I show her my student I.d and she doesnt understand. Today she was extremely rude too I wish I called the manager if I had the time but I will deffo report her to Head office after this. Learn some manners especially when I'm polite to your staff. Next time I will ask to be served by someone else cant be bothered to deal with her!

the closing time is 20:00 but they stopped baking by 18:30 , shelves were empty and the margarita they served was stone cold . they started their cleaning & closing while customers were eating. highly disgusting 🤮 behaviour.

We visited for a quick bite on a Thursday afternoon. There was a large queue as it was around lunchtime, but service was efficient.

I ate a vegan sausage roll, which was fresh out of the oven. My dad ate a steak bake and my niece had a sausage, bean, and cheese bake. They were reasonably priced and tasty.
Sadly, the cafe itself was a complete mess with plates, cups, and litter everywhere. I hope they can improve the hygiene standards.
Disappointed with this Greggs. Saw staff cleaning poorly - tables still had stains, floors and under-tables littered. Sitting here really puts you off eating.
First time using this greggs , young man serving was top notch (let him know) , sos and omelette roll perfect also our two coffees was lovely

On my last two visits I was not impressed. Today was a different story. Everything I wanted was there and my pasty was just the right temperature.  Quick friendly service and I was in and out in no time.

Honestly can’t fault these guys at all. These guys are so much better than the other branches. Always well cooked and always clean. The service is also top notch. Brilliant staff like mehak, khirrel, jam and others who I don’t know there names now, never fail to impress me.
Pls bring back the feta cheese, red peppers & spinach pasty bake. It was the best bake you’ve had in the veg section. Don’t understand why you have discontinued it. Lots of people are complaining

Really warm and welcoming the woman in there today 4/1/26 lovely and smiley and friendly conversation 😊
And the sausage rolls was hot lol 😆

Staff are rude
Never have anything in stock
Place is a joke

Shit service at this Greg's
Stood 10 minutes in queue just to find out their cheese and onion pastry is not available in the middle of the day. Up the game if u want my business
31_07 _25 purchased two sausage rolls.  Sausage rolls were undercooked. But the two young girls who were serving did not check. This is Poor service. It could cause food poisoning.
Why pizza everything taste nasty not as other greggs and lady so moody not going back
Lovely  staff. Always   friendly and polite

A hidden gem on Washwood Heath Road! The Greggs Outlet is perfect for grabbing tasty treats at great value prices. The staff are friendly and efficient, and the shop is well-organised and clean. You can often find fresh sandwiches, pastries, and cakes at a fraction of the usual price, which is brilliant for families or anyone on a budget.

I always leave with a smile  great service and great bargains. Highly recommended if you’re in the area!

The place is a surplus disposal shop for Greggs. The range of goods is limited. I normally pop in for yum yum and cheese and onion pies. Must things worth having go early. Given the type of shop it is, I have given it a 5 for incredible prices and friendly service. The prices are a little more than what they used to be in the past but still great value. Give it a go before 11am.

This branch of Greggs has been on the Washwood Heath Road for many years. I have visited it numerous times with my family and have always found great bargains and deals.

This time around, I visited with my son a few days ago. We were served by a trainee employee who was extremely polite and very helpful. I would like to thank this trainee employee for her lovely manners towards my son and I.

We found some great bargains in the shop and came back with a bag full of treats. What would have cost us around £10 in a normal Greggs, cost us £3.50 at this outlet. I will definitely be visiting again.

Bought yummy vegan sausage rolls, and and a box of donuts I turned into Nigella's caramel croissant pudding with much success. Staff so friendly and smiley I feared for their facial muscles but it was all good.
Great service l!! Will always cater to your needs as best as they can 😊

Just come to grab a veg pastie early morning. Noticed staff was dealing with bacon without her gloves or anything on. This staff member then was serving customers without washing her hands after dealing with meat. I was a regular here until I saw this today. I just walked out.
Nice gregs with loads of parking right outside. Usual greggs offerings and service was quick.

Best customer service for Greggs in the area.
The guy today Thursday 28th was very helpful with a voucher that didn't work.
I would recommend this as one of the best stores in the area.
Good selection of hot food and sandwiches and drinks hot or cold. Friendly staff
No breakfast baps available at 10.30 when they serve till 11am.

The service is eye-wateringly slow!! And very frustrating as all "uber eats" deliveries get priority over customers who have actually bothered to go in. Would much rather drive up to the BP Greggs (even though its much further) as the service is always fast and friendly.
The staff members here are lovely I think one is called Kaci absolutely lovely customer service I think she deserves a raise

Please do something about the staff, always long lines to the door, the staff are always unhappy and rude, no smile, no greeting, all you can hear is "who's next". If you want to sit inside, they keep looking at you like you owe them something or you're eating on their money. The location is good and the food is good.
STAFF ARE SO SLOW! are they taking long on purpose or what?
if i could give this place 0 i would i ordered food and none of it turned up

Beautiful fresh cakes,pastries and bread daily. Sometimes can be a little pricey,but well worth it. You can eat inside for a small charge. Lovely fresh baguettes,many different types. Also sandwiches. Wedges,crisps etc. They do offer a meal deal which is definitely worth having. Wheelchair accessible. Although not an awful lot of room inside. Helpful and friendly staff.

The food here is lovely. But best if you can get the pasties, sausage rolls hot as they come out of the oven. They do have a seating area in both of the Chelmsley Wood Greggs. But the one in the actual shopping centre is only a small shop. So having a seating area means it is not very accessible for wheelchair users. Staff are very friendly and helpful though. Have a good meal deal sandwich, drink and crisps.

Disappointing place to visit.  Foods good but there is ALWAYS a queue. I won't wait for a sausage roll. Give it a miss now and use other hot food outlets. Stars got the food only. No stars for the wait!

Service is good and food nice the seating area in this one makes the shop to cramed wouldn't want to sit in as on the main walk way for people coming in and out makes the shop very small would just keep this one as a takeaway. Have the big on by Asda that has a good seating area.
Really rude staff. Called to ask a question, was lied to and she promptly hung up the phone. Would name and shame but she didn’t say it on the phone which makes me think she does this alot.

HORRIBLE was served by a young lady 20/01/25 between 8:30 am and 9am I had a order of 3 pastries which all 3 she got wrong and when I got home and checked all 3 had to go straight in the bin !!!! Waste of money never coming again I come every other day but it wasn’t just that she just seemed to talk to me like she couldn’t be asked the older ladies are so much more polite I’m sorry but customer has been lost unfortunately mostly due to attitude and the waste of money on my part there was no way for me to come back that day as my childcare had gone to work
We were served this morning (Christmas Eve) by Mandy, she was absolutely lovely! Full of Christmas Cheer. Thank you 😌
Typical Greggs, but staff are friendly and one of the ladies always puts a smile on everyone's face, Mandy I think her name is.
Service is very good and quick food was warm can get very busy at times always fresh and warm food

The best Greggs shop by far in the area.
I actually drive past 2 other Greggs to buy from this store.
The staff are very polite and nothing is too much trouble for these ladies.
Being vegan you cant always guarantee that there will be any Fake steak bakes freshly made. But give the girls enough time and the always pop me one in the oven. Their displays always look great x Thank you ladies x

Was just with my brother to get a vegan sausage roll. The lady behind counter just carried on sweeping not to acknowledge my brother until she finished. He asked for the vegan sausage roll and asked if it was hot. She said "Nah it's cold".  With a smacked backside of an expression.  Rude service. Disappointed.
Very much nice lady's go out way to help you 👍 😀 💯

I visited the Timberley Lane Gregg's at around 2:40 pm on 8th October 2024 and was served by a young woman with short brown hair. I noticed she was scratching and rubbing her face while serving. When I pointed out the hygiene issue, she dismissed my concerns, saying she wasn’t directly touching the food. However, she was handling the paper used to serve it, which is still a hygiene risk. I expected better standards, especially given the importance of food safety. Very disappointed.

Would be 5 stars if it wasn’t for a new member of staff (Karen). Worst service I’ve ever received. Not welcoming at all never says please or thank you and makes the worst coffees ever how can I order a mocha and it be water and chocolate powder disgusting. Won’t be going there again if she’s on the till she’s terrible. Crazy how such a vibrant place can turn so dull due to one member of staff.

A big shout out for manager Carol and the staff . Lovely food friendly staff.  Love this branch of Gregg's. The staff go out of her way to get me one of my favorite hot sandwich ham & cheese toasties. Nice clean shop well stocked plenty of choice of sandwiches & pastries. Great customer service definitely recommend

Food ace staff nice people who use it regular
...all lovely its so friendly good characters go there never a dull moment no complaints. Magic guy there and talented funny people..its like a fast pop in club..happy valley ..

A lovely Greggs in Chelmsley Wood, with polite locals, great service plus a nice bacon bap - it's worth a visit especially if you have the O2 priory App as you get some useful money saving offers, like a ☕ for £1.00 👍😉✔️☕‼️💯
Great prices great food and I love Greggs

Called at this store this morning at 10.30 for breakfast roll and coffee x 2. Still standing in queue at 10.55. One young lady doing her best to serve the long queue. Several people left the queue after waiting 20-25 mins including myself. By the time I would have been served breakfast session would be over.  2 additional staff behind prepping stuff for hot and cold counter. Delivery orders being prepared nothing refilled so what would be left for queuing customers when their turn before 11am.  Sales being lost through lack of staff organisation for busy time of day.

Love Gregg's no matter where you go quality is the same you know what your going to get food is always good and reasonably priced firm family favourite and always has been! Remember it been Braggs when I was younger loved the chocolate gateau they used to do but that's no longer available enjoythe range they offer something for everyone any time of the day what ever you fancy you'll find something. Staff are always pleasant and it is always clean and well stocked

Being in a busy shopping centre, there can be long queues at peak times, and they run out of stuff really quick. I don't think I've ever been in and seen everything on the shelf that should be there. The staff are friendly enough, and very quick too, which is great in such a busy environment. There's a small space available for eating in if you wish, but I've always taken away.
Excellent customer service received today by the lovely Zeenat. Zeenat was professional, friendly and welcoming. Customer service makes all the difference. Thank you Zeenat 😊
Staff very helpful towards my wheelchair dependent husband even when busy staff are helpful pleasant and polite excellent customer service

The service in Greggs in West Bromwich is exceptional! The service has been beautiful. The lady serving today 5th June has been extremely pleasant to everyone she has served,young and old! It is a pleasure to witness such positivity..
Keep up the good work and training!!!

Staff have no idea of food safety.
Watch this girl rub her face and lips then go one to pick up the baguette I just order with the same hands then rubbed eyes and carried on to make my sandwich. I hate to complain so I took the sausage and just binned it thanks.

Went in at 12 on a Friday.
No baguettes at all.
No sandwiches at all.
No salads at all.
Just wedges, a partial selection of bakes (no steak bakes, no chicken bakes, no beef pasties) and cheese pizzas (no other pizzas available).
Really poor selection. It has been like this on other visits too.
The staff member present was very friendly and polite. Can only assume the staff aren't provided with the resources they need, as the staff themselves always seem hard working.

Went there yesterday morning around 9.30am
I was served by a young lad who was still half asleep and just mumbling at me I couldn’t even hear him. I asked for a sausage and omelette baguette with a tiny bit of brown sauce and a sausage roll .
The baguette was raw and had not been baked the sausage was tough like it had been reheated and the omelette didn’t taste great either, he then covered it in brown sauce. The sausage roll was undercooked and soggy. Waste of money! While I was in there the lady took out the pan au chocolates out of oven which were burnt and then threw the pan onto another pan and knocked off 4 sausage rolls onto the floor and just walked away they don’t care about quality they just seemed like they couldn’t be arsed !

It’s 11:30am. And for the thousandth time I am unable to get a cheese salad baguette. Why when an item is constantly running out before lunch does this branch refuse to make anymore. Yet the meat option are lying there all day long. Common sense says make more of the item that sells. Clearly this Greggs has none of that common sense. Annoying, as this is the only local sandwich shop and you can’t get anything no matter when you go. Refuse to use this place anymore.

Bacon sausage "omelette" baguette with "extra" sausage..
Hardly any omelette on there and didn't get my extra sausage which I'd paid for.. to be fair to the girls it was fairly busy there. Clean inside and friendly enough service

Great food as always but did find the speed of service to be quite slow, despite there being 3 people behind the counter serving. I do feel the pace could have been quicker, as they seemed to take time on people's orders that were relatively simple.
I am on the Road Allot, Greggs is a Major Food Group of mine. This is the best one in the country.
Been there about 5 times one time my sausage rolls we're cold and sometimes the wait can be abit long even though there is only two people in the que but the staff are very nice
Best Greggs I've ever been to, never had so much pepperoni on a pizza slice. Charl and Jess were a class act too, full of banter and making every customer feel welcome. 100% would recommend.
Lovely little Greggs. Staff are always really friendly and cheery
Poxy food wont warm nothing up very poor place to eat had 2 vegan sausage rolls threw em both in bin what a complete joke of a work place ruined my breakfast they need to be allowed to warm food up

Ordered from other Greggs that have come on time and it’s been cold. But this Greggs. Our just eat order took the piss due to just eat drivers. But a woman who works at this Greggs kept our food warm and even gave us 4 donuts and some cookies. 10/10 Greggs.

Excellent service, worker Emma was the absolute sweetest! So kind hearted and she managed to encourage all our family to download the greegs app, such a kind spirit person, will 100% come back again for her.

Probably the best Greggs in the area. Think it's been around for a very long time. Staff are nicer here than in the other ones, food is as good as all others, and it always seems more well stocked than the others. Very spacious as well so it's more comfortable to eat in.

I would recommend this Greggs as the staff are friendly and helpful. I have been frequented this particular branch for over a decade and the food rarely disappoints. I normally get the margarita pizza and twin pack of yum yums. I also love the triple chocolate doughnuts 🍩. Today l had the margarita pizza and cream éclair. They have brown and white sugar which is a bonus as l love white sugar with tea and brown sugar with my coffee based beverages. This is undoubtedly one of my favourite branches. It's in a nice location and l would recommend this branch if you're in the locality. I was so hungry that l couldn't take a picture before l had a few bites, which incidentally, explains what appears to be a section of pizza. It was very tasty. Note to H.Q these members of staff are lovely as were the staff of yesteryear.
Emma was really lovely. We’d not had breakfast at Greggs before and she was really patient and helpful explaining the different options.

This place is needs immediate attention. Firstly, the old lady, (on the left) who is a manager is unfit for the job. An uber driver came in to pick up an order and was dismissed. The old lady mentioned that the order was not prepared. When asked why the order wasn't prepared the old lady said she forgot about the uber trips and she did not see the receipt that came printed out the machine. The old lady further mentioned to wait another 20 minutes for a mistake that she made. The old lady showed no sign of good customer service and must have hearing issues as the uber machine beeps when an order is placed. This place is run by lazy staff and I want to see another manager given the opportunity to run this place. It's a shame to see such potential go to waste, no one wants to be greeted with such demeanor.

This Gregg's is disgusting. The toilet area is absolutely filthy, the wc has not been cleaned in weeks by the look of it, with feaces all around the rim, water all over the floor. It actually put me off my food. Then the coffee area where you collect sugar etc was also filthy, coffee, sugar and food spilt everywhere. The manager here needs to get a good grip of this place and actually do there job. There looked like there was plenty of staff available, but obviously if the management is lapse, then so will be the work ethic of the staff. Disgusting, and I'm a tradesperson!

A nice new and clean Gregg's that's already been vandalised by the local population. What a shame. The place is well kept and very clean as it is brand new but not sure how long that will last as what Birmingham has become where nice new things get broken into. The fridge door was ripped off no fault of the staff who were all very friendly and provided great service.

First time reviewing Greggs, probably because it’s a new one in Hamstead Birmingham. I like it, clean, modern and nice seating area. Greggs is always the one place to get good value food especially if you’re in a hurry. They just need to keep the place clean and they will always be popular

Has gone completely downhill. I USED to be a loyal customer. I have noticed standards slipping around spring, the atmosphere feels very tense amongst staff and everything seems like it’s a hodgepodge of a rush. Bakes will come out almost charred and there is a weird smell as soon as you walk through the doors. The outside areas are always decently cleaned but could be more thoroughly cleaned throughout the day. Any drinks not on the standard menu are completely hit or miss either tasting okay or like slightly flavoured water. Staff, particularly the older crowd have become snappy and hostile and over all seem devastated to be serving when they are not lurking in the backgrounds. Hot food is often stale or has tell tale signs of being left out under a hot canopy for a while (dryness and bland flavours) all things that have only been happening as of late. It’s really sad as I have loved being a customer here for its whole opening journey (even when it was closed more than it was open). I wish things could change but now I am voting with my Wallet and rewards app and will be taking my free bakes and cold drinks elsewhere. Hoping when I come back in a few months from my holidays in Somerset things have changed.

I was served by Emilie today and she was wonderful. She was pleasant, helpful and just a joy to be served by. As Emilie suggested, the mint hot chocolate was delicious! It was a memorable visit, thank you.

I had a fantastic experience at Greggs on the weekend  — the service was quick, friendly, and welcoming. A special mention to one staff member who served me called Manjit  , who went above and beyond with a warm smile and great customer service. It’s always a pleasure to be served by someone so cheerful and professional. Thank you, Greggs, for having such wonderful staff!
Sausage roll was JUST about warm. I remember when they used to let you know if they'd gone a bit cold and theres more in the oven.

Outstanding service provided by Manjit I visit this Gregg's mostly on Saturday and Manjit provides a great service. She always greets me and makes me feel welcomed. She always provides me table service, so I'm not standing around and waiting.

I’ve never tasted such disgusting porridge. The member of staff asked if I wanted it making. I mean, I don’t have a saucepan or kettle in my car! It was thick, lumpy and it hadn’t even been stirred. I ended up throwing it way.
Nice addition as close to work , staff very friendly, only blip i have yet to have a click and collect order ready when I arrive and I thought that was the point to avoid waiting ?
Visited a few days ago- service wasn’t as great unfortunately, staff member may have had a bad day but it’s a lovely addition to the area, inside is nice and clean too!
Went there it was closing after 5.10pm doors was locked and female staff was there with glasses and it supposed to close at 6
Best located Greggs ever!

Staff are very friendly and welcoming. For a small cafe it gets quite busy. I think the food at Greggs is fairly cheap tasting, but the service and price is excellent. Coffee has always been great there.
I’d give 6 stars if I could, they cured my flu!! 5 mins after eating a sausage roll I was able to smell & taste food!!! Incredible!!!

I love Greggs’. Everything is fresh and so tasty. Pies are nice and hot. Cold sandwiches, pitza slices and baguettes are so tasty and come in different varieties. Loads of variety of doughnuts and cakes. Variety of cold drinks too
Greggs could do.much better trade with better cakes, donuts are boring and there is only so many chicolate éclairs you can eat.

Had a vegetarian southern fried style baguette.
Not to keen on the dressing as a little too sweet for me. This would be great with mayo if there was an option.

I was in the area and we needed some food 😩 😋. Family was moaning that they were starving (they weren't) so this was the safest option. As usual it was clean but one lady was in the process if mopping and closing off the internal seating area (they have outside the shop seating too). The margarita pizzas on the shelf didn't look very appealing so l asked for 5 fresh ones. This took about 10 mins not the 7 mins l was told. Even these were slightly burnt which was disappointing for the family but they were average and edible. We had 2 cheese and onion pasties and a portion of southern fried potatoe wedges. I was surprised that after spending about £15 the you Asian woman would only allow one sauce and not two. I even offered payment for the second one but she declined my reasonable offer.  I made her an offer she couldn't refuse 🤪 but she did. Couldn't find a spare horse head prop to persuade her. Any how l asked another lady, Amirah, who obliged and in fact gave me two additional BBQ sauces. Overall it's in a good location and toilets are in very close proximity which is a bonus if you have a coffee (l had a latte) or 🍵 ☕️. Overall l would recommend this branch but l wasn't blown away with the staff. One had absolutely no 👎 sense of humour. Over and out.
At 9:00 in the morning and The sausage rolls are colder than the weather, it’s very obvious that it was food left out overnight.

Went to collect an order. The cans and bottles of pop were warm so I asked if I could swap for a cold one. They said that fridges wasn’t working and that they’re all warm. Not good. No sign on the fridge either to let customers know. Warm pop is horrible!!!
Worst service ever encounter in a Greggs shop. The Sunday shift is horrible, treating customers with bad temper and wrong attitude. Don’t recommend these shop in One stop shop .

Why is your warm food cold? Twice now went in to get a light lunch and the warm food is cold. I'm not expecting the food to be fresh out the oven piping hot, but needs to be warm. Especially if the prices are now higher, if you are charging that, deliver the service too.

Love a visit to Greggs, the enticing smell of baking bread and pastries is unignorable, staffs are generally happy and pleasant and atmosphere is chilled. Good selection of both hot and cold foods to choose from and all delicious. Hot drinks are always hot and tasty.

They take at least 7 working days to serve you. Don’t seem to move quickly at all, most of the time theyre too busy talking instead of serving and cooking food. If you’re in a rush? Do not got to this Greggs. Cook it yourself will be quicker
Triple Chocolate Muffin  nice as ever. A special thanks & praise to Claudia.  Exceptional customer service! She is a credit to Greggs
Small but lovely staff and food was as always good standard
I had a coffee and there was fruit fly's in it disgusting do not recommend.

Terrible customer service. Asked for a caramel iced latte with an extra shot of caramel and I got a whole different drink. There was no caramel let alone the extra shot of caramel I paid for. Lady in the counter was rude to me but not to my friend. Also when giving me the drink she just slammed it on the counter and didn’t even look at me. Where as to my friend she gave it to his hand and told him to have a nice day. Won’t be coming back to this Greggs. This doesn’t even deserve a 1 star. I’ll be uploading the watered down “caramel” iced latte.

I work in this area since 2017 and I remembered the old Greggs that used to be here at that time.

The new layout looks fantastic, with the parking spaces around, that are well organised to the new location itself - where it's more spacious, tidy and clean (as it should be) and friendly members of staff.

I actually managed to edit the location, as it was moved further down on the opposite retail park!

Made a panoramic photograph of the inside location and one of the outside location and everything looks beautiful.

Warm, Well illuminated, Cousy and Confortabile I may say in few words, and yes, good product for the price value :)

Plenty products of choice 😌

Thank you Greggs 👍 (Nice Netflix Documentary by the way. A lot of hard work and dedication in what you do).
author_name: The Red Fox District - Cycling Workshop

review_text:
Typical value for money Greggs with parking, although the top tier parking may be for Costa customers.
Chicken oval bite with a flat white coffee for £3.75.
Ask for a coffee loyalty card

The manager - Angela should be absolutely appalled with herself. So beyond rude. No excuse me, please or thank yous. We were stood in front of the fridge looking at the sandwiches, the manager comes barging out on the phone, pushes in front of us, no excuse me or anything. Then gives me cold stale food, I’m aware that you’re not always guaranteed to get hot pastries, but a bit of warning would be nice especially when a hot tray comes out the second later. More worried about everyone around her instead of the customer she was serving.
It would be great not to see people handling my food with they're dirty hands after cleaning in the back ....once I saw that I just walked out.....

Serious Food Mix-Up
I ordered two chicken bakes around 12:30, but one of them turned out to be a sausage, bean & cheese melt instead, which contains pork. I don’t eat pork, so this was very disappointing and unacceptable.

The staff member, a mid-height Black woman who seemed polite, even asked me to confirm that I wanted chicken bakes, and I said yes. Still, I was given the wrong product. This is a serious mistake because it involves dietary restrictions, not just a wrong order.

I hope Greggs reviews this carefully and ensures better checks before serving, especially when customers clearly state what they’re ordering.
Just price if meal deals looks tricky & dodgy way how-to sell baguette of 1,99£ up to 3,40£ on its on, when supposed to be for meal deal that price & not in its own,just very disappointed!

Love coming into this greggs everyday and greeted by some of the best employees greggs have to offer . Especially Katie. Just want to say their customer service is so strong . Fun,friendly always have a smile on their faces and they fast and efficient at their job . Especially when ques are massive and out the door  they work well as a great team . They go above and beyond for their customers.  Feel sorry for them with all the amount of robberies they get.  Greggs need to do better and hire security for the safety of their staff.
Place is a dump. Bins never cleaned and there is never any napkins. The sausage rolls are just processed mush. Don’t go there anymore.

I'm a customer at this Greggs.
lovely service from Kirstie, always welcoming with a big smile !

The shop gets really busy at lunch times so you probably want to avoid visiting at this time if you don't wannt wait.

Good opening hours with pleasant service.
Quite small, but they serve you quickly.
I struggle to find parking outside, so I tend to use the supermarket close by.
Sausage roll and a flat white for around £3.30.
Limited seating inside, but quite possibly outdoor seating whenever it stops raining.
A bakery that can't cook pastries. Doughy inside after taking a bite out of each. Unable to make a complaint because I didnt ask for a reciept.

the staff make this branch work great.. always cheerful and helpful. quick at what they do and good prices for everyday stuff... cakes are not particularly cheap but they do offers or combinations that work well. a Bacon bap with a small orange juice for example; the juice3 is only 50p extra if you have them together. Nice place

I visited here this morning.  It was quiet and there were three staff on duty.   Every single table was dirty.  Covered in crumbs from previous visitors.  The unit where you get sugar has not been wiped down and was also disgusting.  The windows are mostly shattered and it’s been this way for weeks.   And this is a brand new shop.  Someone needs to get a grip.
I love a greggs  breakfast baguette with a lat coffee,  but sometimes short fill by almost 1 inch from the top of the cup? Apart from that I'm there every day before I start work.

I have been here many times when l work in the local area. Staff are nice and l normally ask them to bake a fresh margarita pizza as l hate cold pizza or pasties that should be hot or at least very warm. The drinks are nice and l love the 16:00 combo deal. Wish it was earlier but it is what it is. The tuna baguette is lovely and l love a Latte. The yum yums are lovely and l always end up buying two as it's cheaper than buying one. That's my justification in buying two and eating them myself as sharing one of these isn't an option.  Call me greedy and l probably am but l can't help it. I used to love the triple pack of custard tarts but l haven't seen these for a few years. The wedges are nice but especially with the sweet chilli sauce OH yummy and more yummy. Writing this is too painful. Would recommend this branch and appreciate it's location.

Whoever prepped this needs sacking. Items were requested to be piping hot yet arrived stone cold. Had to be thrown away. Please may their Manager see this and realise they need to step up their game. Maybe in the job centre they will change their work attitude.
Alwasy well stocked freshly baked food and if you want to make sure its always warm just order on the app and collect 😉
3 times i have ordered from here over the last few months and yet food is always cold items missing and always  half of cup of coffee as always spilt in the bag

Addressed to employers manager Gregg's :
We was visited the Greggs in Sutton Coldfield on Saturday during the food festival. Unfortunately, our experience was marred by extremely rude behavior from an older lady staff member.

My 12-year-old daughter asked if she could eat food purchased from another stall outside, and the staff member rudely told her no. We accepted this and moved on. However, when we purchased food from inside Greggs and sat down, the same staff member started shouting at my daughter to leave without explanation.

When we questioned why we had to leave after purchasing from Greggs, the staff member became increasingly rude and aggressive towards our family. Despite us remaining calm, they escalated the situation by calling security.

This behavior was unprofessional, frustrating, and dishonest. As a regular customer of Greggs in Oldbury, where staff are always professional, I'm disappointed in the service at this location.

Anyhows, sitting having a natter and then I noticed 2 tables up from us, a dead spider. Curled up. We'd been there about 10/15 minutes at this point. I am writing to express my extreme disappointment with my recent experience at the new Greggs location in Gracechurch. My visit on Wednesday at approximately 4:00 PM revealed significant issues that require immediate attention.
While I understand that new stores can experience initial operational challenges, the level of poor customer service I encountered was unacceptable. Despite the store not being particularly busy, I faced long queues. Once at the counter, the service was shockingly rude and impersonal. There was a complete lack of basic courtesy; no "please," no "thank you," and no attempt at suggestive selling. Furthermore, the staff failed to acknowledge or inquire about my loyalty account.
The lack of product availability was also a major issue. There were insufficient hot products on display, no wedges, and a limited selection of cold sandwiches. I had to wait 10 minutes for a Margherita pizza to be cooked, adding to the already lengthy wait.
Compounding these issues was the appalling state of cleanliness. All tables and the floor were dirty, and the staff showed no interest in cleaning them. The outside seating area was even worse. This lack of hygiene is deeply concerning.
It is particularly disheartening that a new establishment is failing to provide even basic customer service and maintain a clean environment. I strongly urge Greggs to:
* Immediately retrain staff on customer service standards. They need to understand the importance of courtesy, efficiency, and customer engagement.
* Improve product availability and stock management. Ensure that all advertised items are readily available.
* Implement rigorous cleanliness protocols. Staff must be trained and held accountable for maintaining a clean and sanitary environment.
* Review management and training practices for larger format stores. It's clear that a different approach is needed to ensure smooth operations and customer satisfaction.
* Consider visiting a well run McDonalds to see how customer service and store cleanliness should be handled.
The current state of the Gracechurch Greggs is unacceptable and damaging to your brand's reputation. I expect a prompt and thorough response outlining the steps you will take to address these serious concerns.

I said of course it’s supposed to be hot and she looked at me as though I’d just punched her in the face and reluctantly said should I make it again, of course I said yes.
