⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ The Best McDonald's in the UK – Liverpool
This is hands down the best McDonald's I've visited in the UK, and it comes down to one thing: the staff.
The cleanliness here is exceptional – and I don't say that lightly. This is an incredibly busy store, packed with families and children when I visited. Anyone who's been to a McDonald's during the school holidays knows what that usually means for the tables. But not here. The place was spotless throughout my visit – bins never overflowing, condiments neatly organised in their sections, no spillages left unattended.
I have to give a special mention to Ben (apologies if I've got the name wrong – I only caught a glimpse of his badge). He's one of the nicest and most attentive cleaners I've ever seen. When someone accidentally spilled ketchup on the floor, he handled it so gracefully, immediately reassuring them not to worry because "that patch was just wiped anyway." Such a small gesture, but it says everything about the culture here.
The entire team deserves recognition. Every single member of staff I saw was professional, friendly, and genuinely seemed to care about the customer experience. The manager is clearly doing something right – this level of consistency in a store this busy doesn't happen by accident.
Honestly, they all deserve a raise.

Small place to dine in.  New options are cool to try . Autralian Pineapple MC Spicy Burger , Beef Maple BBQ and Bacon Double .
You can have it without bacon as well which is great too :)
They got Garlic and pepper Nuggets as well . Which was actually very unique flavour to try and they were not bad as well . They tasted different and nice .

Then they got Mac and Cheese Triangles as well . They are not spicy but they are good if you are a Mac and Cheese lover or like cheese and macroni :)

Then they also got Sour Cream and Black Pepper Fries . They are good too . Tasted nice and different :)♡

They got a drink as well which is sakura sprite. :)
Now you get alot more options for sauces as well like sweet chilli sauce , Smoky BBQ Sauce etc . ...

They got different flavours in icecream too. Like Caramel Pretzel McFlurry , Chocolate as well . New options and New Menu :)♡

They also got Choco Caramel Pie in their new Menu as well . Which is yummy for chocolate lovers :)

Overall lovely variety in the
Menu :) Enjoyed trying new flavours .

Ordered a quick breakfast, 3 items were forgotten, and the woman who delivered it to us, spoke to us horribly, spitting at us as she spoke, shouting our order in our faces, whilst half of it was missing. She was wearing a red Christmas sweater and had her hair up. Honestly horrible, I almost considered walking out and requesting a refund at that moment. Disgusting service

Not great, a lot of staff standing around and only the manager seemingly doing ALL of the jobs. The service was slow, the milkshake machine wasn't working properly that was holding up a lot of orders, the technology they use was not working properly and people's orders were getting missed. Food was not very fresh and it was cold. I'd prepaid my order, was asked if I wanted sauce I said yes and she then told me it would be 50p more, I didn't have change on me so I said to leave it and she asked if I'd already paid for my order which I had, and promptly put 2 sauces in my bag. I get that things change but since they did away with cashiers the service has just got really bad. It's not the fault if the staff, it's the overly complicated system they have. The staff are polite but clearly frustrated with how the work has been made ridiculously haphazard.

Reviewing on someones behalf. They had posted on face book the exact words "A big SHOUT OUT to a young girl who works in McDonald’s liscard called RUBY ! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
This young girl was such a credit to McDonald’s  Liscard , she went above and beyond to help me yesterday cleaned our table , kept  my children entertained with paper masks came and asked if everything was ok , just so lovely and polite!! Well done RUBY if anyone knows this young girl please tag her thankyou x"

I had a very upsetting experience at McDonald’s. During my visit, I felt that I was treated unfairly because of my race. While other customers were being served politely and quickly, the staff spoke to me rudely and made disrespectful comments. It was humiliating and made me feel unwelcome. I expect to be treated with the same respect as any other customer, regardless of who I am.

This McDonald’s was quite messy, the service absolutely awful. I understand it’s maccies and it gets busy but they missed out on 3 portions of chips, swapped normal nuggets for the spicy one, might as well given us someone else’s order as nothing was right. The only thing that was correct that we received was the bottled water. Unfortunately we had to run for the train station so we didn’t have time to double check. Guess none of us really expected the service to be that bad.

Also here’s a picture of what the chicken wrap looked like, correct me if I’m wrong but there was 1 strip, I’ve always had 2 in the past. Oh well…
I have ordered hot chocolate there id no milk in it I just hot and bit of chocolate powder  it’s just disgusting

the usual mcdonald. too much crowded this branch. u can barely find a seat. queue is long for ur food. little messy. u can order from the digital screen. small seating area. bathroom available. a second floor is available. waiting area for ur food is very tiny.

Ordered from this store, received only 2 things correct in my order... sent unsuitable cold and ridiculous substitutes and food was rank.
Would avoid this place at all costs they are hopeless
Bought two chicken burgers. Took one bite and binned them..horrible fake chicken never again its was rubbery dry and just disgusting
Lovely staff really polite and helpful even though the place is really busy x had a big order so had a bit of a wait but everything fresh except chips were like cardboard

I think it’s just McDonalds in general has gone so downhill, the food is grim and paying over a tenner for a double big tasty meal is absolutely criminal - burger pattys were dry and tasteless, they put half an entire head of lettuce on it and the sauce just tasted off. Service is also slow, you’re stood around 10 minutes waiting for food which wouldn’t even be that bad if it was cheaper and the food was decent. Nah, maccies is shocking now.

There’s a security guard who works there who is unbelievably rude and unprofessional. He repeatedly tried to make a customer mop sauce she has spilt after her explaining it was an accident. I’ve never been so uncomfortable - the way he treated her was very belittling and humiliating. What an awful experience!

hello, I'm a student studying inspector of hotels, bars, restaurants, shopigur, fast food, E.T.C. I'm interested in where you can find that you don't have a man on your lobes, and why is it that you use the blue galata on your lobes, why is the housekeeper with yellow hair starting to it stinks at the potato station and the toilet is very dirty. if there is a rock on this topic, let them close the store immediately. I just be there the staff is sufficient and there gave me wrong food also systems are facing technical issues but no body try to solve it . I first time experienced facilities are not good also. Plzzz rectify asap.
Thank you.

What a service from  Macdonalds I Oder from the giant IPad and got the food in less than a minute that is a record I choose to have a sugar donut & a Grinch Hot Chocolate was so good & delicious I can recommend 100%. Mr. Wig. YouTube

I was on my work break, and because McDonald's is a quick grab for lunch, that's what I did. I ordered a DOUBLE BIG TASTY, and to my disappointment, once I got back to my workplace, they gave me a half-assed burger that had nothing to do with a double big tasty and I couldn't even go back because I had a 30 minute break, now I don't know who made this mistake but the person who served me was sylwia, as stated on the paper bag. Very unprofessional.

I called into this McDonald's for a quick, cheap breakfast while on my way to a training day in Liverpool.  I used one of the touchscreen machines to order which didn't spit out a receipt, and I hadn't thought to check my order number, however they were very quiet at the time so that wasn't a problem, although it might have been at peak time.  It was interesting that there's an option to place your order in Welsh, which I didn't do as my Welsh is a bit limited.

I'm not exactly a fan of McDonald's but you can usually count on the consistency of what to expect. Between bars on a Saturday night some friends wanted to firther lije their stomachs and grab a quick something to eat. I never had any food myself but rather than stand oitside on my own like a lemon i condisodered the fact i really needed the loo and proceeded in with them. I headed to the predictable area were the loo's usually are to be met with a security guard. Although friendly, he told me i needed a code to use the toilets as the doors were locked. This is new to me in a McDonald's but hey, maybe this is how they do it in liverpool. So i wonder off back to find my friends to see if there is a code on the receipt. unfortunately there wasn't. Now i'm a bit miffed and this McDonald's is pretty big and i still need the loo. Naturally i start wondering toward the the McDonald's maon counter but the staff bizarrely weren't there, there was  one to be seen (another first for me at a McDonald's) then...thabj goodness, the security guard beckoned me over to him and proceeded to use a code to open the door.

I offered my profound thanks and went through the door expecting to see a toilet but no, my adventure to find relief wasn't quite over with yet. I encountered a huge corridor and turned the corner onyl to find another long corridor.
Another male friend  had now joined my search with me back when the security guard opened the door. Now we were laughing at the many signs that were specifically telling you.. 'not this door, this is NOT a toilet' so we carried on past them and 'Viola' the mens toilets appeared. I felt very jaopy for my fellow friendband his success and then finally my owm as the the womens toilets appeared before me.

So my opinions of McDonald's havent exactly wavered but i am greatful to the very nice security guard who let us in ,hence my star rating.
Even though in hindsight, he probably could have let me through in the first place and saved a bit a aimless cafuffle. At least it gave us a good chuckle either way. So I suppose now you know you can eat your calorie dense mcdonalds along with the chance to work it off walking, walking and walking to the loo's 🚶👌

So I ordered  2 hot drinks with table service,  online  after  20 minutes I had to go down to the collection  point  and enquire  as to where our drinks.  They had been sitting there.  And they were cold. Soi asked  for fresh ones. Apparently  it never came  up on the screen.  Not happy!!!

A newer, clean McDonald’s with plenty of seating—ideal for a relaxed Sunday breakfast. The atmosphere is calm, and it wasn’t too busy during my visit. Conveniently located with easy access from the motorway, making it a great stop for travelers.

Worst McDonald's we've ever had. Ordered a cheeseburger with extra pickles. Didn't even get a burger patty! 😂 All the rest of the food was cold, couldn't go back as the queue was so long to get back in. Absolute joke. The only positive was that the milkshake machine was still on at 10.20pm

3rd time visiting, opening hours state 5am, 3 times I’ve been met with a locked door and zero staff present, great to see drive thru orders being fulfilled at this time however. Staff not even having the decency to check cameras and inform those waiting outside if it’s drive thru only.

Judging by other reviews, I’m not missing much regardless.

AVOID IF YOU VALUE YOUR TIME.

The upstairs was closed due to a party apparently. Downstairs was absolutely disgusting. The disabled toilet we were told  to use looked like it hadn't been cleaned for some time. Water on the floor smelt disgusting and wet tissues lying about in it. The few tables that were available had rubbish on them or the seats were covered in pop. I dont think ive ever been in a McDonald's in such a disgusting state. Definitely avoid. I won't visit again.

Ordered online the full order never arrived (thats twice now) this time it was no grinch socks...ordered for my nieces visiting as a treat very disappointed that they didn't get thete socks, food was also not very hot...tried ringing restaurant just got voicemail saying not available now call back...getting fed up with items being missing. ..also no straws so messy drinking the milkshakes

Today I am eating at the best rated McDonald’s in my area and leaving an honest review! St John’s McDonald’s in Liverpool is rated 3.9 out of 5 Stars. Will it be better than the lowest rated McDonald’s in my last video? Let’s find out! I ordered the new Big Tasty Meal my receipt didn’t come out again, but I got my food in only 2 minutes… that’s fast food and that’s a star 🌟 With plenty of seating I was easily able to find somewhere to sit and eat my meal, that’s a star 🌟 The big tasty was indeed big and tasty “that’s what she said” I had no issues with my food that’s a star 🌟 I ordered a free ruby kitkat McFlurry, the presentation was a lot better than in my last video and it tasted unreal! 5 Stars 🌟 Where should I review next?

Staff were very rude very slow took about 10 minutes to make a cheeseburger very chatty with all other colleagues instead of focusing on their job very inappropriate behaviour also on their mobile phones and an inappropriate language to
For over a year now, this McDonald's has served me well over the long hours of work looking for a quick bite over lunch. Definitely recommend.
Service and cleanliness was very good but they could work on building the burgers and not just throw the items in the box

From now on this is usually the best McDonald’s tbh and there food and drinks are usually fresh and it’s not usually this bad now because mostly staff usually concentrate what they are doing but sometimes this McDonald’s can go wrong but it’s not as bad as some other McDonald’s tbh

8pm on Tuesday. Took 20 mins for my order to arrive and the nuggets were cold and sad.

Staff were friendly enough to redo them. Still took another 10 mins.

I don't know if it's a lack of staff and/or poor management. Do better..

ho ho ho so after its recent  revamp  i thought id order a nice breakfast as a treat (porridge all week) i ordered via just eat at about 9.22 am and 33 seconds the order was very quickly accepted the delivery time was estimated at 10.22 great !! i had enough time to rearrange my cd collection  and because its sunday it would be wrong not to watch an episode of hearbeat - so the time got put back a little ok i get it - but i was getting close to the 11am cut off but the order was in so all gravy baby - i waited and waited but still no order -    then at 11.42 my app gives me an update --order delivered hmmm confusion    no sign of double sausage and egg mcmuffin meal with an extra has brown  so i tried to call the fast food ? outlet and i guess they didn't plug the phone back in after the upgrade breakfast has now finished so no maccies for me i was forced into opening todays and even tomorrows chocolates on my advent calendar so my week is ruined as well now thanks  i have requeted a refund which i am waiting for still i would like an extra choc for my advent calendar if only kfc done breakfasts the world would be a better place p.s ive contacted santa and your now on his naughty list aswell as certain wool (lg) any ways im off for a game of hide and seek theres two people i still  cant find  mm and gw

Some Staff are rude Ruth the manager is rude and arrogant she has the place chaotic and understaffed no one on tills serving waiting 15 mins just to place order then a further 15 minutes waiting for food to be either wrong missing clod or burnt very bad customer service this was supposed to be a Big Mac when I took it back and asked manager I was told that is the correct size of a Big Mac I said no it’s never been as thin as my finger nail again I was laughed at and told that is how they are cut and sent to them head office also wouldn’t do anything about it and were rude to me on the telephone appalling very poor level of customer service I have received and will be posting this on all other social media platforms to show how bad my experience was

Recently opened, but surely needs a new management.
Ordering service was superb, therefore a second star (good job man 9:40), but the rest...
Waiting for sausage sandwich for quite few minutes where there was no que at all to sandwich be brought cold.
We weren't only one waiting in the carpark so I assume they just waited to cumulate few orders to take it to carpark all in one. Great way to waste simple breakfast item🤦‍♀️

The worst McDonald's experience I've ever had.
Ordering through the screens was OK and that's where it ended.
Whilst waiting food was pretty much told by the cleaners to move.
Bear in mind the food took 25 minutes to arrive.
The cleaners then took to mopping on front of the counter as people were getting food resulting in someone nearly landing on their back.
When the food did finally arrive, after being sat for a good five minutes on a tray we got half of it in a bag and half on a tray, interesting considering it was a take out order.
When I mentioned that the service wasn't great the staff thought it was funny. No apologies, just more smiling and then our food pretty much thrown at us, couldn't even get serviettes as the holder was empty and staff disappeared immediately after throwing the food at us.
Getting it back to the car we found half the things missing, wrong items and cold food, nothing worse than cold fries.
If we hadn't got a ferry to catch I'd have demanded a full refund, not that I think I'd have got anywhere.
Staff appeared rude, as if they really didn't give a damn, no sense of urgency and a member of staff who had finished their shift kept popping behind the country to grab sauces for himself and others. Most staff didn't appear to know what they were doing and the kitchen and orders appeared unorganised chaos. It wasn't even that busy on a Sunday night.
Overall for the £35 we spent we could literally have gone anywhere else and had a better experience and food.
author_name: Water Hygiene Solutions Ltd Simon Watts

review_text:
It’s mcdonald’s,i don’t expect it to be top notch all the time,but since coming here for the last couple years it just keeps getting worse.I don’t know if it’s because the staff are under trained or tired,but the other day i had the experience that genuinely cut it for me.

My partner ordered an archie’s burger,and got a bit of meat with his sauce.The sauce was completely drenching his hands,horrible sauce btw and i wish i had took a picture,but because starving and laughing about the situation,we shook it off and decided to just eat our food how it was because it’s not worth waiting for another.Both of our fries were also drenched in salt,as if the food isn’t already salty enough as it is.My burger was alright,came hot which was completely out of ordinary.

The cleaners are lovely people,and most of them have there for a while.They know how to do their job.
If you want to order from here,don’t ever do it,it will come wrong or cold and i think it might just be the delivery drivers,not the staff. Would’ve rated a 5 star around 4-5 years ago,now definitely a 2 and the last time i go.

For reference this is how many tissues he had to use just while eating the burger.

Honestly I get it's a McDonald's but they don't even read I ordered takeaway they gave me it to eat in, small mistake then I double checked my order because it looked smaller and there's a burger missing and now final getting back to home to see the most disappointing big Mac I have ever seen I just asked for no lettuce and I have no onion 2 small slice of pickle on top of one another and the tiniest squeeze of source you could get out.

"Disappointing experience at 310 Kensington Ordered through drive-thru at19/09/2525- 20:56 (bill #1936) and waited 20 minutes for an incomplete and undercooked order. The potatoes weren't even fried! Called out for a quick fix, but seriously considering taking my business elsewhere. Maybe revisit your kitchen processes and drive-thru efficiency? 😐 deeply disappointed 👎"
Awful awful awful. Avoid at all costs! Chips were soggy and not cooked, no salt. Burgers were stone cold and not fresh. Waisted ages for the food too. Asked for new chips and gave us words ones!

The absolute angels who work here NEVER miss. They get it perfect every time. Straws, sorted. Sauces, sorted. Never miss a beat on an order they’re always spot on. Never late. Always warm. To the staff at this McDonald’s I hope your pillow is always the perfect temp absolute angels.

Av had enough of every time I get a coffee whatever meff has got big dirty greasy sausage fingers dips them in an I’m left with puddles of sweat Grease in my coffee, vile.

(This is most maccies btw not just this one but that doesn’t settle the issue because a few places do it it’s disgusting)

Unless you use the do it yourself check in, you stand at the till point and be ignored, not even any acknowledgement that you are waiting.

The burger was lukewarm and lettuce was not good enough to give to a rabbit, fries were hot.

No sauce offered unless you ask for it.

Latte coffee was good .

Wouldn’t go back there again.

I went round the drive through and was waiting 10 minutes to place an order. Then a rude member of staff answered with an attitude to then be waiting another 5 minutes to pay for my order. Then to only be described as chucked the food by the member of staff who took my order and the window slammed shut. Still then having to ask for missing items of my order . I’m never normally the person to complain but the rudeness of fhe members of staff tonight was disgusting and I won’t be visiting again.
The contents of my son’s happy meal when we got home, hadn’t been touched on the way home. Ended up having to share chips out of my meal which was also only about half full

Very rude staff, never smile, hardly replies to greeting.
Food is like anywhere else, it's McDonald's, so the only way to make a significant difference is to provide great customer service to earn a good review. Obviously the staff here forgot about it.

Just got a cheeseburger well half a cheeseburger. Literally the worst maccies in the uk. Not only that when I asked for a large meal they said were not doing large at the moment. I suppose thats better than we not doing food right now, which has happened multiple times at this mcdonalds.

Easily the worst maccies in all of Liverpool and possibly the worst in the country. They owe me about 100 apple pies and the food is always cold. They prioritise the take away apps rather than the customers in the shop. Gone are the days of when you used to go the drive thru and actually get your food out the window. All they say now is can you park up so we can bring it out half an hour later. Many times I’ve parked up and they’ve ‘lost’ my order and I’ve had to go in. The staff always get labels as being ‘dumb’ which isn’t always true but the ones who make my orders must’ve been dropped as a kid cause how can you get reading off a screen so wrong. Poor kids who are bringing the food out don’t even get given a coat is the pissing down rain, little tip also is when it’s raining put a second tray on top to protect the food from the rain. Many times I’ve had wet mc flurry’s that just get lashed cause they are ruined. Awful management, if this was my franchise I’d sack the lot. The area manager needs to sort it out or sack them too and get someone who can actually do the job properly. I’d rather drive out my way to a different maccies than use this one. Needs closing down

Dirties restaurant I have ever been in my life! God, the tables full with food pieces, crumbs, sticky sauces… floor as dirty as hell! Man, what the heck happened with this chain?!
Table sanitisers in the straw slot, reachable for anyone, especially for kids! (Health and safety issues all over!!!) Just close down if you don’t want to work, or leave for someone who care!

Management probably the same as the restaurant. Only there for the wage….

Food (breakfast meal) tastes FISH! Only God knows how they’re using the cooking oil, cross contamination on all level.

DO NOT VISIT THEM, especially don’t take your kids there,
It's a mcdonald's. Most are more or less the same. You usually get decent food for the price. Foods not amazing but not bad. Food was warm/hot and came out within a reasonable amount of time.

Honestly the worst McDonald's I have ever been to, you don't expect perfection with McDonald's but you do expect them to get you order right, give you warm food, and acknowledge when they've made mistakes. We've been quite a few times as its the local one for family and I cannot think of a time where something hasn't been clearly wrong with the order. Today included. In future I'll just avoid and go to the chippy instead

Your standard McDonalds. I've only used the restaurant portion, I cannot comment on how the drive through experience is.

Got some nice decorations and posters up and about, people in there are nice as well.

Some seating outside could be nice but it's alright as is.
Chicken hard as a rock and smells like rotting flesh, contacted the store and they  would not take me serious so said I would post instead. This is what you get at Rice Lane McDonalds

Easily one of the worst McDonald’s I’ve ever been to and I’ve had the displeasure of this being my go to one because of distance. The only reason you go to McDonald’s is because of speed not to fill yourself or to enjoy a fancy meal. SPEED is your only saving grace and I’m waiting 10-20 minutes for cold food, melted ice in my coke and somehow burnt buns HOW seriously HOW

DO NOT BUY A CARAMEL FRAPPE FROM HERE! Recently McDonalds have been giving a bit less frappe for our money and I’d stopped going to Rice Lane because they hardly ever have frappes on. I was nearby today and gave them one last chance. She handed me my large caramel frappe for £3.63 with napkins wrapped around with a straw. I thanked her for filling it up as the squirty cream was popping out the top. I drove home and found the reason she’d wrapped napkins around was because it was over half full with ice and she was trying to hide it. She didn’t give me a receipt either with the code to prove I’d been. As a side note she also didn’t include my sauces. It’s an absolute disgrace to rip customers off and treat them so poorly and smile taking our money. If you really want a McDonald’s I urge you to go to Walton Road branch as the staff are lovely there and they don’t try and steal from you.

I ordered three sets of chips and they gave me two. I asked them to take the spilled drinks back to McDonald’s for a refund and the delivery guy said he would take them back so I walked back into my house to give them to him and he drove of not even listening to what I said

Avoid this maccies charging 10p per bag and sauce. Made me pay for bag when collecting my food, what’s this all about? Then telling me I wasn’t allowed a sauce after being given my food because they don’t come with the meal and she wasn’t opening a till for 10p what a joke, this should be stated by either staff or on the machines. Edit: returned home with my burger that I asked for no mayo on, not only has it got mayo but they’ve burned the bun and give me it in 2 pieces.

I was waiting 10 minutes for a caramel mcflurry. There were 4 employee around, chatting their time away. No one was doing my order. Order placed after mine were given out before an ice-cream. When I received my mcflurry it was just plain vanilla and chocolate chips, no caramel sauce. It took them longer to prepare my order then preparing burgers and fries and even then, it was just plain vanilla... avoid this place, their customer service sucks, their food is below standards, even below mcDonald's standards...

Never go back there those liars . I went to buy burgers for my kids after school I left to go to a near by convenience store so while I go in I would give them but I notice that 1 is missing I proceed to go in and go back to them after they check the cam and say they put it in the bag but I can’t find it I can see it it’s no where to be found ! I have always come there and I am a good customer never will I come back bc they don’t check the customer car they check inside if they put it in but it was not given to me . My kids proved it and I said I didn’t but liars they are don’t go there !

This is one of the closest McDonald's to me and its one of the worse. Long waits always issues with the food. Inside is like a circus and there's stacks of just eay bags and no one at the till. Staff think its a hindrance to be asked for a sauce of a straw. The two other McDonald's close here are great homer street and the Queens drive one at Richard Kelly drive. Both are far better and you'll get hot fries etc but county road is awful. Been like that for some time. Needs new staffing.

Has to be the worst example of a fast food business I have seen so far. Quite often you will wait sometimes as long as 30 or 40 minutes for simple things like a coffee or a cheese burger. Staff seem disinterested and rude and will actually ignore you if you ask something or you will get responsded to with some snotty remark. Orders that are prepared and ready to go will just be left behind the counter for ages until someone decided to sort it out. Shocking place and really needs some proper management because right now its a total disaster. I also wont forget when I witnessed a staff member being rude to a old disabled lady just because she needed some help with her order, totally unacceptable on every level.

Absolutely abysmal, kids wrnt absolutely hungry- phoned 50 times and no answer. I work in fast food myself and this is by far the WORST thing I've ever experienced. I absolutely hate it! No food arrived at all and I feel awful for my kids not eating. Never again will I be ordering again!!

Absolutely disgusting.. nearly twenty minutes for a "fast food" breakfast order, while they shoot out 7 or more orders for all the Just eat delivery people, if course and when we complained one of the staff gave attitude, saying she could "only prepare stuff as fast as she could" ..Well, she was sure preparing it fast enough for all the crash helmet crew!

If you want good service or fast food, DO NOT go there!

Ordered of Uber.  Asked for extra pickles on all burgers.  Got zero pickles on 2 burgers and 1 burger missing.  Also had no salad at all on one of the burgers.  Sounds petty but it changes the burgers taste.  Ruins the whole thing.  On top of that what arrived was Baltic.  Only reason i ordered as it was so late and no where else was open.  Won't make that mistake again.  Oh and the burgers where dry as hell. Like they've sat in those little boxes keeping them warm for agaes. How is the prices gone up for sub Parr food.

Yous are so embarrassing! Where do you take the staff on from? My 5 year old son can read better than yous. Missing out basic items in an order like fries in a happy meal!!! feel like coming down there walking behind the counter and just grabbing them myself

Worst Mcdonald’s to ever exist, everytime i get a takeaway there is ALWAYS wrong with my order. Missing items, cold food, burned food, missing sauces that i pay for(at the end of the day the 20p sauces add up). I never go to sit in anymore due to all the kids. Last few times i’ve been inside rude staff or teenagers acting like animals. I’ve noticed that there’s always issue’s on weekends whenever i order. HR really needs to do a check up on this place cus it’s an actual joke, the manager needs training aswell. I work in customer service myself and it’s your responsibility to check all orders are right and customers are satisfied, i can tell with this place this doesn’t happen. There’s been times where i’ve food FLIES! in my drinks aswell. Actual joke this place.

We went through drive in. It was pretty busy. Chips were cold. Ice cream was melted. Looked like an homeless woman chatting to cars. By the time we paid, the food was already done, up to 4 orders. I don't like to cause a scene. This was on the queens drive area of Walton,  Liverpool. Disappointed 😞

Staff member having a full on conversation to her Manager in front of me about how she just vomited in the toilet, but will carry on working and see how she goes, Manager says OK hun just let me know, but remember you are working with food. The staff member is on front desk handing out food. Absolutely disgusting, my food went straight in the bin.

I recently had the opportunity to visit the McDonald’s on Queen Drive Avenue in Liverpool, and I must say, it was a delightful experience. The drive-thru service was exceptionally smooth, and the staff members were friendly and efficient.

The convenience of the drive-thru allowed me to enjoy a quick meal without the need to leave my car. The ordering process was straightforward, and I was impressed with the speed at which my order was taken and prepared.

The food itself was exactly what you would expect from McDonald’s—tasty and satisfying. The classic Big Mac I ordered was freshly made, with a generous portion of beef, crispy lettuce, and the iconic special sauce. The fries were hot and perfectly salted, and the soft drink was refreshing.

I also appreciate the cleanliness of the establishment. The drive-thru area was well-maintained, and I felt comfortable and safe throughout my visit. The staff demonstrated excellent hygiene practices, which further added to my positive experience.

Overall, the McDonald’s on Queen Drive Avenue in Liverpool with a nice drive-thru is a great option for a quick and enjoyable meal. The efficient service, delicious food, and pleasant atmosphere make it a go-to spot when you’re craving some McDonald’s goodness on the go.

I ate at McDonald’s today, not because I wanted to, but because life led me there through a series of poor decisions and mild hunger.

The food arrived suspiciously fast, as if it had been waiting for me specifically, which was both impressive and unsettling. The fries were hot for approximately 11 seconds — a fleeting moment of joy — before instantly transforming into salty, floppy reminders of my own mortality. The burger looked like it had been assembled during a mild earthquake, yet somehow tasted exactly like every McDonald’s burger I’ve ever had, anywhere on Earth, at any point in time. Consistency is important.

The Coke, however, deserves respect. That drink isn’t Coke — it’s Coke Prime. Cold, sharp, and powerful enough to reset my soul. If McDonald’s ever collapses, it’ll be because they finally messed up the Coke.

The restaurant itself was a fascinating social experiment. A mix of families, lone philosophers staring into space with a Big Mac, and one bloke who clearly hadn’t planned to be there but now accepted his fate. The seating was sticky enough to remind you where you are, but not sticky enough to stop you sitting down. A delicate balance.

Overall, McDonald’s is not somewhere you go to impress anyone — including yourself — but it is somewhere you go knowing exactly what will happen, how you’ll feel afterwards, and that you’ll probably be back within three to five business days.

Five stars. Regret included at no extra cost.

During the process I was told every McDonald's is different and does things differently - absolutely not true, that's not how a franchise is supposed to operate. Was then told that it's probably because the machine is really old. The cheeseburger was supposed to have extra onion pickle and mustard, it seemed to have even less onion and mustard than normal. I won't be going back.

The staff never seem happy... and yep they do choose to work there... I didn't put a gun in their back and force them to get behind the counter.  Anyway Fishponds McDonald's.... it has been reported the worst one in the country... so we did our order... simple kids meal with chicken nuggets and lemonade, 1 sweet chilli wrap meal with lemonade, one of their new burger meals and 2 cheese chilli bites and of course 1 chicken meal with diet coke.  Over 35.00 later!!!!!!! We got passed to another window and we did ask for sauces.  It's passed over and hubby was let's go and I wanted to check... we get back and of course 1 fries missing and no sauces.  The drinks were filled with so much ice it was pouring all over my lap on the way back.  This isn't the first time we have had poor service there and things missing they once passed our food to another car and we could see the people eating from it and called them over only then wanting us to have the meals when other people had not only started eating, but touched!  The woman was really put out when we said NO, make us fresh!... so can I recommend this McDonald's...sadly Nope!...try another will be worth the drive and your food might be just hot and not deep fried that the chicken is so hard to get your teeth in you wish you never went back... so avoid in the first place!

Staff always look like they are confused and overworked.
the managers are not polite and professional and can hardly speak English properly.

I requested the female managers name and she refused to give me her name because she knows her service was well below standard and that was the reason why she refused to give me her name.
She doesn't look welcoming at all and she has a angry face and she doesn't smile to the customers.

When I asked a member of the team for their managers name she refused to tell me because her manger told her not to tell me...the female manger didn't even have a name tag on her shirt.

They always make mistakes on little orders like porridge with jam or syrup etc.

There are only a few members of staff who are professional and meet you with a cheerful face 🥰

The supervisors and managers need to be trained again because their customer service is well below standard and they should not be the face of McDonald's if they treat their customers this way.

The coffee was nice and so was the donuts. The toilet was clean but only 3 stars because no suger was offered or was present to self serve so had to wait and ask . Very bazaar. After eating I also realised that no napkins were in the bag . This is really the absolute basics and can’t be ignored at the new high price point that is now being charged in McDonald restaurants .

I tend to pop in to do some work and use (admittedly) a little of the WiFi. I always make a little purchase, only fair, and always treated well. It's clean and tidy and comfortable. Please be wary, 90 mins free parking, after that, a nasty fine.

I went into maccies because my car was dead in the car park and it had died across three spaces. The lady was so helpful and she said she’d find the guy who worked there who had a car, the guy stayed outside with me and helped me start my car. They were so nice, and i had a double cheeseburger whilst i was waiting and it was bang. Thank youuu man at mcdonalds
A fair example of a McDonalds. Clean. The toilets were clean too. The young girl helped me with a receipt problem.

Cleanest and quickest McDonald's near me, but watch out for the teens near the window, theyll grab your food and be gone with it while youre double checking you had the right number. Staff are always helpful though so my order.was remade. I dont like American cheese and they nearly always get the right which most places never do
Ralf was lovely to us after we had a wee bit of a mix up at the drive through. He handled our issue with speed and was very gracious. We love you Ralf!

We decided to get dinner before driving down to Devon.

It's the same as every other McDonald's pretty much.

The food was what we expected, but the service was very quick.

WHY DO THEY FORGET DIPS EVERY SINGLE TIME😭😭most staff are polite but there’s one particular woman that exchanged no words whatsoever when handing me my food or apologising for forgetting my dip, for some reason she just gave me a dirty look. Quite bizarre, if you don’t want to be in a customer facing role, then find something else. Food is normally good but they forget the dip every single time.

Cold food, missing items and bad quality.
I have to say that your employee Musa (Customer Care) is a great guy, very professional he got it sorted fast and fast very polite. You need more workers like him in my honest opinion.
Every time I order online they are missing items and the food it’s freezing cold
Anyway Musa is the best.
Adiós

Total mess tonight at this drive through, asked to wait in bay for food which wasn’t a problem but after half an hour was given the wrong order which I returned.
Went inside to enquire as to when I might get the food order.At least 6 others trying to resolve issues .Ask three separate times if I could speaker with someone,told no one available and ignored. Decided to approach the payment window at the drive through and when it interrupts the ability to take money the manager was available after all !
Refund requested and to be fair was resolved quickly… all be it after 45 minutes and no food was the least that could be expected

Absolutely disgusted... went to the drive through in emersons green ordered a big mac meal!!! Got home and realised that the reason they were so quick was because theyd given me a order that had clearly been returned as there was a bite taken out of my burger 🤢🤢 i have never felt so disgusted!!! Absolutely appauling! Avoid emersons green mcdonalds at all costs!!!!

Rude staff and poor portion control. Half filled drinks and fewer nuggets than paid for. Waste of money would recommend taking the short drive to abbeywood or Brislington instead. The complaint system on the app and website doesn’t even work either so taking my money elsewhere in future.
McDonald’s do us all a favour and learn some basic customer service skills please it’s not hard.

Came here for food via the click & serve service. Didn’t wait too long for the food to arrive. We had ordered smokey bbq dip with the chicken selects, but we were given normal bbq instead which was a shame. The fries were so extremely bland! I’ve had mcdonalds fries with genuinely zero salt. However, after getting to the bottom of the bag, there was an extra box of fries, must’ve been put in by accident as they weren’t on the receipt. They were somewhat bland too, but a nice surprise. So much ketchup in my burger it was falling apart, sliding around, hard to eat. Also had a somewhat weird taste to it, a bit medicine-y? So quite a few things wrong with all of our items…

A nice family-friendly McDonald's restaurant  with plenty of indoor seating  and some outside. There is a bespoke children's area separated from the building.
A large carpark  and electric vehicle charging x 4.
For those in a hurry, there is also a drive-through.

My order was correct, hot, and freshly cooked

Great freindly staff very good customer service.

I was very impressed with the cleanliness of this restaurant it was spotless.

Food was obviously cooked fresh and tasted good also.

Disabled access is great with automated doors and wide areas around most seating.

All in all great for a quick bite or a coffee that doesn't break the bank.

Thanks too the staff here especially the cleaners.

Cribs Causeway....
Worst McDonald's that ive ever visited... Dined inside, ordered at the desk, watched my two crispy wraps going cold at the service point for 10 mins, eventually got the attention of one of the shift managers in the chaos that was going on and asked to just put two medium fries on the tray and get the drinks.. Fries arrived after 3 more minutes and then the drinks 2 mins later.. used to be known as a fast food resteraunt.. absolute joke.. everything was either luke warm or cold...
The worst of it was, there wasn't any point in complaining or asking for the food to be changed as it would have been the same amount of time.. The ta le.serbice wasn't any better. I saw servers walking around the tables with trays of food going cold, as it was so busy they couldn't keep up...

Super busy, not enough staff to cope. Took just over 25 minutes from food ordering in the restaurant on screens to collection at the counter.
Cold food, no apologies. The restaurant needed a good clean, not what you expect from a McDonald’s

Came to this mcdonalds for tea after a ghastly experience with a ghost kitchen delivery on Justeat! Didn’t touch that so went to maccies as a safe option. Took a while to have my order taken (about 3 minutes) even though there are 2 kiosks in the drive thru, the other customer’s order at the kiosk showed at our screen! But when our order was taken we went through the drive thru quickly, and my food was so tasty! I love mcdonalds cos it’s always a safe option. Thanks
I went for a hot chocolate and it was very tasty and the manager Ryan made my day all because he said enjoy the drink and your evening. Top customer service.
One of the better McDonald's. Breakfast was very good!

This McDonald’s is absolutely rubbish! They are constantly forgetting things, I’ve had my chips forgotten, paid for sauces forgotten, the special sauces that come with the cheese bites forgotten. I waited 31 minutes in the DRIVE THROUGH today and still had to pull up after as half of my sauces were missing. The chips are always cold and barely taste of salt. The milkshake machine is always always broken. I avoid this one at all costs!!!

This McDonald's is far too small for the demand. Big long queue for the drive-through. We opted to eat in, and got the last table. Had to wait nearly 40 mins for our food, by that time the burgers were cold, couldn't even get to the counter to complain, there were that many disgruntled customers waiting for their food to arrive. Went here after driving back from Heathrow boy that gave us the drinks was polite got us maple syrup but put it on the side, waited 10mins for food which is long for breakfast got told to go down to the next window by a lady she came down with the food I asked for the maple syrup that I ask the boy for she went we only do syrup with porridge which is a lie because I’ve never had a problem asking for syrup she was rude unhelpful didn’t say sorry I said I would pay she genuinely couldn’t be bothered to go back and get it I believe! the food was wrong had one with an no egg but had egg and one without egg add sausage both were wrong. She needs to improve her customer service skills and needs to have better manners

Ordered, against my better judgement, as a treat. Took ages to arrive, almost all who came in after me were served before me. A good example of a McDonald’s. Quite small. The sausage and egg McMuffin was good. Service was quick.

Just got out of McDonald's after a 20-30min wait. My mum only asked why the food took so long (It was a small order) and the young woman who served her replied with"DON'T BE SO RUDE! We had to cook the pancakes." You don't "cook" the pancakes.

Your company is a joke especially when your competitors are far better.

Appalling service. Placed an order through the app, and waited as it was forced through multiple delivery drivers with repeated delays. An hour later I had to go to the restaurant in person as they refused to honour the order or provide a refund when calling directly. Finally got a refund by physically speaking to manager in person. Not even an apology for the inconvenience. Absolutely disgraceful service unworthy of even a single star.
Visited last day. Services was absolutely great and fast delivery. Atmosphere was good. Have seating capacity inside and outside. Washroom is tidy. Parking space available and 24 hours of working ❤️

This restaurant doesn't always have the new items advertised. Very rarely has milkshakes. On this occasion I checked the app before driving to the restaurant and they were available. Once ordered and paid I was advised they weren't available. Had I known this I would not have come to mc donalds.
Service is always slow here. Everytime I order via drive thru I have to wait. Always ensure you check your items on receipt as I have had many occasions where things have been missing!!

Visiting in January they have A/C on. Listening from all tables how freezing it is. Forgot 3 items from order. 1 ordered was not available. However worker at counter resolve fast and apologised, offered higher value item as supplement.

Placed another order via app to the table, only soft drink and chesse burger. Empty restaurant after 10 minutes waiting i had to tell staff.

What a joke...

i ordered a cheese burger went over to my car and picked up the burger it felt cold!and looked like it had been opened and re wrapped , i opened it and it had a bite taken out of it!!! i went back to the store to tell them about this the manager came over to me and asked me if i brought this here i said yes he said “it wouldn’t of been from here “and then rolled his eyes and just me a new burger without an apology i am appalled!!

Its a mac donalds, so you know what your getting and what to expect... this branch tho is far from fast food.. even the basics ( hamburger, big mac or nuggets ) seem to take a long time from ordering to being served.

Waited approximately 8 minutes , had to exit the car and walk to the window nobody in there had to walk back to the car and listened to other people on opposite side get their order taken before me even though they had just arrived. Expressed my disappointment, manager came and was very negative and , unhelpful and even wouldn’t supply a complementary dip. All I got was sorry for your wait. I feel they could do better. I would gladly still use this as a drive thru but I will never bring my children inside to dine again. There was a lovely staff member, who handled it like an absolute champ, while the duty manager didn’t really help at all, he stuck his 2 pence in once the lovely lady had dealt with the raft of it all while he held back and watched. She was so calm while trying to kick them out, and managed it a few times but they kept coming back in and hiding, but once she did eventually get them out, she personally went round every single table to other customers and personally apologised, I wish I got her name. She was incredible and clearly cares more than anyone else on shift that night.

I thoughorlghy enjoyed the experience here at Long eat-on maccies. Me and my good friend Alister thought the chips were exquisite.

“Any thing else you’d like to add alister”
-“The good was delightful and filled me up”

Thank you along eaton maccies.

Pathetic service, incompetent staff. This is the fourth time when one of our food items was missing! We returned twice to claim our food. We didn't bother on two other occasions.
Hollow and superficial apologies from the staff don't mean anything if they keep on repeating the same mistake without making any real attempt to rectify the issues. Avoid this place or if you are already there, do not drive past without checking your food.

Food packed wrong spilt all drinks and when I phoned in the manager Jack was very rude wouldn't apologise or try solve the matter. He told me there's nothing he can do and to warm my food ! Thos is the 3rd time. Long Eaton McDonald's is by far the worst out there. Incompetent team that haven't a clue how to build a burger or pack the items. I would like to share the wonderful experience I had with Oli at the Clifton McDonald’s drive-through. His service was truly outstanding. From the moment he greeted us, he was incredibly polite, well-mannered, and efficient. Despite our large order for my four kids and family at home, he listened carefully, repeated everything back clearly, and made sure every detail was correct.

Oli’s caring attitude really stood out. He took the time to ensure we had everything we needed and double checked that the full order was accurate. On top of that, the food arrived quickly, fresh, and hot  a perfect combination of great service and great quality.

I am extremely pleased with Oli’s service and hope to be served by him again in the future. His professionalism, kindness, and warm interaction genuinely made our day. McDonald’s needs more people like Oli , he is a credit to the Clifton branch.

One of the best McDonalds in the area. There's always a welcome from the floor staff, the quality and temperature of the food is consistently good and they keep the place clean and tidy. It's often quite busy due to its prime location and smaller size but there's usually enough seating. The drive through is efficient and friendly.

Don’t normally write reviews, but feel it necessary as the service was so wonderful. Had a minor issue with order number not being shown which was promptly resolved by Rahjeet, and even though it was really busy, he resolved our issue efficiently and with a smile, and made the whole experience far more enjoyable.
Food was hot, fries were some of the best at macdonalds we’ve had, and service was fast and friendly. :)

Fast service without any cheerful frills. My order was correct and hot.
There is plenty of outside seating, and the carpark is adequate.
Electric car charging on site by Instavolt  for 2 vehicles.
Disabled parking location is perfect,  next to the entrance.

Only negative: men's toilet could have been cleaner. The seat was unpleasant, to say the least, with dried on stains. Luckily, I had wet wipes with me .

World class exceptional service from Christine!
I’ve been to hundreds of McD’s in 46 countries & never have I seen a waitress go around asking every table if everything is alright! 🤩 Is this fine dining now?! I feel underdressed! Setting such a great example for all adults & children 👏🏆

After casual being told not use the drive through.
I have been sent this link from a friend, some stores are in full knowledge & some are not unfortunately.

You can use a road-worthy (Class 3) mobility scooter in a McDonald's drive-thru in the UK, as they are permitted vehicles, but non-roadworthy ones must go inside; however, individual staff or franchise policies can lead to inconsistent service, so be prepared to go inside or have proof (like the McDonald's website) if denied. Pedestrians, cyclists, and non-roadworthy scooters are generally refused for safety, but indoor access is usually available for those unable to use the drive-thru.

The guy at the drive thru just shoved the drink inside the car which was already fizzes up and it stained my car seats and the seats got stained. Extremely unprofessional behaviour. Lousy waiter. I would highly recommend to avoid this one and use the one at Bridgford. Also the bottle was completely broken.

My daughter treated us all to a takeaway on 9thJjanuary via justeat. After 2 hours of waiting my son went down personally to the McDonald's as it would be quicker to collect. He was told the order could not be cancelled and reordered personally it had to be dealt with on the App. He was told that the order had not yet been prepared. 15 minutes later the order miraculously arrives absolutely stone cold and inedible.  I tried to ring them but after the phone rang about 50 times it then disconnected.  What an absolutely abysmal service. They lied to my son's face as there is no way that stone cold order was fresh. These staff do not care about their customers,  McDonald's shift the blame to the delivery drivers and they in turn shift the blame to McDonald's who did not tell them the order was ready. Shoddy service shoddy staff shoddy food. Don't bother with this place it is a complete waste of time!
A pleasant transaction for a change. The lady who served me, greeted me with a warm and friendly demeanor. The food came quick and the place was clean. Can't say fairer than that.

On the way to Skegness, but cant get there without bisiting this great McDonald's, friendly staff, lots of toom to park, served very fast. Do if your heading this way, be sure to call into McDonald's.
For once i would like my burger to be made properly, what's the point of paying so much money and the food being scattered all over. The staff need to be more disciplined.

Absolutely filthy.. If you’d like food poisoning then this is the place to get it. Staff are always great here at West Bridgford and very organised. They run smoothly in any circumstance, and you always get fresh hot food.

Victoria Retail Park around the corner and is always a mess - you put an order through, you get there and they won’t fulfill it, nor will they help with your refund.

Afterwards, we drive 10 mins down the road to this branch and they always save us.

This is the final time I will be going to this McDonald's it's terrible. The food is never fresh, chips are overcooked and never hot. I ordered a hot apple pie and had to wait for it to be cooked. I had already paid but was asked at the last window if I wanted to change it to another dessert because it would take 6 minutes. My food was already bagged despite having to wait all that time for the pie, so the food got cold quickly.
I parked in the bay to wait and had to go inside when I realised the medium fries weren't filled up properly. These were refilled, so that wasn't an issue. I got home to the worst big mac, I honestly don't know what people are paying for these days it's a disgrace. I can make a better burger at home. To be fair, mcdonalds is TRASH, and I really just need to stop eating it. It's like eating plastic and I'm tired of it. The food is so extortionate these days, and it's not worth £2 nevermind £20 for 2.5 people. Mcdonalds, stop letting food sit around and think it's okay to serve!

Hello,

If you’re in a hurry, I wouldn’t bother even attempting to use this outlet.

It’s quicker to drive to another town to get served.

The queues for the drive through don’t seem to move and the subsequent traffic prevents anyone from using the car park.

Just be careful ordering from McDonald’s here because my stepdaughter‘s just ordered £40 worth of McDonald’s then it was saying that the delivery driver delivery was at the restaurant for ages then the next second it said it was delivered. This is not right or acceptable.

I ordered 4 meals for delivery.
The driver went past the house - number 122 - and parked outside 68. I had to ring him (Uber Eats) to get him to backtrack.
Packages delivered but one of three burgers was missing.
Tried the help on the app
It got part way and dumped the comments and photo of receipt.
Rang the restaurant - hung on for about 6 minutes but no answer.
Tried ringing the driver but the call cannot be connected.
The burger (quarterpounder ) cost £6.09
There was a delivery charge plus I (foolishly) put in a 10% tip for the driver.
I shall get someone to take me into Ilkeston and I shall ask for a refund. That doesn’t help the grandchild with no dinner at all. Having spent the day at hospital with a broken arm I had thought a sneaky treat meal was a good plan. Instead I’ve been ripped off and upset a child.

Do not waste your time effort and money, this McDonald's is a blight upon their name.

I have orderd £25 worth of food and received half an order. Tried calling the store to be left on hold for over 2 hours.

Tried to contact McDonald's only to be told they cant do anything. Then contacted Uber Eats. Only to be told that they cant do anything.

Moral of the story is dont trust McDonald's Ilkeston to get your order right and dont trust McDonald's to not shaft you when the incompetent lazy arrogant managers do mess up.

I went in and waited approximately 5min, despite been the only one in the queue. When I reach home I discovered the grill chicken salad I ordered was stale, the tomato and cucumber was a little slimy and the lettuce  brown, appeared that it was definitely from the previous day. Yes

I stopped by for a quick bite and had a cheeseburger with large fries. The burger was fresh and tasty, and the fries were perfectly crispy and hot. Service was fast and the staff were polite.
The Mcdonald's itself was clean and well maintained, with tables being wiped regularly and bins not overflowing. The ambiance was relaxed and family-friendly, with enough seating and a calm atmosphere even during the busy hour. Overall, a great stop for a quick, satisfying meal in a tidy and welcoming environment.

Honestly every time I get a take away they forget half the order. The people are nice enough but I lose so much money. Order a chicken select and a quarter pounder and they forgot the whole chicken select. They didn't even put a receipt in so can't get a new one without paying again.

Foods always cold, they pretty much always forget sauce and 80% of the time forget an item or two.

And I can barely get a refund with the awful customer service

I called them up and they just told me to go through their glitchy broken live chat ai, it doesnt even work and they told me "I dont know" when I said it was broken.

Pathetic.

This is definitely my favourite McDonald's location. Every time I visit, it’s clean, tidy, and well-maintained, which isn’t something you can say about every branch. The food is always prepared quickly and served at a reasonable temperature – warm and fresh enough to enjoy without feeling rushed or disappointed.

I don’t go to McDonald’s very often, maybe just a few times a year, so I don’t have an extensive basis for comparison, but this location consistently stands out in a good way. The service is reliable, and the staff are always friendly and helpful. Even during busy periods, the queues move quickly and orders are accurate, which I really appreciate.

The seating area is usually clean, and it’s a comfortable place to sit down for a quick meal or snack. I’ve never had issues with long waits or missing items, which can happen at other fast food places. It feels like the staff here take pride in keeping things running smoothly.

All in all, it’s a solid spot if you're looking for a quick, reliable bite to eat. The experience is always positive, and that’s why I keep coming back – even if it’s only a couple of times a year.

In my 43 years of going McDonalds and eating 1000s of meals this has to be the worst meal of all time. Got a drive thru and recieved the following :

Cold crisp fried . ( not sure if there over cooked and double cooked)

Bitter coke ( no idea what they did to it)

A fish o fillet without the fish

🤷🏻‍♂️🫣🤦🏽‍♂️

I am appalled. Food was piping hot - always a bonus. Toilets could do with a clean but satisfactory. Table was clean and condiments area also clean and tidy.

Ordered large Big Mac meal..... is it standard to give out a large fries box with small fries inside? Are you seriously having a laugh here? It's dear enough without having this! Shouldn't have to check before you leave the drive thru and get back to work. Too far to go back now!
Was not a good impression this morning. Workman in doorway, toilets dirty and not working, was put off ordering food. Disabled toilet lock broken, good job I could use it.
Been a few times but today’s food was excellent and was piping hot which isn’t the case at some other sites

Ordered 2 happy meals, a big tasty and 2 teas. Even though I waited like 10mins for the food, it was all pretty cold! One of the teas was cold and so strong you couldnt drink it. Dont know why people go there - For fast-food it was wasnt fast and barely food.
Tried the new Surf n Turf, terrible presentation, half the pickles fell out , small in size for the price, and fish was tasteless. Not recommended.
I’ve just ordered a delivery from this place and it arrived as a swamp of coffee. Try complaining? Good luck. They don’t get back to you. Paid £9.19 to clean coffee off my own floor.

It was a McDonald's.
Cheap food, does the job. There was a bit too much ketchup on my cheeseburger but for £1.29 I'm not complaining. Chips were well seasoned too. The service was quick and frieny even during a busy rush.

Absolutely disgusted. Staff just watched on last night as my 16 year son was physically dragged out of this McDonald’s by three scumbags who were looking for a fight, intimidating customers and throwing food and whatever else they could lay their hands on - out of the blue they turned on our son, who was sat down eating minding his own business. Staff amazing, food grand. But why no pickles in my burger? Most people don’t like the pickle, me? HUGE fan. Most exiting moment of my life eating a macdonalds and experiencing a pickle.
I usually ask for extra.
Low-key sad.
It’s like getting rage baited by a furry. No fun for anyone involved.

Visited on New Year's Day, the place wasn't very clean. Dirty tables, floor, windows and the touch screen for ordering. Also homeless people using the toilet as there own personal bathroom and hanging around for no reason. Don't think I'll be going again.
This place is far from clean. The floors are slimey with grease, the waste bin is overflowing, no serviettes, fries are soggy. Why do McDonald's put up with such poor standards?

I rate this 4 for the food quality and staff. But 1 for the decor. Maybe kids like it but I think it needs refurbishment. Looks like your eating in a subway. Downstairs there is some tables tend to get busy. Upstairs much more room. There is two large windows facing the street and two tables there. There are 3 low kinda comfy chairs Toilets in both floors. Downstairs is disabled. No lifts but that's OK. There is tables downstairs. Often get busy.
Staff are focused on the job. The photos illustrated the upstairs decor looks like a child has drawn it. Oh almost forgot music is played upstairs. Last night it was classical relaxing piano music. Relaxing to eat your burger

Everything was cold. Asked for sauces and was told it was an additional charge. Asked for them to fill up the free-sauce machines and was told the pump was broken.
Surly manager too. Give this one a miss unless you’re a teenager

The place was sparkling clean, and even when I had a quick look into the kitchen, it looked spotless. The portion sizes were great, the salad was fresh and there was plenty of it. Honestly, this was the best Subway experience I’ve had in years.

Will definitely be back!

I ordered on just eat, food arrived cold and uncooked, i got the veggie breakfast sandwich-bread was dry, eggs or hash browns weren't cooked and it was smothered in sauce. Couldnt eat it.Order also took a while to get prepared and arrive even though I live 10mins away.

I came in at 22:20 asking for one sandwich only and takeaway , the staff refused to serve me claiming his manager instructed to stop taking orders at 22:15 despite it says on google they close at 23:00 and he was accepting online orders, I don’t have any issues with theier choice of closing but at least you need to be accurate and state this note on google maps , thank you for refusing to serve me 45 mins before closing time
And for your apologies ,Its not acceptable because the staff called you and you confirmed you have closed already and I should leave the store , please show some honesty at least

I am quite happy with how the staff treats me when I visit Subway in Danebury Avenue.

It is a very closely located subway for me and my family, they are very fast and efficient preparing their Subways and they are friendly enough to talk with us even on difficult or busy days.

This Subway is also well located to the Roehampton Library and a few other shops, restaurants and even about 10 minute walk from Richmond Park which is great.

I just had one of the worst experiences with Subway over the phone today. I spoke with Shaan, and his attitude was extremely rude and unprofessional. Instead of helping me with my query, he was dismissive, impatient, and made me feel like I was bothering him.

Good customer service should be about respect and support, but what I received was the exact opposite. If this is how Subway allows their staff to treat customers, it’s very disappointing. This call has left me with a very negative impression of the brand.

Really to need to see the staff who is working at this place . Same gloves should by making veg and non veg bread . They have breads herb and cheeses but not serving by saying not in stock . No tomatoes in stock , No fresh lettuce. Really horrible.

I ordered for a vegan wrap with hash browns.

In addition to all, the staff are very rude and unfriendly

Excellent Service – Naeem is Awesome!

I had a great experience at Subway recently, and I have to give a big shoutout to Naeem! He was incredibly friendly, professional, and made my sandwich exactly how I wanted it. I came into this Subway at 9:40 am, and there was nobody at the front. I waited for five minutes before someone finally came out from the back. When I greeted him with a simple “hello,” he completely ignored me and continued doing whatever he was doing. This happened a couple times and each time I brushed it off because I thought maybe they are having a bad day etc etc

Then a lady in the hijab helped me skip the queue and gave my online order.

They have been skimping in the subway too, they literally added a tablespoon of lettuce and salad to my subway. Honestly

It was just an wonderful experience . Its just amazing with new  system. Its save a lot of time . Neat and clean. Also staffs is good and kind . Fresh food quick customer service just love it. ♥️♥️

Sandwiches are ok

Someone wants a cookie, you can't and should t stop making the sandwich and serve them, you should carry on making sandwich and ask colleague to serve the cookie person or swap over.

The cleanliness of the subway was lacking, and the staff appeared to be more engaged in personal conversations than in serving customers.

My colleague and I went to this Subway for lunch, and unfortunately the experience was very disappointing. The staff completely lacked basic customer service — no meet and greet, no proper way of taking orders, and a very rude and unwelcoming attitude throughout.
They seemed least bothered about our order or requests and responded with rude and sarcastic remarks, which felt highly unprofessional. This was not a one-off incident; I have experienced similar behaviour here on multiple previous visits as well.
Customer service is a key part of any food outlet, and sadly this branch falls far below expectations. I hope management takes this feedback seriously and provides proper training to their staff.

The staff weren’t friendly and can be quite stingy with fillings. There also seems to be a high staff turnover.

My dog eat better food!!!

I went today for take away order and amazingly it's halal. Very delicious food. Amazing service fast and very quick.  The guy name kishan serve me very politely and perfessional.  Definitely we will back. Highly recommend.  Thank you

I’m a regular customer and never had any issues there but today there was this one server (short woman) it was my first time being “served” by her (other colleagues are defo better than her when it comes to talking to the customers) she needs to work on the customer service, she was having a grumpy face and a very unfriendly attitude from the start which made me want to leave only cuz of her weird attitude. you don’t have to smile but at least have some respectful attitude that’s very simple. if you’re being rude first I’m gonna match your energy as well, cuz I was just trying to eat some lunch and this woman was the only reason why I left. Really nice subway nice and clean really good customer service. Had a nice chicken and bacon sub from here highly recommended way better then the subway in west Norwood.

West Wickham shop, 17/04/2025:
The employee Jason gave us a fantastic customer service experience.

Gave good advice and information for all our questions.
It's great to see a catering person with a passion for his job.
He's a star.
Always pleasant although sometimes difficult to understand through the screen. The staff are efficient and subs are fresh.

Honestly I’ve been to a lot of subways and this tops them all very friendly staff polite especially Jay lovely respectful worker, the shop is really clean which makes a huge difference overall and always spotless always have fresh cookies too 🏆 well done 👍🏼

On the customer service side of thing, it was as expected. It wasn’t bad, and it wasn’t good either. It felt like they were only there for the pay check at the end of the month/week.

This was the worst experience I have had at subway. Usually its the staff, this time it was the sub. They distract you and give less portion of the meat or chicken. Meet always gives good services and the sandwiches have always been good.
Great services friendly staff thank you. Jalpa😊

Extremely poor customer service. The worker should have basically told me too get out with the poor body language, dismissive reactions and horrible responses. Too busy completing delivery orders to serve walk ins. What’s the point in having a store? You need to prioritise your walk in customers - if not what’s the point in having a high street store? Won’t be returning to this one.
Awesome meatball jacket potato very much enjoyed my food here good stop of for something quick
last time i ordered food, once again i only get salami.  And I took Peperoni cheese with salad

Subway Norbury is our family favourite and we love it. The quality of sandwiches is great and made fresh with quality ingredients. The staff is amazing and always greet us with smile. Great experience overall and I’ll definitely be coming back.

Subway Norbury staff, are very friendly and efficient. Love to go to this place again. Here the footlong cookies were very soft, chewy, and loaded with flavor. Overall, they're a tasty treat for when you're in the mood for something sweet.

He just completely dismissed it, wouldn’t even acknowledge me for the lack of beef and simply said there’s a plenty of beef taco inside the sandwich.  I also posted in my local fb page and seems like many locals had experienced an awful experience with this particular branch and pretty much been ripped off by them.  No acceptance of coupons, no deals offered and very much skimps on their main ingredients like cheese or beef etc but fills it amply with onions, lettuce to make the sandwich look filled up! Anyhow I am sure not all subways are like that but I will not be returning to this branch!

When rating chains, I always give an opinion based on quality relative to other locations. With that in mind, this is a 5 star Subway.

The staff are always pleasant and cheery, the sandwiches are exactly what you expect, and the service is quick and efficient. Come at 9:50, the place was open, the worker there was very rude and told me to leave cuz he was already packing everything, but the till and screens for ordering was still working, horrible service!!!!!!
I am happy that I have a Subway nearby, been a handful of times to this branch. The Spudway jacket potatoes are great! Will be a regular customer, probably weekly.

I went in with my partner on Sunday and they told me that it was already closed and it was 9:50pm, and the employee said that it was already closed and to top it off at the door it said that they closed at 11pm

Called into Subway Catford at very short notice on Tuesday morning due to caterers letting us down  last minute- explained the situation to the Asian lady in store . She really helped us out - brilliant food & very efficient service -will def use again - thank you so very much - Rich

Subway Hammersmith Review

No more hot drinks?

Subway is possibly one of the most healthy fast food places on the high Street.

Where there are options for healthy bread, salad, vegetables and non-processsed meats.

Unlimited salad on most subs is also a great healthy option.

Hammersmith King Street was clean had space for me time sit down, as it was empty and I was the only customer.

I was looking forward to a footling sub and a coffee. But was disappointed as the coffee machine was not working. That's not how he put it though. It's as if they don't do coffee anymore.
There were no hot drink items out either

If the price Point was a bit lower, I probably would go more often.

Also, i require a place a i can stay a bit longer and work or do admin etc.

So an unlimited soda or coffee option would work better for me in Larger subways.

Subway Seem to assume, and Hammersmith is not exception, that everyone has been before. There is little help or explanation for people who are knew to the concept.

Not sure where I have been or what happened, but when did a salad, drink and bag of crisps come to £10. I guess I must be tight, but no salad in a cardboard box is worth a tenner, even with a bag of crisps and cold drink. Fast food, fast buck :-(

Try to avoid this place. The orde system is very bad. I don't understand why the Subway stopped the communication between the customer and the sandwich maker. I almost got crazy while I ordered it. Jignesh provided excellent customer service and a detailed explanation on how he likes to maintain a happy customer and great service!

When it was time to pay, I mentioned I had the Subway app and wanted to scan my order for points and a 50% discount on my next footlong sub. She said their scanner wasn’t working and suggested I could scan the receipt code into the app for points. However, when I asked her where to scan, she admitted she had no idea. I then asked another staff member, who informed me that Subway had changed the system and they hadn't received any training on it.

It’s baffling that Subway apparently trains their staff to be rude but not on how to handle their own loyalty system. To anyone visiting this Subway, be aware: you can’t scan for points because they don’t have a functional scanner, and the staff lack both customer service skills and technical knowledge. It’s clear Subway doesn’t prioritize proper training for their employees or customer satisfaction. I have never experienced such a rude customer service especially in the restaurants.

This Subway branch truly took me by surprise, and not in a good way.
