I visited the Subway store today and had an extremely disappointing experience, which I believe could be a case of attempted fraud by the staff.

I specifically asked for gluten-free (GF) bread, and at first, the staff member claimed the shop didn’t have any. When I asked him to check again, he eventually found some in the back. I then asked for the meal deal, which is advertised at £3.99. He confirmed the meal deal and started preparing my food.

However, when it came time to pay, I was shocked to see the total was over £10. I questioned this, and he claimed that tuna costs an extra £6, and I was also being charged an additional £1 for the GF bread. He also said that the meal deal only includes crisps and a drink????????????? None of this was explained upfront, and I was in disbelief at how a simple 6-inch sandwich could come to over £10 at Subway.

I refused to pay this unreasonable amount and was about to leave when the staff member suddenly said he could charge me £4 for the sandwich instead. Since the bread had already been toasted, I accepted. However, when I went to pay again, he attempted to charge me £6. After confronting him again, he reluctantly adjusted it to £4.

On top of this, I noticed something highly suspicious with the payment transaction. Instead of showing “Subway” on the payment receipt, the transaction showed “Zettle_*money machine,” which I suspect might be a personal payment receiver rather than an official Subway account. This raised even more concerns about whether I was being scammed.

I feel this entire situation was highly unprofessional and possibly an attempt to overcharge me on purpose. The inconsistent pricing, lack of transparency, and overall behavior were appalling for a well-known chain like Subway.

I hope Subway addresses this issue seriously and prevents such behavior from happening to other customers in the future.

why is Subway SO STRESSFUL? i’ve been working up the courage to go to a Subway for years. well, I finally did it. i expected something really sloppy, and whilst it was sloppy, i am amazed at the tastiness for the price. i mean, you can literally customize a fresh sandwich completely to your liking, for like 5 pounds. that’s pretty dope IMO.

also you can have so many toppings and sauces! i wish there was a mustard option though, that’s really missing :(. the guy serving me was trying to wrap my sandwich up after like 3 toppings but i was NOT to be disturbed and i fought for the rest of my toppings and i got them! yippee! you just have to be a bit demanding. but the servers are quite intimidating, it’s like they expect you to know what to do. for me, the menu was very complicated but i figured it out, just ask for anything you like and they will hand it to you.

i was happy about the freshness of the ingredients, and the wholemeal bread was very soft. i can also totally recommend the spicy chicken, it actually had a kick to it! but there wasn’t a lot of it in my sandwich so that’s a bit cheap of them. the tuna on the other hand was plentiful and really nice for fast food!

overall, it’s actually really good as a fast food spot with a cute sandwich that won’t make your insides collapse :). but please Subway you need to re-brand a little, why is every location so creepy? the design inside is so off-putting…

Serious concerns at Subway Cricklewood

I would like to raise some concerns about the standards at this branch. During my recent visit, I observed a clear hygiene issue: a staff member prepared a meat sandwich and then, without changing gloves, used the same pair to handle the vegetarian patty from the fresh tray. As a vegetarian, this is unacceptable and raises serious concerns about cross-contamination. When I pointed this out, the staff member reassured me that she is also vegetarian and would be “careful,” but this is not an adequate or professional response. Proper food safety procedures should always be followed to protect customers.
In addition, the portions provided were extremely limited. I specifically asked only for lettuce and sweetcorn with my veggie patty, yet I was told that I could not have more because of “rules” about limited portions. When I questioned this, I was told that if they added more, the sandwich would “get messy.” This explanation makes no sense — I had deliberately asked for no other toppings besides lettuce and sweetcorn. If I had asked for every single topping, perhaps it might overflow, but in this case the sandwich was anything but full. What I received was a very thin, bare sub that did not resemble a proper meal.
Staff insisted this was due to their training and claimed it was outlined on the Subway website. I have checked the website, and this is not the case. The official guidance clearly allows fillings as long as the sandwich can be reasonably closed without excess mess. The way portions were controlled here was unreasonable and misleading.
Overall, this experience was extremely disappointing. I would expect Subway, as a global brand, to uphold consistent standards of hygiene, customer care, and value. Unfortunately, this location fell short on all counts. I hope management takes this feedback seriously, addresses food safety training, and reviews portion practices to ensure customers receive the standard Subway is known for.

Cross-contamination is a serious issue, and the attitude I received made it even worse. Management urgently needs to retrain staff on hygiene standards and basic customer service. This kind of behaviour is completely unacceptable.

I explained that I had asked for a footlong and that she should have clarified that tortilla wraps are only available in the 6-inch size. Dear Subway Team,

I visited your Subway store at Tottenham Hale Station today, and I’m very disappointed with the service and food quality.

When we entered the store, two staff members were present, but neither greeted or welcomed us. One of us ordered a B.M.T., but the staff member only placed a few slices of pepperoni and salami on the bread and toasted it. When I mentioned that we had ordered a B.M.T., he remade the sandwich but again added only four slices of pepperoni and four of salami, which is not according to Subway’s standard.

Another friend ordered Jacket Potato with Beans, and the third ordered Jacket Potato with Chicken Tikka. The person taking the order added only half a scoop and rudely said, “That’s all you get,” without any explanation. His behavior in front of other customers was very unprofessional.

It was also clear that he didn’t know how to properly prepare the jacket potatoes. When I suggested melting the cheese, he refused and just heated the potatoes, added butter and chicken, and didn’t mash them properly. He kept looking at us angrily the entire time.

I had recommended Subway’s jacket potatoes to my friends, but this experience completely ruined our meal. It was a very disappointing visit, and I hope you take serious action to improve the staff’s behavior and food preparation standards.

Thank you for your attention.

I would leave zero stars if I could.  Sometimes people don't realise that the service is just as important as the food.  I ordered some food via JustEat on the 2nd August.  The order arrived with the cookies missing - of which there were supposed to be 13!  I called them directly and the employee asked me to come and collect them - erm, if I could come and collect, why would I be using JustEat?  Anyway, I refused and the employee said he will deliver them with my next order and to give him my name, which I did.
8th September I placed another order with JustEat and then called the branch to remind them about the missing cookies form the last order.  Answering the phone was Nora.  If you went by her tone, you would think she owned the whole Subway franchise in the UK but in reality she was just an employee.  She said she wasn't aware of any missing cookies so couldn't fufil my request. I said that was reasonable and that I would like to speak to a manager.  She refused and said there was no manager.  Apparently, she could't contact him even if there was a fire or theft. She was getting worked up and I could hear another member of staff in the background so I asked her to pass the call over to them and she refused again.  "I am his senior!  He is my junior!".  Oh dear.  When I asked if it was better if I visited the branch instead, she said 'come on down - we have CCTV' - like I was threatening her!

Now, cookies aside, it's about the principle.  I asked her to get the manager to call ME - again, she refused but told me to hold the line.  She came back after about 30 seconds and said 'manager said it's been over a month so he cannot fulfil your request.'.  Firstly, is this the same manager that she couldn't contact?  Secondly, where did the expiry date come from?  It wasn't a special offer - you took my money for an item which you didn't deliver.  Out of courtesy, I waited as advised by the employee and now YOU'RE giving ME attuitude?  Her response? 'You should appreciate me'.  Well I don't.  She was rude, obnoxious and power hungry.  Such people shouldn't be left to represent a business or even employed and the owner should think carefully about staff training.  She needs to understand she is there to help the customer and not to have a chip on her shoulder.  Like my mother always said - 'you cannot educate stupid'.  If you read the reviews, you will find MANY customer service complaints from this particular branch.  It's obvious management are not doing anythig about it.

Food was average but it was this pathetic ego-trip that left a sour taste.  Avoid this branch - untrustworthy, average and not customer focused.  Local ones to it are Acocks Green, Kings Heath, Shirley or Stratford Road and they are much better.

She told me the managers name was Muslim.  I am hoping he has the decency to contact me but I won't hold my breath.

Walked into this Subway, greeted by Tej the Tuna Whisperer. Asked the classic question: “Is the meat halal?” Tej replies, “Not currently, but we’ve got veggie patty or tuna.” Cool. I go for the tuna. He asks if I want cheese. I say yes. He asks “extra cheese?” I say yes again – thinking I’m in for a melty tuna-cheesy delight.

Now here’s where the plot twist hits harder than a stale baguette. After patiently waiting for it to be toasted, I’m charged for a meal deal. Salad time comes, I choose my toppings and sauce like a Subway pro. He wraps it up, and I realise… WHERE'S THE TUNA, TEJ?!

I question it. Tej says: “You didn’t ask for tuna.” I mean… what?? Did we not have a whole deep and meaningful about halal meat and the sacred tuna option?? What did he think I wanted – a warm cheese and lettuce burrito?

I ask for a refund – because honestly, I came for a sandwich, not an argument. Tej says “Sorry it’s already been put through.” But here’s the legal bit, Tej – no goods received = refund still very much a thing. You’re not Subway’s Gordon Ramsay, you're just shouting at customers like I asked for caviar on a £5 meal deal.

Finale: Tej on the phone to his boss, dramatically retelling the story minus the part where he forgot the main filling. Can’t make this up.

Here is a professionally reworded and strengthened version of your feedback regarding your recent Subway visits:

***

Following the change in staff, I have observed a significant decline in both service and food quality at Subway. The food consistently tastes dry, and the salads often appear old and unappealing. Despite specifically ordering double cheese, only a minimal amount is provided. Additionally, the amount of sauce given is scarcely a drizzle, and requests for extra sauce are routinely ignored by the staff.

To ensure these were not isolated incidents, I visited the establishment three times in succession. Unfortunately, the same issues persisted each time, suggesting a deliberate reluctance from the staff to properly portion ingredients and replenish supplies as needed. Such practices are detrimental to the business and to Subway's reputation.

Subway was previously my preferred choice, but the disappointing experiences over the past three days have convinced me otherwise. I intend to inform my network of followers about these issues so they can make an informed decision about visiting Subway.

The staff member said it hadn’t, so I requested to cancel the order or at least collect it later after work, since I had already paid for it.

However, I was told they couldn’t cancel the order and wouldn’t keep the food for me until later, even though it hadn’t been prepared yet. I found this extremely disappointing and unfair. Whether you're in the mood for a classic Italian B.M.T. or a veggie-packed salad, Subway has something for everyone. And the best part? You can customize your order exactly how you like it, ensuring that every bite is just the way you want it.

From the freshly baked bread to the crisp veggies, every component of my meal was top-notch. It's no wonder I keep coming back to Subway time and time again.

In conclusion, if you're craving a delicious and satisfying meal, look no further than Subway. With consistently great food and endless customization options, it's a winning choice every time.

Ordered a chicken tikka half foot and he really helped me all the way, even his suggested sauce fits perfectly with my selected protein! Went with my family (4 of us) and the orders were lightning quick, props to the lad, we had a great time yesterday.

When the guy is here he does it all correctly and how I want, the girls do it atrociously!! I ask for bread that I want “ jalapeño and cheese” they keep saying we don’t do this etc…. And don’t put enough cheese
All fell apart

We go regularly in Aston subway with family, but this time one guy serve us name Ibrahim very very rube and speak me very rudely which I never expect, I ordered 2 whole meal long bread and he took the money and I request please can you cut into 2 pieces then he said no possible and speak very rube in front of everyone then I promise myself never ever go again and will go another one stop or any other subway. Please don’t give him first pay them they will serve you very very rude.

Food tastes great, sadly it's on the over priced side, if it was cheaper I be visiting alot more.  Plenty of stuff to choose from on the menu.  Can easily park at the Tesco nearby so parking is not an issues.

When asking for double meat double cheese, as standard across all subways that means twice the portion of meat, twice the portion of cheese, so why when I ordered double meat double cheese on a foot long an normal meat is two scoops, did you decide only one extra scoop is the same and for me to have to inform you that your doing it wrong, if you have different options than other subways all over the UK at this specific store then you should clearly display this to your customers, not only this but the person serving me was told by a different member off staff to stop at one scoop for extra meat and said it in they're own language, it's only because of traveling a lot for work with many different cultures I picked up on what he said to her, this is completely unacceptable

I asked for extra cheese while ordering, and the staff member (Rohan) responded with “I’ve already billed it,” even though we were still in the middle of ordering. Instead of fixing it or helping at all, he just shut it down. Poor customer service and unnecessary attitude. Not what you expect from a place that’s supposed to customize your order. been a costumer for ages and it’s disappointing.

Allergic people and vegetarians/vegans should avoid this outlet. Staff made my sandwich (I am vegetarian) alongside my girlfriend's (who is a meat eater), without changing gloves, touching each sandwich quite a lot to apply the salad and then using their hands to reach for more salad. They also wrapped the meat sandwich, then reached back to the salad. This means that NONE of the salad is safe for those that mind contamination in that way. I have no idea how this restaurant passed food safety inspection. On a purely enjoyment level, sauce was inadequately and unevenly applied. We ordered collection from the app, and it said it was ready, when in fact it was just beginning to be made (though this is likely an app issue than the individual restaurant).

I had a very disappointing experience at this Subway location today. I was served by Rohan, and unfortunately, the customer service was extremely poor. He was unhelpful and unprofessional throughout the ordering process, which made the entire visit unpleasant. I hope management takes steps to improve the service standards here.

Ordered online and told to collect at 1. Went in to collect order and 3 staff were standing round chatting order was not ready. Staff were so rude. Asked for head office number told to look on google instead of them giving it to me. Terrible service done regiment

To start, I have ordered from this store many times over the years and it's always been great, it's my favourite subway location to order from.
But, I ordered food today, asked for honey and oat bread, it came and it was the wrong bread which was plain brown bread or whatever it's called. Told Just Eat the bread was wrong and they automatically refunded for THAT specific sandwich, the other sandwich was fine with no problems. Almost immediately after contacting Just Eat, the store called and was asking why we got a refund, we explained that Just Eat did it automatically and that the bread was wrong but the woman on the phone insisted she made the sandwich (her words) "all lovely for you" which is true the sandwich was nice, but when you spend 10 damn pound, I expect a perfect sandwich. What i don't get is that if they had no honey and oat, they could have called to ask if I wanted another bread, and if they genuinely got the bread wrong then thats their error. She said on the phone we complained to "just get a refund" which is so cheeky it's unbelievable, I can't believe they called our house to moan at us for complaining to Just Eat that the order was wrong. If you get an order and something is wrong but you aren't bothered to complain then thats good for you, but again when you spend £10 on a sandwich which costs like £1 to make then I want no problems with it. The cheek to say we just wanted a refund is nuts, why did we not complain about the other sandwich?... oh, BECAUSE THERE WAS NOTHING WRONG WITH IT. Don't call customers moaning if you got something wrong, maybe get my order right, and give me the correct damn bread. To clarify we didn't ask Just Eat for a refund, it was an automatic process, I can't believe the store called to imply we were "fishing" for a refund. Unreal.
Oh, and we provided pictures to Just Eat to prove the bread was wrong, I have ate the honey and oat bread many times and it was certainly NOT the correct bread.

Ignore the terrible reviews, this is my favorite Subway in Birmingham! The two south asian women that work here are super duper kind and friendly and it’s also located in a shop so you can get other things here not just Subway. There is also a great skatepark next door!!! In the spring and summer I love coming here and eating a Subway at the skatepark :-)

Even one star is too much for this shitty subway…. The lady at the counter always rude …. With no welcoming attitude… n so stingy about every single thing … m so pissed right now just ordered a chicken tikka sandwich…on uber to my surprise….there was no filling at all …. I paid 12£ for the order with only salad in it ….even the salad wasn’t enough in it ….. dont order at this place

Ordered a pick up order, when I collected there was basically no filling in the sandwich for both meat and salad filling very stingey. The lady behind the counter said because I got the sandwich on offer it should be okay ? No apology or anything just argued with me that I was late for pick up despite being 3 mins early, if you order from here I would go into the store because they’ll rip you off online
I had a subway salad delivered today on 7th March the box was half empty Hardly any lettuce  n salad in the salad box really poor the meat was great but the actual salad portion really small
Everything was great, love meself a salad box for lunch, refreshing and tasty, staffs are helpful and knows what they r doin.
Great customer service and excellent environment, very friendly staff, and subs are just delicious as always!

READ THE ORDER BEFORE PREPARING IT!!! Since when does Tuna look anything like Turkey & Ham?

Believe me - Tuna does not go with Honey Mustard sauce.. epic fail. Looked a mess as well!  Wont be using them again. No lunch for me today.. Bin was well happy though.

Apalling, ordered online, delivered without three quarters of the actual order and the turkey sandwich that did come was just turkey in plain bread with no sauces or extras. Absolutely shameful, their phone number is not in service and the delivery driver just shrugged and said thats all he was given. Do better.. money wasted and no way to communicate

The food is very fresh and the environment is clean and tidy. They changed the owner this year。which is completely different from the bad service before. Recommend this shop, clean and hygienic environment and fresh and healthy food. Will frequent.

Lady name ‘ OSHI ‘ at  Esso mfg Wednesbury  was so unprofessional. She was continuously talking with colleagues in their own language . I told her everything but because of busy in talking i have to repeat  2 -2 times everything. She was literally throwing veggies and sauces in footlong .when she pack chicken and veggies comes one side of footlong and other-side feels like empty . I never eat this much worst sub before .

Rude slow staff who don’t care about the customers , while I was ordering I had to repeat everything multiple times because she was talking to the other staff member there . Very irritating not a good experience
Food is good but They dont have manners how to deal with customers.
Bad service don’t have manner to deal with customer one girl she is working in evening shift she don’t have any manners to attend the customer even i want to meet the manager of the site
Good but closses at 20:00. Not 21:30

Went on 4th of August for a Rotisserie-Style Chicken. I got intoxicated. After one hour I felt like I am dying and couldn't stand on my feets. I had to vomit till late evening everything inside me. Horrible feeling 🤮
Amazing customer service, and the staff always have a beautiful smile on their faces. Definitely the friendliest branch I've ever been to, and the only one I currently visit now 😂
The lady serving is always so nice and welcoming and the food is always good quality. Couldn't recommend this branch enough!
The workers in this store are appalling, their customer service and attitude is disgraceful for a chain franchise, worst subway I have ever visited. DO NOT RECOMMEND UNLESS YOU WANT TO BE INSULTED.
Lovely place for lunch, so quick and easy and the staff are always amazing. Become a Friday lunch tradition with friends!

Just had a terrible gluten free 6" sub here.the roll was really hard,just like air cooked food before the moisture has been put back in it,I could've knocked a nail in with it.a message to the girl who served me- if you're unsure about the quality of food your selling - ask another member of staff before you let food like that over the counter and out of the door,taking my hard earned money off me. Terrible

Staff were not prepared for customers when i came in the staff were flirting with eachother and the food was on the counter in boxes not ready to be served disgusting place never clean always flies in there and the seats are rock hard

Third time lucky in trying to post a review.
No longer offer the cookie and coffee deal. A coffee will cost you £1.90.
I have seen better offers at other Subway branches

A must-visit place. The staff were incredibly friendly, polite and the place itself is very clean, spacious and comfortable. I dined there with my family, and everyone loved it. The staff maintained excellent personal hygiene and were highly attentive to preventing cross-contamination during food preparation. Genuinely recommending visiting this place.

Honestly I don’t know where to start. From the second I walked in I was getting funny looks by the staff and then when I go to order he hardly adds any sauce whatsoever. The price is absolutely ridiculous. I went to sit down and the seat is rock solid and there is not a single person in sight.(I’m not supprised) no background music even though there is a sticker on the wall saying “we are licensed to play recorded music”. Then when I finally open the wrapper and get the sandwich out everything that he put in there was all over the wrapper I wouldn’t even call it wrapped. I take one bite and my mouth was like a desert. Even my drink wouldn’t wash it down! There is flys everywhere and although it may look like a nice place it’s not. Would definitely not recommend
The food was absolutely amazing, the service is quality and the workers are really nice and friendly, highly recommend subway to the lot of you that haven’t tried it.

I've always loved a good Subway and this is no exception.the staff member who served me was very good and friendly.the Italian BMT that I had was excellent and very filling.the shop is well located on Washway Road in Sale only about 5 minutes walk from the town centre.theres limited parking out front and a good bus service nearby.the only thing that is a let down is that they do the honey mustard mayonnaise any more the garlic and herb mayonnaise is very good.

We order a  footlong every Saturday.  It’s a meat feast with 4 meats and cheese with as much salad as you fit into the Italian Herb roll. The staff are friendly and  very efficient including Sadaf who always has a smile and asks about my health.
the cost is £8.49 which is brilliant value as we share and is sufficient for a Saturday brunch.
Keep up the good work lady and gents!

During my recent visit, I felt that Shabbir misrepresented the promotional deal. According to the app, the offer includes a free meal (a drink and either chips or a cookie) with the purchase of a sub. However, he insisted I could only choose a cookie, which contradicts what’s clearly stated in the app.

Additionally, he informed me that I couldn’t use my reward points on the offer, even though I’ve successfully used points with similar deals at several other Subway branches. This inconsistency was disappointing and made the experience feel unnecessarily restrictive.

Our office regularly orders food from this Subway location, and the staff—especially the women—are always polite, helpful, and provide excellent service. Unfortunately, this interaction stood out in contrast to the usual positive experience.

It’s important for staff to accurately represent promotions and follow what is clearly outlined in the app. Telling customers that free food isn't provided, when the app says otherwise, is misleading. Whether it's a misunderstanding or an attempt to limit what’s given out (e.g., saving chips by offering only cookies), this behavior needs to be addressed through proper staff training.
The sandwich was amazing and I cold eat them all day it was brilliant .

When walking out side the shop and entering the shop the colleague working was staring at me well on her phone and when I came in she stayed sat down for ages until I said I wanted to order something and she looked fed up and sighed , she didn’t look like she didn’t want to be there and when I was eating she was just staring at everyone that walked past as if she didn’t want them to enter and she had her phone on loud
I ordered a sub from here. Unfortunately, ended up with too much sauce all leaking through. The old chap, who served me has a bit of a funny attitude. Didn't like the customer service. Food was nice.
Lovely Italian BMT on Italian herb & cheese, but no 999 or Blue light discount!

It’s subway. Food ok, stop pushing extras please. Would have sat down but despite only 1 table with people in and staff stacking shelves and getting their own food the place was scruffy and untidy and tables with bits of food on . Get a cloth and wipe them clean you scruffy people.

Shop was nice and clean and the staff who served me was very nice. Her name was Alexandra and she was the nicest employee I have ever talked to. Definitely makes me want to come this subway more often.

This is located inside of the gas station, but don't let that prevent you from getting your food here.  They have everything needed to make your favorite sandwich.  The area is organized and clean and the staff is friendly.  However, you will have to take your food to-go because they don't have a seating area.
Female member of staff who served us, I think she was the manager, her general attitude was appalling.
Pitifully small salad portions since the refurbishment, they where never really the biggest before but I have never been served this little at any subway branch

I nipped on the off chance they could do some platters for a work meeting the same day. Without hesitation the girl took my order and ensured all dietary requirements were covered. I went to collect at 12:30 and everything was waiting for me. What made this experience by this girl above and beyond was that I heard her colleague mention that she had been on her own most of the morning but still managed to create 2 sub platters with only a few hours notice. Amazing service and a great example of going the extra mile. Thank you, sorry I never got your name.

Excellent customer service from the two young staff that always seem to be in when I take my son for his pre tennis subway! My son (pictured) had a rough day at school a few weeks ago & the staff there were so lovely to him. since then we often pop in on a Wed, Fri, Sat on our way to his tennis lessons + they are always so nice to him. Thankyou so much, to whoever the owners are they deserve a pay rise!!!!!!

This is the perfect place to stop for lunch. The store is always clean and welcoming, and there are a lot of options to choose from on the menu. The crew are really nice and engaging; they make sure that every part of my order is correct. Even when things are busy, they keep things moving and make sure everyone is taken care of.

I recently visited the Timperley Subway and had a great experience. The staff were friendly, welcoming, and prepared my order quickly. My sandwich was fresh, well made, and exactly how I’d asked for it. The shop was clean and tidy, which made the visit even nicer. It’s great to have a branch that’s consistent and pleasant every time. I’ll definitely be coming back.
“The staff here are super kind and helpful. The sandwiches are fresh and made just the way I like. Great place for a quick meal!”
Absolutely amazing service astonishing customer service and amazing customer accountability
Amazing food and the staff are nice great subway

Great service from a young lady called Abbie very enthusiastic and a great attitude towards working. took time with me as i couldn’t really decide what i wanted but in the end made a fantastic subway.

As an inpatient I popped in around lunchtime ..Most of the bread options were not available, the white Italian roll was unbaked and practically unbaked at the bottom.
No coffee available and the tables were an absolute mess, stains on most of the tables rubbish on the floor … absolute disgrace and it was clearly down to lack of focus and laziness as there were 4 colleagues behind the counter, one of which wasn’t doing anything.
Appalling- sort it out Subway
Ordered tangy cheese nachos and a girl named Abbie made them and she filled it up with spicy toppings which I didn’t want and Ive not been off the toilet for two days.
Called in Sunday 7th Dec. Both lads working at lunchtime were both helpful and friendly.   Much appreciated

Not many bread options available , didn’t have half of the items such as peppered cheese , counter was dirty and the sub was drenched in sauce when I didn’t ask for it to be drenched. It’s a good thing im only in visiting family cause definitely not coming back.

Terrible service. Staff have very little experience and knowledge about their meal deal and also customer service is very poor as well. Probably they did not have proper training. I requested to make a meal deal for my kid and realised later actually I paid more than double. So annoyed and frustrated. Not going back to this branch Burnage.

The female staff was rude I asked for Mexican beef footling she never put the guacamole on. Wanted to charge me extra for crispy onions and a little bit more southwest sauce but never even considered knocking off money for not having guacamole or giving me the xtra onions or sauce to compensate.  Won’t ever go back here terrible.
And the gaff stunk needs a good scrub

I had a very disappointing experience with one of the staff members, a middle-aged woman, who was extremely rude and unprofessional. This wasn’t just a one-time incident—she consistently speaks to customers in a dismissive and disrespectful manner. I hope management takes this feedback seriously. Wont be returning to this branch.

First timer. Got a cheese steak sub with jalapeños, peppers and onions. No cookies available, so got crisps. By and large a decent meal, priced at 3.99 (after vouchers applied). Staff friendly enough, clean environment, but apparently you can't eat in after 7.30pm. What's that all about?! In summary, decent and would go again.
author_name: Dr Tariq Ahmad PhD CEng MIET

review_text: It's a small Subway shop, all pretty clean and tidy, doesn't have a great drink selection but apart from that it's standard subway ask you would expect.
Tuesday evening 7:30pm. Super lovely man serving. Nice

I used the restroom before ordering, clean but no soap in the dispenser.

I stood at the wall opposite the counter looking at the menu. I was nowhere near the counter yet the 1 staff member looked at me and said ‘Yes, what can I get you’, I said I was looking at the menu but the 2nd staff member asked me a second later. This was kind of awquard, I was the only person in the restaurant but the staff were now staring at me impatiently.

I made a snap decision to go for the Rotisserie style chicken, I asked for a 6 inch. As I was talking to the person who would make the sandwich the person at the till kept rudely interrupting. I asked about the offer on the board and was met with rudeness, just basically said yes you can have crisps or a cookie, then the lady at the till rudely barked at me Toasted and Cheese? I was enquiring about the meal deals but this person did not want to discuss it with me, I could have a 6 inch sub a drink and crisps or cookies it seemed, discussion over.

When I turned back to the other server she had put a large dollop of chicken on the bun. I just decided to make a basic sandwich with lettuce, tomatoe, peppers a few slices of cucumber, chipotle sauce and when I asked for salt and pepper she looked at me like I was from Venus.

The sandwich was an absolute disaster, the sub did not look like 6 inches it looked much smaller. a big ball of chicken strings and salad falling off the thing on bread that tasted both soggy and stale at the same time, no evidence of toasting or any cheese. Here is the thing the chicken had the consistency, texture and look of pulled pork but without any big bits whatsoever, it was all thin stringy pieces. It looked nothing like the picture of what the chicken should be. I actually felt like these small stringy bits of chicken should be thrown away not served in their entirety to a customer, it was almost as if they did it on purpose, there wasn’t a single piece of chicken on my sandwich it was all stringy bits that I would consider waste or scraps. It was all pretty dry and tasteless probably largely due to the fact there were no proper pieces of chicken. I was in Tesco and regretted not buying a sandwich from there as I was hungry after this horrible sandwich from Subway. This is the first time in many years that I have actually eaten a Subway sandwich and still been hungry for context.

I think possibly the girl making the sandwich was new it was like the first time she ever made a sandwich in her life. The other lady seemed more like a manager, she was very bossy and abrupt but being like that to the customer is not acceptable, if anything she could have overseen the new staff member and made sure the sandwich was acceptable.

If I was in charge of these staff members I would either fire these to employers on the spot or re-train them. You really need to get proper staff at the interview stage though, there are plenty of Subway employees around the world that actually care about making a good sandwich and take pride in their work, this is no place for bad attitudes and rudeness.

So £7.99 for a horrible sandwich with no decent pieces of chicken just scraps, a bag of walkers and a drink.

Later on I checked the website and saw that I could have had the actual Chicken Rotisserie sandwich that is one of the currently specialities which had advocado and crispy onions amongst other things on it. The signage on this menu was atrocious with only one deal shown which is upgrade to crisp and drinks for £2.65 or whatever price that was. This was all confused by the staff not caring less or willing to discuss the menu just giving flippant and rude replies.

I felt like my whole presence there was an irritation to the staff and they just wanted me to pick something and disappear like I was bothering them. The sandwich was utterly atrocious. Disheartened to have had this experience today, please observe your staff, their attitude and the quality of the sandwiches they are serving to the public!
Worst experience I’ve ever had at subway. They just ignore customers whilst making Uber eats orders. I waited half an hour to be served. Everyone in the queue was complaining.

Very very bad food hygiene by male sever. Whilst wearing gloves he rubbed his neck twice and continued to touch the food with the same gloves. We had to intervene and stop him making the sub. Both him and the lady server seemed shocked. I wonder how much sweat has gone into everyone's subs today 🤢🤢🤢
Too good ambiance, Food, Very neat and clean place.

Worst subway I’ve ever been too, thank god I don’t live in the area and have to order from that one regularly. The staff are painfully slow, completely clueless and incapable of making a simple sandwich. Never witnessed anything like it!

Bought a subway from here this morning and I have to say it was one of the worst subways I have ever seen. To start with nobody came out when I came to the counter so I had to get someone's attention after being stood there a good few minutes before I was served. The herb and cheese breads were a terrible quality anyway and were basically falling apart before she even cut them, but she also cut them completely wrong, missing the end off hence why in the below picture the end has fallen off the sub! The sandwiches that weren't completely butchered were overdone and stale. The only reason I have given this a 2 star and not a 1 is because the lad at the till was very polite and nice. Though I was also frustrated I wasn't offered or given a receipt as I wasn't able to leave a review the official way. I will not be going to this subway again and wouldn't recommend anyone else to until they learn how to bake and cut bread properly.

Restaurants give no food, and drivers just ask you to give code to complete order. Leaving you paid in app but getting nothing.

Update: Thanks for Subway's prompt response and further information. I believe Subway had tried her best to resolve the issue, so I adjusted the ratings.
Both me and my bf ate 2 diff subs from here. Food was ait, but we both woke the day after w a hella ill stomach to say the least.. Be carefull guys😭

Despite being really busy with orders, and in the process of training another member of staff, the gentleman I was served by (who unfortunately I do not know the name of; the only identifier on my receipt was no. 04) had such a pleasant and friendly manner.  The subs were made efficiently and as requested.  I would happily return.
Best tuna salad box I’ve ever had at Subway! The portion was perfect, the customer service was excellent, and they even gave me a fresh cookie on the house. Absolutely a 10/10 experience.
Cheadle Subway was great as always—good food and reliable quality. It would be even better if they offered more vegetarian (halal) options.
The environment is great and the customer service is excellent. I would appreciate having more vegetarian food options, and I have a quick suggestion to consider offering halal choices as well.

Me and my colleague stopped ordering deliveroo from here a few years ago because they NEVER got the order right. Not like they missed it once or twice, every single time it was wrong, ingredients missing, wrong bread, some times they would send something random. We used to find it funny but today we decided to give it another go as it's close to our office, it took nearly 3 hours to arrive and the order was miles off again 😂 we genuinely don't understand how they can get a sandwich order so wrong. We've laughed it off again but we won't be ordering from here in future.
The staff were so friendly and the food was very fresh! The music was upbeat and the whole shop was very neat and tidy!

food was exceptional
good amount of sauce to meat to veggies to bread ratio
service was brilliant in particular scarlett who was very friendly and polite and provided a very warm environment and siân who was very hardworking and provided excellent service
overall great experience
best subway in manchester

Place was a little busy at lunch time with college students but the whole staff worked hard and effeciently together as a team to keep the customers flowing. Nicola served me, knew what order needed to be made and she was really lovely and funny to chat to

Usually pretty good, but today the member of staff who made my fully vegan sandwich didn't use the green vegan knife to cut my sandwich. She looked for it for about 0.35 seconds and then used a knife with non vegan sauce all over it. She also took it out of the oven 9 seconds before it was finished and the sandwich ended up being undercooked and floppy. I usually eat there at least once a week, but won't be going back to that particular branch again.

Ordered this evening through Deliveroo. My husband is vegan so I always order different breads so it’s easy for us to identify who’s is who’s. When it arrived the wrong sandwich had been labelled with vegan cheese. When I rang the First Lady who answered didn’t even respond to me she just shouted ‘Charlotte deal with this’. The lady on the phone was then very rude and spoke to me like I was an idiot when I wanted to double check the order telling me to check the cheese and was very sarcastic telling me the normal cheese is triangular and vegan is square. She was then very rude again when she hung up the phone like I was a big inconvenience to her life not wanting to feed my husband and non vegan sandwich! They should seriously work on their customer service skills. The sandwich was fine though after the confusion!

The girls are great evertime I go in im greeted Nicola is a lovely bubbly girl and always makes me laugh  Sian is the quiet one with her little  stars under her eye  the sandwiches  are always made perfectly xx

Very slow service. Staff were working at a speed that meant a family actually left mid order. Even when we were having our salad boxes made they were left and hybrid to move sandwiches from people behind over our order!

The staff are absalutely awfull arguing over the  till about not having a break i will never return here the staff are so rude except for the new guy who was really.nice the two girls attitude absolutely stinks appalling service I will never return i softest that you hire staff thay actually have customer service skills

This subway is a prime example of the downside of individual franchising. I asked for the promotional free kids meal, and they said they are not a participating store. I showed them on the subway website that their store WAS listed as a participating store. I didn’t bother fighting them. I asked for a churro too. They don’t make them! I asked for an ice tea drink. They don’t stock them! I asked for a cookie. It was rock solid. Probably yesterday’s batch. The bread was also hard. Love subway. But they should ditch this store.
Food and service was nice and fresh 👍🏻 only 4 stars because table and floor was dirty

Don't waste your time.
Gluten intolerance was completely ignored, getting new gloves on the touching other bread anyway.
Price on sign said 50p for gluten free bread, get to the end and told its £1.20. When questioned they said 'the price increased ages ago' but refused to match the price they had advertised within their own store. Won't be going back.

I recently had lunch today and I was pleasantly surprised by how good the overall experience was.
The ingredients were fresh, clean and nicely balanced not  too heavy, not too bland, and also the staff was friendly and professional. Their attitude definitely added to the positive vibe of the place.

recently visited Subway and had a fantastic experience. The staff were friendly, efficient, and made my sandwich exactly the way I wanted it. Everything was fresh—from the vegetables to the bread—and the store was clean and well-organized.

I especially appreciate the variety Subway offers, allowing you to customize your meal to your liking. It’s a great option for a quick, healthy lunch or dinner. The prices are reasonable, and the loyalty program is a nice bonus.

Highly recommend for anyone who wants a fast, tasty, and personalized meal!

Terrible, ordered a meatball sandwich and when I sat down to eat it, I unwrapped it and everything fell apart. Looked like it had been sat on and squashed multiple times. Crushed and everything fell apart onto my shirt. Ended up taking it home in a bag and eating it on a plate with cutlery.
author_name: grinding for pink and purple halo roblox toh

review_text: "Subway Manchester is a great spot for a quick and delicious meal! The staff is friendly and Salman is a attentive and courteous staff member provide excellent service and the sandwiches are made fresh to order. I loved the variety of options.The prices are reasonable, and the location is convenient. Overall I'd definitely recommend Subway Manchester to anyone looking for a tasty and satisfying sandwich on the go.

I recently visited subway my overall experiance was too good the food,flavour and just what you'd expect from a well -run subway outlet. The team was well organized ,fast and friendly.Highly recommend if your in the area and craving a quick ,quality bite to eat.

Tried calling for 15 minutes about an uber eats order mistake that was on Ubers end due to allergy. Nobody answered not once. Then the phone just cut to user busy. I find it shocking that nobody would answer a ringing phone for over 15 minutes.

Edit 5 years later: this place has gotten no better accross 5 years, they can never get an order correct, missing items, wrong items, they clearly just do not care whatsoever. The worst Subway I've ever ordered from. Word of advice: don't ever order the paid extras for your sandwich like double meat etc, it won't be done. And don't expect all the salad toppings you asked for, half will be missing. They add any sauce they feel like and don't bother putting in sauce pots at all.

5 years ago: Just ordered from Uber Eats and its arrived with nearly everything wrong. The crisps are the wrong ones, the bread is wrong, the cookie is wrong. Hardly anything in the sauce pots. The only thing that's right is the bottle of Pepsi max 🤦‍♀️
Twice in one week I ordered a large ben and jerrys and they gave me the small 100ml one, forcing me to get a refund through just eat. If you don't have it in stock then it shouldn't be on your menu.

Rocked in 15mins before close, Sarah on the till was a superstar, she made some suggestions to our usual orders and I tried the rotisserie chicken, wasn't disappointed, she even up sold extra pepperoni so good for business. 50% off using rewards on the app too, thanks Sarah, delish sandwich!!

I am writing to submit a formal complaint regarding an unacceptable and unprofessional incident that occurred at your Wilmslow Road branch in Manchester, which falls well below the customer service standards expected from a brand such as Subway.

We are regular customers of this particular branch and visit it consistently on a weekly basis to have our breakfast and dine in. During our most recent visit, we requested to use the restroom to wash our hands. We were informed by a member of staff that the restroom was “not available.”

However, shortly afterwards, we clearly saw the same staff member exiting the restroom. When we questioned this, we were told that the restroom is “for staff only.”

We would like to formally highlight the following concerns:
•	There is no visible signage in the restaurant indicating that the restroom is restricted to staff only.
•	Denying customers access to restroom facilities, especially for handwashing, is contrary to basic hygiene and public health standards, particularly in a dine-in food establishment.
•	It is unreasonable and unacceptable to expect customers to eat inside the restaurant without allowing them access to water and restroom facilities.
•	The manner in which this situation was handled was rude and dismissive, leaving us feeling disrespected despite being loyal, regular customers.

This experience caused us significant discomfort and disappointment, and it negatively affected our perception of this branch. Incidents of this nature risk driving loyal customers away, which is unfortunate given how frequently we visit this location.

We respectfully request that this matter be investigated, that the restroom usage policy at this branch be clarified, and that appropriate action be taken to ensure staff treat customers with professionalism, respect, and courtesy at all times.

We would appreciate a response at your earliest convenience.

They have a complimentary drink machine that serves Pepsi, tango, juice and ice peach tea! I personally had the Pepsi max cherry and there was even a ice machine.

(Edit) Leo’s point of view (continued): We didn’t know that if you write a positive review, you would get a free cookie of choice in Subway. I got a chocolate chunk and my dad got a macadamia nut and white chocolate cookie. So, at home, I tried the cookie and I could see why everyone praises it.
