I got a cappuccino from here and Nina made the best coffee I’ve ever had. She was really kind and friendly, and that coffee absolutely made my day. I’ll definitely be coming back and I hope I get to see Nina again.

The staff were so lovely. Unfortunately, I don’t know the name of the staff member who served me but they were absolutely wonderful. I was rushing and I accidentally spilt my coffee (it was completely my fault). I felt so bad for the staff that they had to clean up the mess I made but fortunately, they were very nice and understanding, telling me that it was okay (I had a horrible experience once in a different branch), they replaced my drink and even asked if I were okay before leaving. This made my day so much better, thank you for much!

A big shoutout to Eddie for running this place so well! Always friendly and approachable, creating a space where customers feel genuinely welcome. It’s clear he cares about both the team and the customers. Well done, Eddie—keep up the great work!

The worst starbucks ever..just ordered cappuchino with caramel drizzle, arrived as a plain white coffee. Also latte with caramel drizzle. Again arrived a white coffee. Called branch who weren't apologetic abd told me get a refund on uber eats.this is 100% not how starvucks would deal with this . I am fuming. £12 for 2 coffees I could have made at home. Unnacceptable

Eddie is only welcoming when you spend £10-15 pounds however when you use your gold advantages like extra free shots he has an issue with it. Also, for the past year he said I can only get filter tea/coffeei with my 130 points .. it was only when I showed him the picture of my app that he agreed to give me my free expresso…Then when I brought it up to the mananger in front of him .. he denied it and lied !!! Eddie is fake and a liar… I used to think he was nice till I realised that only when your spending lots of money and not utilising your gold membership…I will be taking advantage of my gold membership whether you like it or not !

Starbucks is always nice, more attention to the service. I paid almost 10 pounds and the spoon for my cappuccino wasn't included. I understand that Need it brought austerity, but a standard spoon instead the take away stick would be better. However, the staff provided after my request. Pay always attention to the service!

I’ve tried many cafés in London, but my favorite is actually this Starbucks chain café. It feels like home to me. The building is different from a regular Starbucks, with tall beautiful windows, cozy and sophisticated seating, and a calm atmosphere that makes it easy to focus. The staff are friendly. I love this place.

Smaller Starbucks, but enough seating available. Staff were really friendly and it was clearly kept clean throughout the day. Good selection of sandwiches, cakes, etc. Large windows being a lot of light into the space which is nice.

Not a Starbucks lover, dont love the taste of their coffee in general but i just visit here because of the staff! They are amazing! Kind and greet you with a nice smiling face and a lovely small talk!

This is one of the best Starbucks I have ever visited!
It is quite spacious and I always find a relatively quite corner to work from.
What I really like is that it has very big ceiling to floor windows that let the sunshine come in during sunny days so the space is always soaked in sun.
I was impressed by a girl with pink hair that served me the other day. She was just very kind and nice to me and when I asked if I could move a table and chairs to a sunny part of the cafe so I can get more sun she die it for me, also chatted a bit about coffees. She was just very pleasant.
This store is going downhill. I come less often. Today I walked out after waiting for over 15 mins for my order to be taken - I could see my order was still another 10 mins away. I left.

This Starbucks is convenient but poorly maintained. The toilets are almost always out of order, which is frustrating for a place where people often sit in to work or relax. The seating is tired and worn, giving the café a neglected feel rather than the comfortable atmosphere Starbucks is known for. On top of that, prices have become ridiculous — paying over £6 for a seasonal grande drink just isn’t justifiable anymore. While the coffee is consistent, the overall experience feels outdated and overpriced. It’s fine for a quick takeaway, but not worth staying in.
Spacious Starbucks right on Hampstead Green and at the edge of the Heath. Coffee is reliable and team are friendly. It could use updating.

It’s hard to compete with the Hampstead cafe scene. This Starbucks is exactly what an average Starbucks is pretty much anywhere, though it is on the spacious side. The staff here are friendly; my barista struck up a conversation with me in a way that most Starbucks folks never bother to do. Being the UK, the food is much better-looking than the inexplicably anemic US equivalents. This place’s most redeeming quality is its early open time, besting its earliest peers by 15-30 minutes.

Cozy atmosphere, clean and organised shop but staff should be trained a bit better.
Asked for a small late and strawberry acai with some pastries .I said eat in but they were put in take away bags and no writings on the cups so me and another customer were confused which latte is which since she asked for almond milk.
We had to call a member of staff to end the confusion.
They should go back to asking for names and writing on the cups .
In general my visit was lovely apart from the little confusion, everything else was great.
Please add a bin in the shop.

Got some drinks and sat outside in their tables, needed to use the toilets, we weren't given any receipts,I went to the toilets but locked door with pin,went back to the staff as the cashier was busy taking orders with a long queue and the other staff was available not preparing any drinks at that moment , asked him what was the pin number and he asked for my receipt I did say we are sitting outside and don't have receipt for our drinks, he said I need to ask the till to print out a receipt for the pin number, I believe he could easily in seconds right down on a piece of paper or tell me the pin.
So I had to wait for the cashier and she also asked if I have receipt! I said no then she asked if I bought anything from the store and I said yes but we weren't given receipt.....
Is it really that difficult and uncommon to help people out at Starbucks??
Honestly the toilet was a mess and not been checked.
IF YOUR TOILETS ARE SO PRECIOUS THEN YOU NEED TO ATTEND THEM AS MANY TIMES AS ITS NEEDS TO BE,MAKING MILLIONS OF POUNDS THEN TREAT PEOPLE ACCORDINGLY

We had an excellent experience at this Starbucks location in London. Yerin and Hadi provided outstanding service from start to finish. They were friendly, accommodating, and genuinely helpful, ensuring our order was prepared exactly as requested. The drinks were served at the perfect temperature, with a rich, balanced taste that exceeded our expectations.

The atmosphere was pleasantly inviting. Gentle background music and cozy, warm lighting created a relaxing environment, making it a lovely spot to unwind or enjoy a break during the day. The store was also well maintained — the floors were clean, the seating area tidy, and the bathrooms were spotless, which we truly appreciated.

Overall, this Starbucks location offers great service, quality drinks, and a calm, comfortable ambiance. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a reliable and enjoyable coffee stop in London.

Not too busy on the day I visited but limited seating. Wonderful views of St Johns wood high street. Tastefully decorated and great soft window seats where you can watch the world go by. However no starbucks can make a decent cappuccino, this one is no exception.  Frothy milk with an expresso shot. Still quite reasonably priced for London coffee shops and some nice sweat treats.  Would visit again.

I would give service a 10 star rating if I could. I appreciate all the staff working behind the counter and always serve me with a smile and super helpful. This is my favourite Starbucks mainly because its always clean and has a good atmosphere. Recently became a mum and whenever I need to change my baby there is clean changing facility. I feel welcome and never a burden which some coffee shops make you feel like. The manager knows my name so do the staff which brings a smile to my face its the little things that stand out with me. Thank you all of you for being so professional, kind, considerate and always having a smile!

It was a small cafe but cute, just don't go during rush hour. We bought Caramel frappe and match latte and this big gold coin, it was cute. There is also a seat outside the store but it was too cold to sit and chillax out there.

visited about 07:30, about 8 customers in, staff were nice, coffee tasted just like every Starbucks ever so no issues there, sausage sandwich was bland and tasteless as Starbucks sandwiches are (so I got what I was expecting). People in the reviews seemed to hate the toilets so my morbid curiosity got the better of me and I thought I'd check them out. They were ok, but suspect the seat's been broken for a while and they aren't checked or cleaned regularly throughout the day given the dirty toilet brush, seat and paper on the floor but other than that weren't too bad for a high throughput toilet. I'm not a big guy, but due to the cramped size, my arse kept turning on the hand dryer which made me jump a few times. Too much info, maybe, but hope it helps.

I went to Starbucks with my three children and ordered hot chocolates. We sat down, and after about 5 minutes a staff member came over. I understand people can be tired, but the staff member was clearly in a bad mood and didn’t even offer a basic smile.

We had just started drinking when, after only 3 minutes, the staff member told us they would be closing very soon. This was extremely irritating, especially as I was with children. The kids felt rushed and stressed trying to finish their drinks.

At no point were we clearly told before ordering that the store was about to close. If we had been informed properly, we would not have ordered or sat down. I paid £14 for drinks that we only had about 5 minutes to drink before being asked to leave.

Overall, it was a very unpleasant experience, particularly for a family with children.

TOO GOOD TO GO BAG -
I received only three sandwiches, all of which were vegetarian and not items typically sold by Starbucks. In contrast, my friend received five sandwiches that included a proper variety — tuna, chicken, and vegetarian options.

I understand that this offer is based on leftover stock at the end of the day, but I could clearly see the fridge was still full. It feels unfair that I wasn’t given a reasonable selection when other customers were.

Additionally, the Starbucks employee who served me, Aziz, appeared hesitant and reluctant to serve me, which made the experience even more disappointing
If a customer is abused vocally by another customer whom was visibly mentally ill - the staff at least should had say something for the best of everyone; they just ignored literally

The only coffee shop in West Hamostead so far that is not problematic. I go often and have a coffee and sit down outdoors. The onky bad thing is how few tables they have. They only have two tables outside and I think three inside. The ones inside are by the tills and ordering queue so you can't have peace and quiet and read a book. Outside can be sometimes dirty becauss of trash people leave outside and when it's windy you can see trash around the shop. It is not the shop's fault.
I give 4 stars because staff could go out with a broom to clean the pavement like other stores do. I have been many times there and foe hours and they never do it. They also don't clean the outside tables unless you ask them to. For £5 a coffee you would expect to sit down to a clean chair and use a clean table.
Also various people who don't order from starbucks go and sit down outside from time to time and taking over the two tables which now allows customers to have a sear. I have seen hundreds of timws people wirh costa or nero coffees to go and sit there or without even a coffee but just going and sitting there smoking and having phone calls. Of course staff cannot control other people's behaviours but they could implement a strict policy of not offering seats to non customers so that customers will have a seat. They could put a sign outside that seats are onky for customers and they could go out regularly to check if people sitting outside have starbucks cups and also clean the tables and tidy up a bit. This I would call a 5star service but they don't do anything.Again probably it might not be their fault but management's fault who don't pay them enough or don't pay for enough staff. Every single coffee shop in West Hampstead and Hampstead at the moment is highly problematic with not enough staff and dirty so it seems soemthing is going really wrong in the industry at the moment. At least Starbucks makes good coffee because everyone else makes disgusting coffee.....
Classic Starbucks coffee. Spacious place with many seating areas.

This store is amazingly beautiful and has great selection of food, pastry and drinks.
The staff are very friendly and professional. Love the place and will come more often 😍

I love this branch.
They're clean and care about their customers
Especially Azad.
I don't know how and why, everytime I come in I see Azad and she remembers my order. Small sugar free vanilla latte. With some cinnamon on top.
I've been to loads of coffee shops and I will not mention the coffee place at work because they never remember my order after going to them for 2 years.
Azad remembered.
There is a small luxury and peace when you can walk In to a coffee shop as a coffee addict.
And you're coffee is remembered and is already ordered and made upon your entry.
Clean and welcoming always.
Oh I love this Starbucks. The staff is soooo lovely. They are the reason I go there. Their warmness turn the place into a welcoming cozy coffee shop.

I visited this place at midday on 27 February 2025. The staff was very welcoming, and the cappuccino met the usual Starbucks standards. The only disappointment was that many people seemed to use the space as an office, making it difficult to find a seat.

The barista with the curly hair and glasses is a wonderful woman and the best and kindest I've ever found in any coffee chain. Went out of her way to assist me and bring over my drinks, due to me being with a pram and baby. If this cafe was located in a more better neighbourhood then it would have been my go too, but can't always attend as there is always some unsavory characters within the cafe as well as lurking on the streets to cause mayhem.

They need to take a leaf out of the Starbucks in Chatham Dockside book because to date the drinks have never tasted the same. The pistachio latte tasted like hazelnut and the creme brûlée latte doesn’t have enough of the sweet foam like I’ve had in other places. They don’t remind you to scan your Starbucks card and I always forget and miss my points. The atmosphere is great I love the new shop but PLEASE MAKE THE DRINKS BETTER.

Starbucks offers a calm and welcoming atmosphere.
The coffee is rich, smooth and flavorful.
There is a wide variety of drinks to choose from.
Seasonal beverages are always interesting and tasty.
Staff members are friendly and professional.
The café is clean and well organized.
It’s a great place to relax or work.

This Starbucks has a really welcoming vibe, thanks to the awesome people who hang out and work here. Dhrovik and PC are always around, bringing good energy to the place. They’re friendly, easy to talk to, and make the atmosphere feel relaxed and social. I also know Hamed, and he’s another great person who adds to the positive vibe—even if he’s not always there, he’s definitely part of the crew that makes this spot special.

Whether you’re stopping by for a coffee break or staying a while to work or chat, it’s nice knowing you’ll run into good people and a friendly atmosphere. Definitely one of the better Starbucks locations if you’re looking for more than just your caffeine fix!

You can find SB Archway in a busy area. The service and food/drinks are average, but downstairs there is a big space with plenty of seats where you can chill and catch up with friends. Just be careful with your properties especially if you are sitting in the main floor(where the counter is located) as there may be low-key thieves roaming around.

Sunday morning in Archway. Headed here to grab an Oat Latte.

It was quiet when I arrived but within a minute, the queue started getting much longer. 3 staff members on site, one server, one batista and one making the delivery orders!

First visit here, queue didn't take long to get served. Gave my order, but you could tell the server wanted to encourage you order something to eat.

Within 5 minutes the drink was done, what didn't help was, the staff didn't stress it was oat latte, it was only until I questioned it, he mentioned my name! Next time I will ask staff to make my latte more hot as it wasn't temperature hot enough.

Aside from that, the layout and presentation of this place was good, just one thing. Can you ensure the seating area is wiped down please?
Rudra is very kind and helpful. Great coffee with a smile

As someone totally addicted to Starbucks, I’ve been to so many branches in London, and the one at Finsbury Park Station is honestly the best so far.🔥😍

Big shoutout to the bubbly manager Stella and her amazing team: Hunny, Ankita, Rugile, Douglas and Kim. They’re always super friendly and welcoming, and they somehow manage to boost my mood every time I go in. ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️

Great service, great coffee, great vibes. This place never lets you down. If I could, I’d give them more than five stars. Maybe even a whole galaxy of stars. ✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨

Always a great experience at Starbucks Finsbury Park! Ankita and Rugile are awesome — super friendly and super quick with the service. Even when it’s busy, they keep things running smoothly and make you feel welcome. Love grabbing my coffee here before my train!

The team in this specific Starbucks is amazing, extremely friendly and polite. Additionally, very efficient especially when you’re on the move early in the morning. Now I won’t go to another Starbucks, this is my favourite branch.
Great service, a perfectly warm eggnog latte, and a very festive store. 10/10 experience.

Stella customer service is outside expectations . She is creating a welcoming and friendly atmosphere I wish all the other stores could learn this  from her .
Thank you  for  making my day brighter with  my daily coffee routine.

This Starbucks is awful - unfortunately this cafe always has a horrible smell when you walk in, its floors and tables are dirty, and on top I was charged £4.20 for a mint tea…. for a tea bag and boiled water… also toilets are out of order. Don’t bother coming here, not a nice experience at all.
I went to Starbucks today long far . I drank fraupcino. Good excellence…

I had the best coffee (from a Starbucks) in this place there was two lovely gentleman serving who was very attentive and friendly one of them was named Jay and the other im afraid i didnt ask for his name but will definitely be back amazing staff thank you

Very friendly and helpful staff but when I came in there were flies all over the cakes, would recommend only getting food that comes prepackaged because it looks like Starbucks can’t buy fridges that actually work to keep the food safe 😒
Delicious food and helpful staff! Kim and San were very kind))  We had strawberry açai refresher and tomato mozzarella panini♡

A pretty standard Starbucks store, nothing too special or unique about this location.
The store is pretty basic and is starting to look a little tired. The store could do with a refresh of the interior including floors and seating. There are a few outdoor seats and tables which is nice for people watching. Bathrooms are for customers only.

I always had a good experience in Camden Starbucks.
The staff is polite.
Drinks are tasty.
I had a matcha gingerbread latte today, which was yummy.
I recommend.
Thanks.

Pass-by at the cafe around half past five, although the high street was very busy the shop was not crowded. The location is quite perfect to sit down and have a view, especially when seated outside. The staffs were very friendly and polite. They have few tables available inside and also outdoor seating. Also, it is nearby the train station so it is a definitely a great spot. Good and happy vibes visiting the cafe.

I’m a regular one today I got surprise by the service Kamrul if I’m not mistaken with the name was on the side with the phone while her colleague was busy making coffee. He saw I was waiting to be serve but until her colleague didn’t ask him to help her no willing to serve but neither to help her College.
Made coffee fairly quickly. Made it delicious and just what I wanted. The service is good. The only disadvantage is that there is not much space. So it's all good.

The team is great when it comes to customer service and is such a nice place to do a bit of work. However, it could a bit more tidy. There were tables a bit messy with no one sitting down and the staff were not busy.

I bought a cake in that shop and the woman who served me was very rude. I paid for the cake at the cashier, but she didn’t give it to me. Instead, she put the cake in a corner far away. I was waiting for the cake, and she told me it was “left in the corner,” which didn’t make any sense. I bought the cake to take away, and I don’t understand why she didn’t want to give it to me.

Staff made the best coffee caramel frap ans I’m fussy.
Also great she recommended the free coffee grounds for your garden . Great for the environment
Fantastic coffee. Rosa the barista expertly crafted a soya flat white and an extra hot flat white for my friend and both were perfect!

The staff is amazing here, they are so kind and welcoming and make me want to come back, such a lovely and warm experience!
I have particularly had a great experience with Milica and the rest of the crew!
I will definitely be returning :)

Visited this branch for the first time today and had a very good experience.
Staff member was very friendly and helpful.
The coffee was good, shop was clean and tidy.
Nice decoration and very spacious room.
I recommend!

Friendly staff (Melek, Povi and others) - made nice drinks.
The atmosphere of this store is cosy and clean.

I got a TooGoodToGo bag there on Monday. There were two female staff members, and they were super friendly. The store was really clean. It was the best bag I've ever had.

I took it to go this time, but next time I'll stay and have coffee.

I had the best Matcha at Starbucks today, and I have to give a huge shoutout to Sai. He made it absolutely perfect – smooth, creamy, and balanced with just the right touch of sweetness. Honestly, one of the best drinks I’ve had. You can tell he puts real care into what he makes. Definitely recommend trying it if he’s on bar – you won’t be disappointed! 🌿☕️

I really enjoy visiting this Starbucks! It’s nice and quiet at the right times, which makes it a great spot to relax. I love that it’s dog-friendly, and of course, the coffee is always consistently good. Always a pleasure to grab a cup here!

I, with my friend, visited this store at Westfield today for eatin and unexpectedly we were able to find a table quickly(normally this place is always jam packed).
The service was good and fast. However Starbucks really need to expand this store so that more people can sit in, especially during busy hours.
The hot beverages(Latte & Caramel Macchito) that we ordered were superb and the chocolate swirl loaf cake was also good.
The atmosphere of this store is calm & casual. Overall it was a good experience.

I usually enjoy visiting this store to meet my friends, but today I had a very disappointing and upsetting experience. I asked for a simple tap water, but Petar gave me attitude and refused. I explained that I work at another Starbucks and often come here, and also that I have stomach issues which mean I can’t drink coffee or sweet drinks — I only needed water. Despite that, he still said no.

When I asked to speak to the manager (Afia), instead of listening, she laughed at me in front of customers, criticised me for working in a franchised store, and even told me I should go to my own store if I want free water. On top of that, she gave me dirty looks and made me feel judged because of my skin colour. That kind of behaviour is not only unprofessional, but also unacceptable.

As a regular customer and a Starbucks partner myself, I expected respect and fair treatment, but this experience left me deeply disappointed. I don’t know who trained this team, but this is far from the Starbucks standard of customer service.
Friendly customer service from all staff. Service was quick. And the Frappuccino was nice.

Had a horrific experience here. Dietaries are not a joke and it seems like the staff here do not take them serious enough. To make things worse when my coffee was ready, no effort was made to read out the name that ironically you asked for... Do better please
Was there recently to get something for breakfast. The guy on the till was so nice and smiley, that it involuntarily made my day 😅 very careful around me and my preferences as well.

I experienced the worst service of my life at this Starbucks. The staff member I dealt with had a badge with the name Hassan. I would personally advise the Starbucks CEO to review their recruitment and selection process, as the service was rude, heartless, and very poor.

After this experience, I will never step foot in this business again. Thank God there are better alternatives like Costa Coffee and Caffè Nero.

Providing water to someone in need is basic humanity. My friend was feeling dizzy and asked for water, but the manager refused to help unless they bought a drink first. Only after we made a purchase was any water offered. This lack of care for a customer's well-being is disappointing.

I never reviewed Starbucks but today’s experience seeing the barista get her fingers stuck into her butt crack (on top of trousers mind) and work on getting her panties out from her bum was not the disturbing thing, we all been there! It’s the fact she didn’t head straight to the sink to wash her hands afterwards and got on with making coffee’s!

Who denies for water ??? This location of Starbucks does. This lady here Josian was so rude that she don’t want to treat people with humanity. Starbucks has always been on my top list for coffee to start my day. But this kind of service is definitely something that is really concerning. The manager there also supported her. When i asked the questions that’s when an Indian guy comes with a water . I am really unhappy about this service.

I come in to this store quite often and I’m always served by a lovely lady called Talia, she’s amazing!
Super friendly and makes the best coffee, I’m definitely going to come back more often, thank you Talia🫶🏻🫶🏻
We got the largest drinks possible. Just because we didn’t specify the size, nor were we asked. Wet over watered nasty coffee for the same price as a beer! Slammed down on the counter too! Nice!

i had a great experience in this starbucks , where I accidentally forgot to specify that I wanted almond milk in my coffee (i have a dairy allergy!). despite the mistake being completely on me, they remade it for me without me needing to pay again, which was very nice of them! since im sure it was an inconvenience. the atmosphere however is lacking in my opinion, it’s often quite busy even on weekdays during school time, and the seating area can be a little dirty and cramped. but for on the go coffee while you shop i reccomend!! though their iced drinks can be a little watery.

Absolutely Disgusting experience!!  I was at Starbucks Brentcross shopping Centre having a cappuccino with my daughter this evening and was in shock at the unhygienic experience I witnessed. Two Men approached the counter with a huge Husky Dog they ordered some type of cream in a cup and to my horror this huge beast mounted the counter over the displayed food items and started slurping hysterically until the contents of that cup was nonexistent. I shouted to the young woman serving this beast that this was unacceptable and unhygienic. The owner of the huge dog replied, “His paws had been sanitised” (Perhaps I should have walked on the counter myself”as I had showered prior to entering the establishment). Well that’s the last time I spend my money in that particular Starbucks, as I CANNOT trust the hygiene standards.. it’s a shame really as this was our regular coffee spot.

I recently had a bad experience with this coffee shop. Firstly I aksed for mango and dragon fruit refresha I was told they run out the bits to add into the drink but still I it will be the same drink I refused as it is a miss leading information given by the staff member. Secondly I wanted to redeem a merchandise with my 1000 starts and asked if a specific item is in stock to redeem and I was told she doesn’t think it is and she has to check but she doesn’t want to because she thinks all the provided items in the app are not redeemable even though it clearly states on the app I can order and pay with the stars to redeem. I never had such a bad experience for a long time with a Starbucks shop.

I got to Starbucks at 9:05 (5 minutes after opening) and requested for a bear cup. An employee tapped her colleague on the shoulder and the colleague said no we don’t even though I had called yesterday asking if they would be stocking them to which the replied that they would be at 9am. This was a complete waste of my time.

Fantastic Starbucks right across from Golders Green Coach Station! The staff are always friendly and efficient, even during busy times. The coffee is consistently great, and it’s the perfect spot to relax before catching a coach or after a long journey. The place is clean, comfortable, and has a nice atmosphere — exactly what you’d hope for from a good Starbucks. Highly recommend for a quick caffeine fix or a quiet break.

Unfortunately, there is no interest in the cleanliness of the place: the tables and chairs are dirty, and there are flies on the food (photos of all that was mentioned are attached). The employees were informed of this and expressed their dissatisfaction with my comments. The role of administrative oversight over the quality and performance system must be activated in all branches.

Very mean portion of my matcha frap grande ( I paid £5.70)
December 21,2025 12:07

Very DISAPPOINTING ☹️

Awful experience first time of going there because of the uninterested attitude of the staff but even so I decided to give them the benefit of the doubt and went there for a second time just to experience even worst customer service.  The staff was completely disorganised, walking back and forth at one stage, like lost children consequently two different queues formed.  The cashier couldn't scan the loyalty card.  saying: "I can't do that because it's not working" and later on to a different customer "I just don't know".  Their Internet wasn't working so it was probably related but clearly she wasn't aware either.  There was no sign from the barista that she needed to prepare my drink instead served four other people who arrived after me.  By then my patience was exhausted and I asked for a refund (after another queue of course).  I was late for work as the drink was meant to be a takeaway.  Full of students with a lot of time in their hands (enough for one to stay 5 minutes debating about points with the cashier after she had already claimed ignorance).  An atmosphere that can only be described as "a leisure hub for people with nothing to do".

Staff doesn’t pay attention to people waiting for orders and when she asks me if I’m ready to order while chatting to her colleague I said yes but she didn’t move or gave me instructions as to where to order/ pay she just continued to talk to her colleague and eventually she looked at me again and I said I wouldn’t be here if I didn’t want to order, she then just said with an absolute attitude „well I have a till here“ pointing at it whilst herself standing behind a pillar a few meters away as if I know what till she serves customers from, I have always been served from till one so how do I know it’s suddenly a different one, she should have called me over instead of giving a snobby look to her collegue as if I’m the issue. What’s the matter with these teenagers having this absolute attitude serving people, where’s the customer service it’s embarrassing.

Starbucks has always been my go-to for a matcha latte, and I’m happy to say they consistently maintain the same great standard wherever I go. That said, this particular branch stands out as one of the best I’ve ever visited. I've never had to wait more than 10 minutes for my drink—even during busy times—and the staff are always friendly and welcoming. The store is spotless every time I come in, which just adds to the overall great experience. I’ll definitely keep coming back—1000% recommend!

Outstanding customer service! I visit every morning, and it truly brightens my day. The staff, especially Joey, are incredibly welcoming and always have my usual drink ready the moment they see me. Their personal touch is evident in everything they do, from crafting the best drinks to organizing wonderful community events. Thank you for being such a fantastic part of the community—I’m already looking forward to coming back tomorrow morning!

Every morning I go there for breakfast is an absolute pleasure. The staff are always warm welcoming and quick on their feet. Special shout out to Kai for her persistent brilliance in customer service always making my morning.

Awful manager. I come to this Starbucks frequently and buy food and drinks and do not use the toilet. I was on shift as a paramedic and came in quickly requesting to use the toilet between jobs - the manager refused and was so rude. I will never come back.

The staff that works there is very kind and always trying to do their best! Every time I go I see them rushed off their feet, but still kind and attentive to their customers. I started coming because of the Boston Cream Muffins, absolute obsession of mine, but since they stopped selling them, the staff are the reason my partner and I continue coming :)

Regularly go here for a latte and sandwich! The coffee is always good aswell and the sandwich, and there is a lovely older man that is very polite and helpful. The other staff are not that friendly and helpful but I don’t let that spoil my morning coffees.

Honestly after a few hours of shopping I just wanted somewhere calm and close and this place was a gem. It’s modern, trendy and cosy. The lighting and the colours inside make the ambiance really calm and I was able to get away from the hectic noise outside. The location looks new and very clean, the only let down was the loo’s as they were quite dirty. This would be a nice location for a meeting or even a date. It is buggy accessible and everything is flat. I would recommend this location rather than the Costa or the Pret that is so busy. It is very spacious and I was able to have a mum stop here.

The coffee is good, the atmosphere and the place too. However, the staff they have, especially a specific person, are rude and unprofessional. On one occasion, her colleague mistakenly wrote that it was for takeaway instead of take in, and when I asked her to please change it to a mug, she gave me a very dirty look and spoke rudely to me in front of a lot of people!
They definetly need to retrain in customer service.
Best service and starbucks in London. Been visiting since it opened, Timmi, Shahmim Konrad & Tahmun are welcoming and make the service exceptional and always deliver my coffee as ordered

Checked out this new Starbucks before catching my train. Really impressed with how big it is, as well as the decor, definitely a more fun atmosphere than other locations. I go through Tottenham Hale a lot and it’s nice to have a sit down coffee shop just seconds from the station. Will definitely be a regular stop for me now.

Update: slow service. If there are a few people waiting , be prepared to miss your train. Baristas seem to be slow moving and haven’t quite got the flow right.

Southwoodford Branch: Amazing branch very clean and spacious. Special mention to their Starbucks Staff Manager Ash who has the most delightful smile and very accommodating. Together with Francesca they hand prepared a delicious Fresh Cinnamon/Apple Pastry. I was one of the lucky person to have a taste. Took a bite and it was heavenly with my hot chocolate. Feels like home. This branch deserves a 5 star ⭐ for their excellent service. Well done!

Great for working on your laptop. Nearly always half empty because most of the customers do takeaway. Professional friendly staff. WiFi and acceptably clean toilets.
I especially like that this cafe has a lot of free space. It has a dance floor size empty space in it.

Drinks are expensive but they are very nice.
Me and my husband come in almost daily and the service is amazing. AJ and Hamail always remember us and get our order perfect every time. Especially with myself having a kids temperature hot drink

I recently visited the Starbucks South Woodford branch and had a very disappointing experience. The service was slow. I ordered two drinks, but only received one initially. The second drink was given to me only after two customers who ordered after me were served.
Additionally, the customer toilet was in a extremely unpleasant and dirty state. The attached photo shows the condition of the toilet, which was far below acceptable standards of cleanliness and hygiene. Given that Starbucks is a globally recognized brand, I was quite surprised and disappointed to encounter such poor maintenance.

Starbucks, South Woodford

I used to be a regular at Starbucks South Woodford, I used to visit at lunch every weekday until one time a couple of months back my frappachino has little sediments of foil inside at the bottom of the cup. I called the store and they said they would investigate it and call me back. I never received a call back, so I decided to call them later that day. I spoke to someone over the phone who was rude and strongly dismissed the fact that there was foil in my drink, even though I have photographic evidence of the sediments in my drink. They then told me to contact head office, which I will be doing. The next day I went in to give them another chance, they were rude and had a really poor attitude towards me. I will never be visiting this branch again. You've lost a regular, returning customer.

After ordering my drinks and food at the drive-thru got to the window to find out they don't take cash (legal tender). Didn't have my card on me so huge waste of time, luckily there was only one car in front of me.
I've been to kiosks in the middle of shopping centres that take cash, so can't really see an excuse for this.

Woman at the drive-thru was friendly enough and could tell it was awkward for her to tell me they only take card payments.

Costa down the road in Longbridge take cash so looks like I'm going there from now on.

Regular drive through user for the past two years since I moved to the area.
Today visit Thursday 25th September approximately 1315-1325 was a shocker.
A little bit busier and it is lunch hour.
I have to repeat my order at least four times when I drive in, while when I was my turn to pick up my drinks, I have ask to use my rewards point , the young lady , blonde pony till, 3/4 leggings, small build and about 5.2, she past me my drink and walk off and apologise to lady customer before my turn mistake made. She came back to me I ask her again to use my rewards  and she scanned my reward quote and ask for the payment, I ask her I would like to use my reward and this was a the 3rd time  have to repeat myself , she then pulling her face and said to let her know in advance if u would like to use the reward was very rude , she should not be at the window for her appalling service. Reluctantly I got my drinks using my rewards points. What points you have to proof.
A word of advice for this young lady , you have let your team down no matter how long you work at this Starbucks , please refresh your training. I am sure during Starbucks training - you all be trained by your trainer if the customer has got a Starbucks Apps and are you using your rewards today?
Ask your manager to review the CCTV and look at your face ? Why are you doing that?
If you having a bad day, please take 5 minutes and have a breather. Let someone other team member take over your job. Just chill and don’t be so spicety.
The staff called Doa is the rudest staff I have come across. Told her the order was incorrect, her attitude was so stroppy and rude. Is Starbucks trying to tell their customers not to come?

I'm.not sure what happened at Starbucks Northfield last week.  I ordered 2 drinks 2 cakes to eat in...we wasn't asked for  a name..we were up and down trying to get our drinks.otherwise we wouldn't have known of they were ready.We eventually got both drinks but no cakes.  I mentioned them no apology the chap just disappeared for a few minutes I could  see him putting them in a box. the drinks were in cups not take away cuos.no apology no tray just put down no eye contact.  Tables were very dirty we had to clean one. k understand short staff is an issue but ignorance isn't.  Rather  spend the £18  elsewhere .

The best Starbucks in the area. Every member is staff that I have had the pleasure of being served by are always amazing here. Megan,Caitlin,Joel,Aaron, Beth, Mia, Dae, Ranea Brogan all of you are my little matcha making king and queens. Can never go enough which is so nice of them. Really look after me as an emergency worker and I appreciate you 💋

If it wasn’t for the manager Lexi this place would be 5 stars but since she started a year ago I have noticed a lot that doesn’t sit right with me. She’s rude and belittling to staff the few times I have seen her but usually she’s not even around. A manager is supposed to be present on the floor with their team but every time I come in she’s either not in or she’s hiding in the office. Looking at other reviews it’s clear she has absolutely 0 customer service skills

I stopped in on my way to work a few days ago and really wish I’d saved my money now. The drive through was slow and service was bare minimum. This could be forgiven if the food and drink was good but my panini was barely cooked and my drink looked like it was made by a toddler. For such a busy location you would think they would at least train the staff to make a drink that wasn’t messy and barely drinkable
No topping unfortunately. Website states a pumpkin spice topping - “spice blend of cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg and cloves”
Had what was a huge cup of coffee..an Americano. My friend had a squiggle of cream on top of hers. The Tuna melt was tasty.

Very good staff. Very courteous and kind. Plenty of seating indoors and even outdoors for the brighter days. Caramel Macchiato is my favourite here. An extremely luxurious drink. Chocolate Chunk Shortbread is always tasty although it seems to be getting thinner by the week.

Honestly... the 5 stars are purely for a girl named Charlie. She was fan-tastic! Welcoming, kind, attentive. Possibly the best service ive had since covid. Very refreshing to have good service again! Came in with my friend and her 1 year old about a week ago

The worst coffee ever. Bitter and disgusting. The beans seem to be overroasted and really low quality. It's not something you expect for approx. 5 pounds/ a cup. It us quiet because customers are not attracted due to low quality and bad tasting drinks.
One of the dirtiest coffee shops I’ve been in. When feedback to supervisor she was great at finding excuses and reasons to excuse the cleanliness. It’s cleaner in B&Q next door.

A good coffee shop right where you need it. After a long shopping at your favourite area, it is a ace to sip a cuppa and relax. The lady made some excellent coffee today and it makes you want to go back for more. The ambience is also good.
Update: The egg bits with cheese and ham is a must try. With the new seasonal coffees and hot chocolate, one would wonder where the money went... ;)

Not only were all available tables filthy and full of cups and plates, but the insolent supervisor became hostile and even took my drink that id paid for when I politely asked for a table to be cleaned and pointed out that clearing tables should come before serving more customers, otherwise where are the customers going to sit!?
I ended up wiping my table myself, and the barista was kind enough to make me another drink!!

Been in to village gym Shirley and had a Starbucks as usual. Sean and Hannah were on today, service perfect as it always is. The staff are always polite friendly and efficient. Would recommend the coffee shop to anyone

Service can be very mixed depending on who is working that day. More times than not, the service has been bad for myself personally and drinks not made well or mixed well at all! I would recommend going to the Starbucks just around the corner on Shirley retail park instead, as drinks are made well, service is friendly and it has a better atmosphere.

The Starbucks staff are always friendly, efficient, and knowledgeable (especially maya). They make great drinks quickly, even when it's busy, and always with a smile. Their customer service is top-notch, making every visit enjoyable.Five stars!
The new Starbucks looks great! Love all the friendly staff and especially Frankie ❤️
Iced white mocha coffee was tasty as was the cheese and tomato pannini.
Just wanted to say that am not happy where there toilet roll is been put in the disabled toilet. How can someone able to turn round and use the roll 🤷🏼 specially if they can turn round and get to it

Ordered food and drinks at 11:20am, didn’t arrive until 4:30pm. And after waiting all that time, every thing we ordered we didn’t even receive so basically waited 5 hours for the incorrect items. Terrible place
Staff have always been really nice here, nice little chill out spot
the best atmosphere and the best staff they always try to make your day better and its a great place to chill and grab a delicious coffee

I went to this starbucks to get a cool lime refresher, and the lady in there said that we don't do that, so I then had a look on there website and it was showing that they do do it. So then i came home and ordered it on deliveroo. But they did the wrong one for me. Why didn't you cancel my order if you didn't have it?

Just purchased 4 large drinks and the coffees were all half filled. Watch out for this branch. They rip you off. Absolutely disgusting for the price too. Half a large x4. Never again will I use this branch.

From the states and the staff here were so nice and helped explain some odd British driving laws for me. I forgot his name but the gentleman who took the time to chat really made my day 2 days in a row and gave me a venti when I ordered a grande 😁🇺🇸👍🏻

I came here to meet a friend for a coffee.
The atmosphere was great very family friendly.
The staff were friendly and there was plenty of spaces to park

I ordered my favourite Toffe Nut Latte and it was nice. The service was not too bad at all. The store is clean and with plenty of seating as it was not that busy. Toilet was not too bad. Nice and compact branch.

Visited with my sister for a coffee and a chat.
One of my favourites amongst the coffee chains - enjoyed the caramel waffle Latte and a bite to eat.
The price of a visit does add up if you have more than a coffee but its a nice treat.
Really enjoyed the lime cooler.
Toilet was clean.
I cleared the table before we used it - but there were plenty of available clean tables- I just wanted to sit away from people so was being picky.
Would use again

This place is constantly a mess. Tables inside and outside, day or night are full of dirty cups and rubbish. All the rubbish outside is floating about and ends up in the wider area (outside the retail park). A company like this is happy to take the £££ but doesn't car about the environmental impact!
This Starbucks has the university vibe. The table at the back is great for study. Robayat there at the store was awesome to me. He did some cool cup artistry and gave me the cup. 🤩
I picked up a beautiful collectible mug with Snoopy on it ☀️❤️ to add to the other older one.  Thank you 👍😊.  I revisited today and they gave me another limited edition mug thank you Emma 🙏👍

Our favourite Starbucks location, we always enjoy visiting and our drinks are always well made even though wait times can be long on the weekends. Our only issue is that the sink in the disabled toilet has been leaking for months so the floor is always very wet and slippy!

Thank you to Emma for her outstanding customer service, for really giving my sister a boost that she really needed as she has been struggling this year. Thank you Emma - from myself and @shotbyrish xxx
For service with a smile and going that extra mile, come and see Emma at Starbucks selly oak you will not be disappointed xxxx

I am not happy with my experience in this store. I had ordered a flat white with oat milk and a member of staff. I believe her name is Sarah. She had used whole milk. I had witnessed this and asked her to remake it politely as I had requested oat milk. The response I got was "I did use oat milk". I insisted she made it again as I know what i saw, it was a blue labelled carton. I saw her roll her eyes and aggressively frothed my milk. It was a very unsatisfactory drink with unsatisfactory customer service. If you want customers at this store you need to treat them with kindness and respect. This lady clearly does not care about her job or the company and should find a job elsewhere if she hates customers so much.

Nicest Starbucks I've been in, some can be quite sterile but this is lovely with a warm atmosphere too. Sara in particular was lovely, so warm and welcoming with friendly banter as hospitality should be. Doing a grand job! Will be back soon!

Usually I’d let go as Starbucks no longer a specialty shop. But the Harborne branch has worsened its training quality of baristas. Rushing the order since taking to serve it so you end up spending the recently increased price for nonsense. Defensiveness and pettiness from both baristas and manager shouldn’t be kept, esp. in neighborhood area.

Amazing customer service, great warm atmosphere. The staff are brilliant, very attentive, very knowledgeable and make every effort to ensure that the drinks are on point. Fantastic customer service from Sreya, Leia, Chloe, Sara and all the team. Keep up the good work. The Karak Chai Guy :-)
Nice and large Starbucks in Harborne. Apparently used to be Halifax here. So formerly a bank. Starbucks WiFi is fine here. Near the end of the High Street close to Edgbaston border.

Like most Starbucks it’s clean tidy and well laid out. 5 stars to the staff for letting me borrow a charger for my phone (8%) it’s my own fault. Half expected the staff to be grumpy as I arrived 1 hour before closing, but they were helpful and accommodating. Food is good but not exciting so normal chain manufactured edibles.
Nice store, staff are friendly and full of suggestions. Good food and drink choice. Nice seating, plenty of plugs for laptops to work in there. Good location just by the tram line.

So cute!!!! I ordered from uber. They wrote my name on the bags, gave me a free chocolate coin and a cute little smiley face, telling me to enjoy the food :) I just came back from work and ordered from here. Lovely treat thank you! Really appreciate it.

I totally forgot to take a picture of my toastie and tea, but this Starbucks is roomy, and like that it has a choice of sofas or chairs. Birmingham university is not too far away so it does have quite a few students that come in and use the table spaces etc. But it's a good vibe.

Service was quick and staff were friendly and welcoming.
Spacious place nice coffee shop by the corner of five ways.  Very friendly and welcoming staff but seems not enough. Need one more staff at least!!
Lovely starbucks staff very friendly and helpful toilets facilities in cinema seating indoor only range of food and drinks available quick service

Weak coffee literally tastes like hot flavoured water with milk.
I don’t think that is worth £4.80.
Their coffee does nothing for you.
Service was so-so, the app didn't work. I didn't like the coffee very much. Not enough space and if there are 3-4 people you can't charge your phone or laptop.

Staff was kind, but said they don't serve filtered coffee in this branch. So I pointed out there is the machine for making filtered coffee right behind them. They said yes, but they just don't use it...
Had the worst experience here on a Friday evening. Wouldn’t feel comfortable to go again for coffee 😬 staff should be representing the company better.

Felt bad for the lad working there, I ordered on the app and the drive thru was closed when I got there 10 min later, bloke was alone inside with 3 people in a queue, his machine to get the orders from the app wouldn't work so I had to give it him again and wait. The food was warm but sausage sandwich was so so dry and a napkin would have been nice it was bloody messy considering it was a takeaway to eat on the road. Can't really blame the poor bloke who was working alone. As I left I saw another car drive up to the drive through, see it closed and leave. I won't go there again, whoever's operating the franchise is putting profits before their staffs welfare.

I had the most unpleasant encounter with this lady who works here, when we told her why we was here she threw the pen and book down on the table and ordered us to sign in, in the end I told told her to leave it. She then walked off and didn’t serve me and told her colleague to (Her colleague actually had people skills unlike her) I am extremely saddened by my experience here, good customer service is the least we deserve.

A very nice building with zero customers. I had a white Americano that tasted like off milk. I tried to drink it, but had to return it.
£3.40 at the till, and £3.35 on the board. There's a velvet pistachio coffee that'll set one back £7.
I'll use Greggs next time.

The three girls working this morning (24/08/25) were extremely helpful and lovely. When Justeat messed up our order they were so quick to sort it out for us which we really appreciated. Excellent customer service

Appalling counter service from Lewis and Stacy, staff attitude with no eye contact, no smile, just a cold entitled attitude prioritising drive thru. Asked to wait 2 mins which was 10 mins but payment was taken for 1 cortado and a cake. I said I am not waiting anymore and Stacy was cocky and patronising that she had a large order to fulfil yet I am not psychic and they should have communicated the wait time as it was about 8am and they should have enough staff. The most out of order part was being made to wait for refund by Stacy who said I would have to wait as she took an order out. Lewis refunded and I said the demeanor was rubbish and he said he referred to the machine doing the orders to which I said no my problem. He called me mate which annoyed me. Jumped up attitude and reported to HO as crap service.

It is pretty new place in a shopping area with a drive through. Clean and nice place. I have been few times here and it was never overcrowded as usually other Starbucks are. Quick service and lovely coffee. I had Oat milk pistachio latte with vegan cream. Yammy. Sorry, didn't take picture.

So I went and used my free drinks reward for a venti iced pumpkin spice latte, which I’ve had many times. The lady at the drive thru was a white lady. I’ve never had such an awful drink, the drink is filled with coffee ground pieces and all I can taste is them coffee grounds. Awful.
Visited today for the first time. All staff were friendly and attentive. Atmosphere was quiet- can't complain. Enjoyed our order. The new pistachio latte was nice, but a medium was a bit sickly.

Friday 18/04/25 we were pushed for time so went through drive through.
Mia(staff member)  got our order wrong, when we questioned it we were told to come in to get it corrected,  she didn't  apologise , she was moody & not very helpful in fact it seemed like we had put HER out not the other way round. Generally we go inside to get our orders. The staff are always very friendly. As stated at the beginning we went through drive through for speed, so as we didn’t have time to go in & we left. Got back to work to end up throwing the drinks as they weren’t very nice to drink.

customer service 0.
i live not far from this branch,i come here every day but no more ,this old lady’s is so rude,this is new branch and you need to change all staff otherwise you lose customer
A welcome stop for some food and a coffee. The EV chargers are very close. Toilets available on site.

I took my friend to this store for coffee as he came from London. When we got to the till a lady served us politely and she was well mannered, however, when we got to pick up our drinks a lady named Aaliyah was making the drinks and she seemed off and wasn’t bothered, put the drinks down, so, when I asked if it was the cappuccino she replied with “yeah” didn’t even look at us… we don’t expect a full on conversation but a simple “hello” or even just a smile is what customer service is about. Maybe give Aaliyah some customer service training. The cappuccino wasn’t as frothy as it’s meant to be but maybe that’s because the machine wasn’t working properly or she just didn’t want to make the drink properly. It’s almost like she had something against us. We don’t even know this person.

The place looked busy and the few tables that were empty had empty cups laying there until Jack was the person that cleaned all the tables and cleared our table also, he was also polite and showed standard customer service.

Jack good customer service
The till girl not sure her name but she had dark hair and slim built good customer service.
Aaliyah could do with customer service training.

The 2 stars are only given because of Jack and the till girl I couldn’t make out her name so sorry.

Been here many times over the last 5 years. Used to be quite good, but now they always seem to be out of stuff. Sometimes when ordering through the app they'll tell you something's out of stock, you'll make a second choice that goes through, then get told at the till that's not available either. I only still come here because I have a teenage daughter who's into all that kind of thing.

I get much better coffee at home anyway, so I usually try for matcha drinks here when available. If you turn up later than 9am on a weekday, you'll find a lot of the seating taken up by remote workers and their laptops, so I tend to aim for before then if I'm sitting in. There is a drive-thru which I'm yet to use.

We came to this coffee shop to try new drinks, my partner got served by a female staff that was unfriendly, miserable and almost throwing the drinks at us.
Also, I did ask politely if I could get a mop or kitchen roll as my partner dropped his drink, she answered abruptly, it will get sorted, they didn’t sort it. I would have been happy to do it myself. The shop was filthy and needs a good revamp.
Overall It really amazes me how some staff get the job in the first place! A smile and a thank you goes a long way

Very good coffee and the lemon muffin was fine. Very experienced and welcoming staff BUT, it’s not a relaxing place to be. Fortunately it’s a nice warm day, I’ve been here before on a cold day and I didn’t take my coat off.

Awful staff.
To start with, the girl at the till was on her phone when I arrived, we exchanged “hi”s, and so I started to say my order. This rude girl continued to play on her phone and had the audacity to look up after and say “I’m gonna need you to repeat your order”. I was mortified. You didn’t hear my order because you were messing about on your phone. Further more, they need staff that know how to make a caramel macchiato. Was given essentially an ice while mocha with caramel drizzle and CINNAMON on top? I don’t usually complain and as an ex-Starbucks employee, I respect the staff a lot but I had to complain this time and ask for my drink to be re-made. To top it all off, the lady that made my drink was training a new starter. Don’t think they should be implementing shitty service and incorrect drinks in their training program.

Large Starbucks with plenty of seating and the usual Starbucks drinks. This is a franchise though so you cannot use your Starbucks card. Staff are ok but do make you repeat your order several times. The lady in front of me nevertheless got the wrong drink so they had to make it again.
Ordered 4 different coffees and my venti matcha frappe has cubes of ice 👎👎👎

6.30 pm on Tuesday evening, I know the staff may have wanted to get off home but I think the service I was poor to say the least. Just had an ordinary coffee, there was no milk in the jug on the side to put in it he coffee.  Staff were too busy talking to notice that I was hovering waiting to catch their eye to ask one of the 3 staff on the bar ( only serving one other customer) so no excuse for not checking & filling up the milk jug, unfortunately I had to disturb their chat to get some. The cups were filled  up so much I couldn’t get hardly any milk in . The coffee was disgusting. The sandwich and small cake we had was however fresh and quite tasty. Not the best Starbucks experience I’ve ever had and in future I’ll give it a miss.

sandra is amazing!!! she honestly made our drinks with love and after not having the best experience with a previous staff member she completely rectified the issue and was so welcoming!! coming back for her!

I visited this Starbucks yesterday evening and had a very pleasant experience. The atmosphere was calm and comfortable, and the place felt clean and well organized.

The staff were polite and helpful, and I appreciated the friendly attitude during my visit. Overall, it was a nice place to spend some time, and I would visit again.

Terrible customer service. Alicia (The black apron) Made my drink. I told her how much I had in it. She ignores my regards and makes it to how she wants it. Way too sweet.     Such attitude giving, Like she didn't even want to work there.   Starbucks is customer focused but she just look like she just wants the pay.  Not actually the job itself.   Wouldn't recommend coming to this one, There are better Starbucks in surrounding locations.                  Go here if you don't want to be valued

I recently visited Starbucks and ordered my usual coffee and some food. I’m quite an anxious person, especially around people, so even simple things like paying can make me nervous. When I was entering my card pin, I somehow mistyped it two or three times, and I started to feel really embarrassed because there was a long queue behind me.

But one of the staff members. I believe her name was Afia, a lovely girl wearing a black scarf and black uniform was so kind and patient with me. She calmly told me, “It’s okay, take your time”When my card didn’t work the third time, I said I didn’t know what went wrong and was about to leave, but she said to me “It’s fine, it’s on us today.”
That small act of kindness honestly made my day. In a world where kindness feels rare, she showed genuine compassion and understanding when she didn’t have to. She could’ve easily just refused to serve me, but instead, she went out of her way to make sure I felt cared for.
After finishing my drink, I went back to thank her personally and wished her all the best in life. I truly pray she earns everything good happiness, success, and prosperity and a lot of money because she deserves it. God bless her. ❤️

Service was ok but no explanation of when a shortbread and toast would appear.Timing of drinks and food not good .Needs to improve.
What was concerning is the downstairs area was full of people charging their phone/ laptop and on their laptops.
Tables in front of them empty of Starbucks products.
Coffee was good as was food when it came.
We ordered vanilla cold coffee and strawberry shake. Both were awesome. A guy named “Ray” served us . He was lovely.

I don’t like to leave bad reviews but the behaviour from Hanah was very unnecessary and unprofessional. Hanah was incredibly rude, showing no effort to greet us or take our order. It was quite loud inside and she very quietly said hi so we weren’t sure if she was even talking to us. We started to order however she made no move to go towards the till so we felt we could not speak to her as she was possibly busy. She stared at us with a far from kind expression. When she did finally start taking our order, we felt rushed and ignored as she acknowledged nothing we said and then very rudely sighing. My friend did not get the chance to ask for oat milk as we were hurried along to wait at the end of the counter. My friend then quickly apologised and asked if they could make her drink with Oat milk possibly due to her intolerance. She was very apologetic that she had forgotten to ask but our drinks had not even started being made yet, Hana rudely picked up our order sticker and spoke to her unkindly, My drink was then made, there’s no complaint about the drink as it was good. However my friends drink came with no oat milk and regular whipped cream, when she questioned if it was made with oat milk as there was nothing to say oat on the sticker, Suraya and Hanah spoke about the order as if my friend was an inconvenience. My friend never spoke rudely or even showed any upset however received nothing but rudeness back. We understand the staff are busy but it does not give the right to be rude to your customers. My friend asked for the order to be remade as she couldn’t have the regular cream as well and it was once again made to be an inconvenience and they even questioned her on if she had tried it and liked it.

The music is chilled a nice jazzy vibe in the music ,service was wonderfull too i have allergys and i was treated with the upmost care by a wonderfull worker saul i appriate the polite care i was given and all with a smile !!

Visited Starbucks in the Bullring and the service was amazing, the young man who served me was a chap called Saul and I have to say he is a credit to the company, greeted with a smile, but he was the same with every customer he served, his personality was an absolute credit to him, keep up the good work young man and the world is your oyster 👍

Honestly makes my morning coming here , the team are so friendly , massive shout out to Jess the manager , so very kind , she has donated towards my grandsons memorial charity we do every year , she really is a beautiful kind soul , you are very lucky to have someone as amazing as her to work in your store.

We went at quite a busy time so queued for a bit before being served. But the staff were lovely and made our drinks fairly fast. Not loads of seating so we sat outside on the steps nearby. My iced matcha was really nice and well made.

Brilliant staff member named kristina very friendly, I noticed she made everyone’s drink quick and was receiving compliments for everyone she made so she definitely improved the experience,

I ordered a Frappuccino and my partner ordered an iced hot chocolate both tasted fantastic and fresh compared to some other busy places especially considering this is in a coach station you would think it was rushed etc but genuinely was not.

Would like to add she was working with another woman didn’t pick her name up but she wasn’t doing anything to be fair just writing things down even when It was 5 people in the line she just took their order and kristina made all the drinks and had the conversations

Would definitely recommend

This place was like a warm hug in the middle of my chaotic traveling day. The staff was S9 nice, Faz and Mary were the nicest and prepared my first PSL of the season. A mandatory stop from now on every trip to Birmingham

Faz voted as nice- defo not naughty so Starbucks make sure he gets recognition and reward - Served by farzad- early morning and yet still very happy and professional when serving me and others and happy to assist on recommendations . Premises super clean
Can't comment on food as I didn't eat on this occasion but the coffee was top notch and the service second to none. Really friendly staff and fast service. Will definitely be visiting again

Tay were absolutely wonderful – super friendly, helpful, and made me feel really welcome. The coffee was great as always, but their positive attitude made my visit extra special. Thank you both – I’ll definitely be coming back! 😊

I ordered a matcha latte and it was very sweet. I politely asked the staff if they could reduce the sweetness a little, as I don't usually drink it this sweet. A girl spoke loudly and rudely, saying she had made it exactly as I wanted. I tried to explain that it's my daily drink, but she just turned away dismissively and spoke ill of me to the staff. This is the first time I've had such a bad experience at Starbucks. I hope the management will review her attitude and improve the service here!
I ordered an oat shaken latte which was great! Was served by Jessie, she was lovely and so chatty! Gave me a great song recommendation too! Made my day :)
I was served by the lovely Saima! Super friendly, efficient & she made the drink to perfection! Just the sort of experience you want especially first thing in the morning!

I came in this afternoon and ordered my drink, i made a comment while ordering saying id like extra caramel and would even pay extra. When i got my drink there was less than i would usually get at any other starbucks. I asked the lady making my drink if she could add some more, the response back was with a lot of attitude and no friendly customer service at all. If she wasn’t able too that’s fine but i even offered to pay and was given a dirty look and she was very patronising. I’ve always had a good experience at starbucks but this put me off and i won’t be returning. Everything else was fine but customer service is horrendous in my opinion.

Nafi served me today at Starbucks and she was absolutely lovely. Very friendly, polite and patient, and she made the whole experience so much nicer. It’s always great to meet someone who genuinely cares about customer service. Thank you, Nafi.

I came in yesterday lunch time and i was met with horrible customer service. The woman who was making my order was glaring at me as if i was an inconvenience to her entire existence. She was rude and impatient. I shall not be returning regardless of how the product came out. I just won’t allow myself to be subjected to such disrespect.
Fire (use Too good to go app)

I stepped into Starbucks and immediately, the atmosphere felt like a warm embrace. The staff, wearing smiles as their uniform, made me feel like a cherished guest. From the very moment I walked in, I knew this was going to be a delightful experience.

Let me tell you about the Almond Croissant – a heavenly creation with a flaky crust that seemed to melt in my mouth. The almond cream filling was like a secret treasure, rich and velvety. This wasn't just a pastry; it was a work of art, carefully crafted to perfection.

But the surprises didn't stop there. The Banana Caramel Muffin was a symphony of flavors – sweet banana dancing with luscious caramel. And that topping? It wasn't just a topping; it was like a delicious crown, adding a crunch that was incredibly satisfying. Believe me, this treat is a journey you won't want to miss.

Then, there was the Blueberry Muffin – a burst of tangy and sweet berries in every bite. The sugar-crusted top was like a sweet secret waiting to be discovered with every mouthful. I couldn't help but close my eyes and savor the blissful moment.

The pain au Chocolat was a rendezvous with sophistication. With each bite, it was like I was transported to a charming French café. The fusion of flavors was like a dance of elegance and comfort in my mouth.

And let's not forget the Chocolate Twist – it was like a playful game of hide and seek with chocolate surprises. Every twist revealed a burst of cocoa goodness, and it was perfect for anyone with a love affair with chocolate.

So, here's my advice: plan a visit to Starbucks, indulge in these delightful creations, and then come back to thank me for introducing you to this world of taste and wonder. Your taste buds will thank you!
Gone to the best brand in town for a cool drink. A brain freeze moment.

Great experience in this coffee shop. I wasn't feeling great and I needed a sit down, rest wand a coffee. Staff in this Starbucks had been very helpful, especially Nicole who noticed I needed to sit down so she brought me the coffee to the table. Then she  went back and brought me a spoon as well. All with a smile . Thank you I needed this small act of kindness today . Very much appreciated L.V.
I came here for a drink the other day. I was served by a barista called Bhav and he was amazing. Great service and delicious coffee

A very clean and well lit Starbucks with one floor of seating, including chairs and sofas. Music was a bit loud so it was a little hard to concentrate on my book!

Accessible bathroom available. Slow service but this store was maybe understaffed. A nice location and easy to find. Not too busy during the week and could be my new go to Starbucks.

Visited on a Saturday and ordered to sit in. The cakes ordered were nice and tasted fresh as always. Ordered frappucino which lacked flavour but was drinkable. Latte was fine.

A big let down was the cleanliness. There were plenty of staff and unless they were asked to clean it was a mess. Felt uncomfortable to sit even thought we wiped our own place down, just didn't feel nice to know there was rubbish and sticky tables either side.
Staff were friendly. They’d run out of decaf so was unable to have a coffee so had to have a hot chocolate, noticed later that there was a Costa I could have gone to.

This is a lovely Starbucks located in The Fort shopping park. It's tidy, clean and has the usual things Starbucks normally has. The staff here are wonderfully helpful and friendly and really make it a great space to have a coffee and do an hour or so of work. Would recommend a visit.

I made a mobile order 1 out of 2 coffee's were made even before I even showed up. One of the coffee's were cold due to being made early. Second made one absolutely disgusting flavour wise. I mentioned that she forgot whipped cream her response was that she didn't even know what the order was or how it had to be made. After she added cream everything was over the top. Cups were messy. Worst experience I've received feel like I just spent money to be made feel bad. Not coming back
I tried the Matcha Latte, it was pretty decent. The flavour was quite strong. Overall, it was a good experience, staff were really nice too.

The person at the till was rude, and the cold coffee was nothing but just ice crushed and flavored with tiny amounts of milk and caramel. This was a waste of money. They should change the label into crushed ice and whatever flavor can be added. 4.45 pounds is a waste 🤦🤦🤦

I used this dining room twice what a joke the choice of food is a joke for a hospital facility it’s the worst Iv experienced even the lady’s who serve you are as dull as the food they just slop it on with out a care , it’s a crime to then to have to work Iv run many large restaurants my self I’m also a chef and if my staff looked as unhappy/ rude as they can well it would be bye and the food quality is a discrace bland ,people like my self who’s been hear visiting my hubby 5 weeks would love a good hearty meal at a great price ?? Need to look at other hospitals much better facilities on offer . Cleaning joke Iv watched a girl tonight clean every table and the tea & coffee area with the same cloth ???? And done some sort of mopping

Had a fab experience 2 day at this outlet,staff very welcoming it was busy & looked like the staff was enjoying there work,I had a large Americano & a hazelnut loaf my partner had chilled latte with caramel,the place looked very clean & toilets where spotless.
I'll definitely b back,thank U for your hospitality

Honestly lovely staff, and it’s clear that those complaining of experiencing bad service had been rude first or were acting entitled. I’ve never had a problem with staff and they’re always very helpful when I need extra time or advice on an order. However, I’ve experienced a fair share of being in line behind rude customers who lacked patience and looked down upon the staff, and the staff always handled them more politely than they deserved 🙂

I come to this Starbucks at least more than once a week and I can't say a bad word, every staff there is extremely welcoming and always happy to serve you. Very quick and helpful, honestly can't fault them for anything

This Starbucks is attached to a Sainsbury's and despite the very efficient, pleasant, hardworking staff  is an awful place to visit. It's design is dreadfully soulless, like a vehicle hanger,  the acoustics mean the level of noise can be intolerable and I never feel safe. I have witnessed people helping themselves to food and walk out, large groups of foreign men sitting and shouting at each other aggressively with no Starbucks  purchase in front of them.
I now avoid it and go to Costas.
Very good service and high quality food and drinks

I’ve never had any issues at this store! The staff are always polite and friendly, working when it’s busy to complete all orders. This is my local store so visit regularly at different times/days and have always received my drink just as I have asked.

What a Starbucks 🤪larger girl didn't greet me or seem to understand my order or how to communicate 🙃 she stood there with the gun thing in her hand without a word! The Asian/Chinese girl was so deep in conversation with her colleague that it took me twice to check for my luke warm drink 😙They all need customer training 😑

Jordan & Rueben both had great customer service towards me and my partner. Had a lovely conversation with them about the new pumpkin spice range as I’m a massive fan. Drinks were unreal!!! Thank you very much!

So usually I can’t fault Starbucks but you are possibly the worst one! Not only did you ignore me but you made my drink completely wrong! I asked for no cream and 2 extra shots of coffee and you gave me my drink with cream and just 2 shots instead of 6! I will not be coming back here again!
Regular customers but wanted to leave a review for Katie as she was so helpful and friendly! Went the extra mile with our order and she has great customer service skills!

The sausage bap was ok, but I preferred the Costa’s sausage bap more.

The Mango Dragonfruit refresher was nice, but the amount of ice they put in the drink so you get less of the actual drink is crazy. I had 1/3 full of ice left in the cup after finishing the drink. I would recommend asking for less ice as the drink would still be cold but it wouldn’t take up lots of your drink.
