The interior looked nice and drinks arrived fast.

This place is one of the best in Altrincham. The atmosphere is lovely, there’s always plenty of seating, and the staff are very friendly. What I appreciate the most is that it stays open late, unlike most other cafés in Altrincham that close much earlier.
Place was not busy and staff seemed deflated and rude. You need to have  the App to just want to sit there to drink a overpriced coffee. What a joke the world has become.

The team are always welcoming, friendly, and create such a positive atmosphere that makes each visit a delightful experience. The staff goes above and beyond to make you feel valued, always with a smile on their faces. Whether it's a busy morning or a quiet afternoon, they consistently deliver excellent service, ensuring that every customer feels appreciated. The drinks are always perfectly made, and the store is always clean and inviting. I truly appreciate their hard work and dedication. It's clear that the team genuinely cares about providing the best experience. Keep up the fantastic work, Starbucks team 👏

I felt Starbucks like a few other companies lost its way a few years ago when they became obsessed mobile app orders and pink frothy drinks. I tended to avoid it.
This particular shop has brought me back to the chain as it feels like Starbucks did ten+ years ago; when you’d get a warm welcome from staff, great coffee and a lovely clean tidy relaxing interior.

Dire non existent service.  2 saturday kids and 1 older girl. Utter chaos in a not-busy cafe. Wrong orders going out, food thrown across the counter to me, someone waiting 30 mins for a panini, girl with dark hair in ponytail was rude and surly to people. Boy serving was so slow it was like watching paint dry.  Mugs left on all tables, so told we had to have paper cups. No proper supervision or training - it was shocking. Think Ill stick with Cafe Nero or Costa Coffee in Sale, staff there are polite and professional!

Don't make the mistake of ordering from here you will regret it, cold food, late delivery times and terribly made coffee, can't even contact shop to ask why it's over an hour late because they hang up the line after they're fed up of it ringing. Abysmal service.

update today again, given a pound back as an hour wait for a panini which was cold. great cheers.delivery driver was sat waiting for staff to do the order for half of that hour aswell.. god knows whats going on between these companies but nowadays its like thirty quid for two coffees and two sandwiches so losing that money isnt anything to be sniffed at. staff really need either training properly or need better communication with delivery drivers.
Second visit in 7(  seven ) days no machine working 😢...so cannot rate.. unfortunately..was desperate for a brew too..

I used to love going to this store almost every day, but since they have loads of new staff it’s been awful!! Drinks are always wrong and delayed cos they forget it’s on the side, very blunt rude staff (David I think his name is, bad customer service all round from him) and just a bad experience every time I go now. Sad really, the old staff were lovely and service was fab.

Have been a few times now and love their pumpkin spiced latte. Definitely need some more gluten free options which are very limited. I also had to clear a table today as the three tables at the back had rubbish and used cups on them. There were about four members of staff so this wasn't great but five stars regardless as the place is lovely, staff friendly and drink delicious.

Though we enjoyed Christmas special coffee and cake.
The young lady serving was a little inpatient and did not really listen.
We were deciding what cake to have, and she just kept repeating herself.
Many tables were also dirty.
Loved that dogs were allowed though.

I got served by George today and received fantastic customer service.
I wanted to try the iced white chocolate caramel macchiato but I wasn't sure if I would like it.
George kindly offered to make me another drink if I didn't like it. The drink was very nice and needless to say, I didn't take him on his offer (and I wouldn't have, even if I did not enjoy it as it was my choice after all!).
However, it was very thoughtful that he wanted me to leave with a drink I'd enjoy.
I would return to this Starbucks just because of the outstanding service I receive.

Very modern looking Starbucks with high ceilings and lots of light. It would be nice to see a bit more colour, but does provide a nice calming environment.

The staff were welcoming and friendly, and although they were rushed, still took the time to apologies for the delay and made sure my order was OK. My drink was delicious as always.
Poor customer service. If you enjoy eating red hot toasties with your hands, with runny cheese going everywhere, come here!

Had a coffee latte which was same price as Costa but in a white mug which was nice touch. Unfortunately most of the tables were dirty I if I was not on my own would not have stayed. The room is ok very long and light but the chairs not very comfy. Great to have a shop open in the village but think I will go Costa for now

Great coffee and atmosphere!
Stopped by Starbucks today and had such a pleasant experience. The staff were really friendly and welcoming, and my drink was made perfectly — exactly how I like it. The place was clean, cozy, and had a nice vibe to relax or get some work done. Loved the aroma of fresh coffee and the calm background music. Definitely coming back for another cup soon!

Absolutely awful. It’s a Starbucks but it doesn’t take loyalty cards! ..the reasoning is because it’s a franchise - but it still says Starbucks on the door! The service is terrible, the coffee guy, Stephen, was  completely unhelpful and rude. Do not come here. Starbucks - you should be ashamed of yourself!
gave me a drink with dairy in when i specified i was vegan, i didn't realise until i went to a different starbucks and they informed me the drink i had previously got wasn't vegan and contains dairy

I don’t often review and would give this a Starbucks a 0 if it was an option. Extortionately expensive branch of Starbucks which should be avoided at all costs - I paid £8.50 more here for an order that should have cost around £18. Miserable service from staff that I assume have heard a barrage of angry complaints from many previous customers.
AVOID AT ALL COSTS

Dreadful experience. This Starbucks is ridiculously overpriced compared to a standard branch, and they don’t accept loyalty cards. The man serving us was rude and incredibly miserable. Avoid if you can.

The Portwood Store in Stockport is the best Starbucks in town. Julia is the most amazing artist and designs all the signs in store. The place is spotless and the coffees are amazing. The staff are just wonderful, very friendly and especially dog friendly to my pup Woody. Wouldn't go anywhere else!

I met Millie and Abi today as I visited this place for the first time. They were very friendly and professional. Great customer service. Coffee may taste the same Starbucks standard always good but I always go to Starbucks as people are great and it makes my morning start more enjoyable.
Thank you guys
Michael
Made coffee very quickly, delicious. I've had a blush of service. From minuses it is only that there is not enough space. But overall comfortable and convenient. Internet works fast

Amazing Abi! I've got food allergies and she was amazing, really helpful, answered all my questions, washed her hands, before serving, highlighted cross contamination risks, and explained everything. Brilliant experience thank you.

The girls at the village Starbucks are a real credit to the company what should have been a quick order of coffee turned into a pleasant transaction you rarely get today. it really brightened my day. Keep up the great service girls. If I unfortunately find myself back in Cheadle hopefully Claire Chloe and Millie will still be there ❤️

I’m so impressed by the customer care in this Starbucks. The staff are fantastic, especially Marge!, they are friendly, efficient and have given a lovely festive atmosphere complete with reindeer hats. After missing our train we feel really cheered up after coming in here. Thank you Starbucks at Stockport station!

For a shop at a station you'd expect quicker service, 3 blonde women on shift waited in line for 5 minutes all they did was talk to each other and the delivery driver who was delivering nothing. Rather a cold coffee than bad service. Don't reccomend, go across to Sainsbury's they have a Costa machine and it's cheaper
The staff are really helpful especially Faz and Marge. They helped me recover a metal water bottle that I left two days ago and I recovered it. Service with a smile. Thanks

Absolutely brilliant, love getting my coffee before the train. The team are always so smiley no matter what the time in the morning!
They always make sure my coffee comes before the train even if I leave it late they are so speedy and happy!
Top service!

Faz and Tom offer the most delightful service! They are super friendly and Faz always makes my drink spot on when I have many different requests it is never wrong and tastes amazing! Such great customer service a lovely Starbucks, I always revisit

Staff are always really friendly and willing to help at the till. Starbucks food isn't brilliant but that shouldn't reflect specifically on this branch as it's not their fault. Atmosphere is quiet and comfortable. If you're not happy with your drink they will remake it for you. I think the bathrooms could maybe do with being cleaned slightly more often but I understand how busy the staff are. Cake display always looks really clean and appealing and tables are regularly cleaned. We go here at least once a week as it's always a really pleasant visit.

A lovely new Starbucks in Merseyway. Huge! Lots of space to sit and relax with a coffee and watch the world go by or set up with your laptop for a days work!
Not the usual helpful staff though

Free WiFi and Starbucks do the best coffee!
Lovely staff, handled questions about allergens well. Good coffee and loads of seating inside.

It’s a nice space and everything’s good except they never have enough staff. Always just one making the drinks when it’s quite a busy spot so there’s always a queue waiting for drinks plus when you order a warm croissant by the time you get your drink it’s not warm. It also means nobody is making sure the tables are clear of rubbish too. Shame because it’s a lovely space and I felt sorry for the two staff on duty.

Wonderful new build shop with a vibrant atmosphere and cozy appearance.
The staff were very welcoming and keen to help wherever possible
Starbucks with a calm and pleasant ambience in Merseyway. Lots of comfortable seating available..but most of them are quite close to eachother so there may be lack of privacy if the pace is crowded!

Hectic…young lad could not take my order correctly! Maybe because he was on his own when the queue become longer and longer? 3 ladies making coffee so chatty, happy and everything just not helping young guy!  Next time instead laughing and enjoying your life you better help your colleagues with orders! Team work training is needed!

We order online like always for pick up I like a matcha frappe made with coconut milk because it gives it a sweeter taste, I’m not allergic in anyway! I always as for whipped cream on top I always get as are you sure as it’s dairy whipped cream and always reassure the staff I’m not allergic just enjoy the taste but today not sure what was up with person today but point blank refused to put cream on my drink even after I confirmed I’m not allergic but still refused and was very rude over it very disappointed

Our visit began on a positive note. The bearded gentleman who took our order was courteous, professional, and an example of how customer service should be conducted. Polite, attentive, and efficient—he deserves recognition.

Regrettably, the experience deteriorated the moment our order moved to the hands of the blonde woman behind the counter. Her attitude was not just indifferent—it was openly hostile. She made zero effort to acknowledge us, avoided all eye contact, and carried herself with an air of visible contempt. It was as though serving us was an inconvenience she could barely tolerate.

There was no basic courtesy—no "hello," no confirmation of the order, not even the most minimal attempt at politeness. Her demeanour was rude, disengaged, and entirely unprofessional. It was clear she had no interest in her role or in treating customers with respect.

Frankly, if someone cannot even muster the most fundamental standards of decency and service, they should  NOT be working in a customer-facing role. Behaviour like this not only reflects poorly on the individual but damages the reputation of the entire establishment.

A frustrating and needlessly unpleasant experience—one I hope management takes seriously and reaches out

BE CAREFUL, Euro car parks have taken over the parking, over 2 hours and you get a £100 fine, And yes All 3 of us were in Starbucks for 2 hour and 26 minutes.

Obviously its new and we didn't realise you had to pay after a certain time.

Went in to shelter from rain and decided to buy myself a gingerbread latte. As soon as I stepped in was pleasantly greeted by Paula one of the staff and she served me as well as having a nice conversation about just general things. I can’t exactly remember the other staff members name but I think it may have been nick. From what I saw he seemed to be new to the job but was doing very well and made my latte to a great standard. The atmosphere was very good a nice place to sit and do some work or just have a chat. Over all great.

Had a wonderful experience at the store, I went in with some requests, and the staff went way above and beyond to accommodate my needs. The café area was lovely and tidy, and the staff were super polite. Thank you for a positive experience!

Usual Starbucks, attached to and part of Sainsburys. Entrance via the shop or the road. Parking in the shopping centre. Too many dogs inside to be clean or comfortable. Barking and fighting! Had to clean our own table. Coffee was nice.

Just don't order through deliveroo. I've had problems almost every time Ive ordered but today was the last straw (although they remembered the straws this time) today I ordered 2 pumpkin spiced frappechinos with coffee, they both came with no coffee. I contacted deliveroo who said they would get them to resend the drinks. The replacements came, again with no coffee, but this time they were bright orange so they had obviously just put loads of the pumpkin sauce in. I won't bother ever ordering from here again.

Seems to have lost that customer service that I was used to. Always had a great experience,but recently the service is very poor and they don't seem to care. Place your order and then wait,wait and wait again for your coffee to appear. Perhaps time to move on!

I ordered an iced green tea lemonade, but the staff didn’t even repeat my order back to me. I noticed the staff looked a bit confused while making the drink, but at the time I didn’t think it was related to my order.

After I got my drink and had been drinking it for a while, I started to notice a strange minty taste. When I checked again, I realized they had made me a Mint Blend Tea instead. I had never even heard of that drink before, but that was funny tho.

They gave me the wrong drink and wouldn't listen when respectfully approached.

I asked for the chocolate mousse latte and was given some nutty toffee kind of drink. Politely approached the staff expressing the issue and was shut down completely. They wouldn't listen, and said 'that's just the drink'. I have had my order several times and knew this isn't what I asked for.
Disappointed with the staff and their customer service.
My favorite spot for a perfect coffee. The atmosphere is always chill, and the barista was super friendly. The Pumpkin Spice Latte this fall is amazing!

Unfortunate experience, the label machine broke whilst making the drinks. But rather than communicating this and checking everyone had their drinks they just waited till people got frustrated. When I highlighted I'd been waiting a while they then took my order but got it incorrect and I'd been waiting over 20mins. Its not good customer service to not be aware of people waiting or just communicating there had been a problem. Needs to consider being more aware of the over way the service is running. Then making the correct drink when your under pressure.

What happened to Starbucks?  I first came across the brand in its early days in Vancouver. It was a taste sensation. Sadly, now its automatically making coffee (little or no barrista involvement). The taste of the coffees is terrible but the prices are sky high. A McDonald's flat white is much better than most hot drinks from most Starbucks outlets. Tragic. Caffe Nero is now the best tasting coffee.  PULL UP YOUR SOCKS!

Starbucks on Barton Dock Road is one of my favourite Starbucks locations. They’re open 24/7, with the café open until 10 pm (slightly later on weekends), giving it great late-night coffee vibes. The location is great — it’s just outside the Trafford Centre and a stone’s throw away from Trafford Palazzo Metrolink, as well as Asda and Costco. This location has a drive-thru and parking right outside too.

I’ve been a regular here for some time now, and despite being a really busy store with lots of staff, the baristas are friendly and make an effort to provide the best possible service, and actually seem happy to be there and take the time to get to know customers.

The interior is modern and comfortable, and I always manage to find a seat. They have plenty of plug sockets too, which is handy.

Drinks are usually made to a great quality, and the stock of seasonal beverages is also great — they seem to last longer than at other locations. My favourite drinks at the moment here are the Iced Pumpkin Spice Latte, Iced Cinnamon Dolce Latte and Iced White Mocha.

The only negatives about this store are small — I do find it to be slightly more expensive than other Starbucks stores, mainly the ones in the city centre, which I do find a little strange as this is a corporate-owned store. I also think the tables could be cleaned more frequently, but again, as they get so busy, I can understand them not always having time to do so.

Huge shout-out to Tati and the entire Starbucks team! Every visit is such a pleasant experience — the drinks are spot-on, the service is quick, and the friendly energy from everyone makes the day better. You can tell they genuinely care about their customers. Thanks for always going above and beyond!

You go to Starbucks for the coffee, that’s a certainty, but when I went today for my coffee I wasn’t expecting the atrocious service I got at the drive-thru window. My order was taken fine but there was a young broccoli haired lad at the window who had absolutely ZERO time for me, me muttered the price, and when I said “sorry?” He rolled his eyes and turned his back to me, left me for maybe 10 seconds and then turned around to tell me the price again, I paid, thanked him and he just vacantly turned away from me, nothing else from him.
Really rude.
I never had such a bad coffee. Unflavored coffee staff looks really bored. Not even welcoming with a smile. Really bad for the price that they charge.

There were loads of staff on, just left us standing there with no greeting or apologies to say the tills were down. After a while someone came over and logged onto the other till and then walked off. We still hadn't been greeted at this point. Eventually, another member of staff came over, logged on and was busy trying to get someone else to take over the till.
Once they'd sorted that out in front of us (still with no acknowledgement) we were finally greeted and our orders taken. We were unprofessionally told they couldn't scan our card for points.
Once our order had arrived the syrup was missing from a mediocre drink and part of the order forgotten about and all served in take out cups and bags. There was no ambience, no music on (just loud machines in the background) and the Aircon on in the middle of winter 🥶
All in all a horrible experience and a waste of £20. We left quickly. Disappointed.

Starbucks provides a relaxing and premium vibe.
The coffee is smooth and well balanced.
There are plenty of options for hot and cold beverages.
The seating arrangement is comfortable.
It’s an ideal place to study or unwind.
Staff members are welcoming and helpful.
The overall environment feels calm and cozy.
A nice place to spend quality time.

Really busy but quick service, drink made perfectly. There was one young lady with long dark hair in a ponytail and lots of smiles. She took my order and helped all the rest of the staff. If everyone worked as hard as she does, with that level of customer service the world would the a much nicer place.
Tables were a mess, staff were cheeky, abrupt and rude as hell. Even got an eye roll when asked between two drinks which was more "fruity".

Last time I come here. Service is always awkward or rushed. They always charge me when I bring my own cup! The macchiato tasted like nothing but milk, there was an off taste to it, that made me feel sick throughout the day. Over £5 for a grande drink that I couldnt even finish? Waste of money. It's gone so bad this store, its never clean either.

I came today 5 May 2025 for an oat cappuccino and the lady that served me , I think her name was Lenka or something like that, she was so rude and serious at the till . No smiling at all and with a bad face . Terrible service. The guy that passed me the drink it was really nice to me , with glasses .

A first rate Starbucks. Great coffee and great service. Clean, tidy and efficient.
Staff are really helpful and can't do enough for you.
A special shout out to Jane, who goes the extra mile and always makes our visits extra special.

So the coffee was nice but the staff was rude with no manners at all

The serving station was dirty , the toilets looked like they are flooded and within the time of me being in the store sat down drinking my coffee not once I seen someone come round cleaning tables of cups and wiping them down and it wasn’t busy too

It’s a little bit embarrassing they can’t even do the daily checks !!!
We come here basically once every week. This has been our usual place to come for a coffee since. Service has been always great, coffee has been tasty. Nice environment too, definitely recommend

Clean, comfortable, modern, very user friendly, eat in, take away, drive through- peaceful relaxing atmosphere , helpful attentive  friendly staff,foods beautifully displayed making choices easier - great food, great coffee. Highly recommend it.

Excellent service. The staff were amazing and went over and above to make sure we had exactly what we wanted and made us feel welcome. This was more than generally expected from a non-independant coffee shop.
It was clean and had a really fresh feel to it. It was spacious and felt comfortable at the same time. Frinks were delicious.
Will be visiting again when we go to the Trafford Centre.

I've been coming here on off for 4 years. Recently the flat whites have changed. When you ask them to rectify they get very annoyed. You can tell because the tone comes across wrong and the body language gives it away. When you get the rectified version its the same shitty one. As to say 'I had it right the first time'. Starbucks is going to have the same fate as costa if it continues this way. This is the reason many people stopped going to Costa because the staff couldn't make a decent cup of coffee.

I always enjoy visiting this Starbucks. Dory consistently provides outstanding service, she’s friendly, professional, and makes every visit special. Alouise is also great and very welcoming. Their positive attitude is the reason I keep coming back!

Lovely store, clean and well stocked. Lium and david made a great coffee with an outstanding friendly service, they went that extra mile by helping me organize what I had to carry out  of store, and recommended some cakes too.

Andrian amazing customer service so polite professional the manager needs to give this man recognition for his polite approach charming customer service rapport build is out of this world I love this guy please GIVE HIM A PAY RRISE AN BONUS

Clean, spacious, comfy seats (if a little low for oldies like me), great coffee and chilled vibe. Friendly,  professional staff. Toilet facilities. Parking at rear. I was on a first date and it went well ☺️🤞🥰😍.
One of the nicest teams of staff, I come here regularly to do work on my laptop and always manage to get a space. Very friendly atmosphere and good music!

Just arrived with my family for a Sunday morning coffee and pastry to find none of the doors are open and the member of staff is signalling it opens at 10am . After double checking the website that states it opens at 9:30am the member of staff didn't budge. Extremely disappointing as we are regular Starbucks customers. Clearly somebody was running late and now the customers suffer, very unprofessional, it was raining to just to top it off.

Lovely place! I visited this Starbucks franchise for the first time and had such a great experience. I have a dairy allergy, and the lady who served me (she was wearing a black hijab—unfortunately I didn’t catch her name) was incredibly cautious and attentive while preparing my drinks. She was very focused and made sure everything was safe for me.
She also asked if I was using the Starbucks app, and when I told her I wasn’t familiar with it, she kindly guided me through downloading it and explained how to use it. I was there with a baby buggy, so she thoughtfully put my drinks in a bag to make them easier to carry and even opened the door for me on my way out.
She was extremely kind. This place truly made me feel welcomed and cared for. A very happy place, highly recommend!

This is the worst Starbucks I have even been to but unfortunately the nearest one to where I am located. The staff couldn't care less. They seem to be here as part of their punishment or something, they're so bad. You ask them for a stag in coffee and they give you a take away cup, you ask them (the girl wearing a scarf) how much something costs and they mumble and you don't know how much you're paying until you see it on the till. I thought the one wearing a scarf was the worst as she doesn't speak English and doesn't understand you but they're all the same. They don't give a heck about anyone and anything. The americano I got today was so bad and disgusting that it was impossible to imagine. I wonder if they would be happy if they were served and treated like this and if they would be satisfied with the quality of their drinks. Never again.

Great place for a nice peaceful break. I come here with my daughter when she has chemotherapy. Coffee is lovely and assistants are always polite and friendly. I left my phone here the first time and we ran from the hospital to find it and the assistants had kept it safe for me. Such nice staff. I highly recommend coming here for coffee.

I have food allergies, and the staff really took their time to make sure the food was suitable for me. They were extremely helpful and very friendly about it.

It's very close to Manchester Hospital, so it's in a really great spot if you are there for a visit. Looks really lovely inside, a very relaxed atmosphere.

I came today 2nd July at 9:30 morning I orderd ice late with mocha sauce the guy with glasses blonde hair told me that you guys increased the price which is £5.37 I order from this cafe 2months ago everyday for £4.70 !! Which is suspicious even the size is regular size! !

Starbucks offers a relaxing café experience.
The coffee is rich and well-prepared.
Wide variety of drinks available.
Great place to sit and chill.
Ambience is calm and cozy.
A nice spot for coffee lovers.
So full got it back to work and coffee came out of the top, took the lid off and it was dangerously hot. Luckily I didn’t get burnt. Be warned

Hello,
Whilst the cappuccino was ok, the large automatic sliding doors were constantly opening when people walked past making the coffee shop very cold and uncomfortable.
Don't expect a cosy warm atmosphere here.
Less of an issue in the summer months of course.
The staff did not say please or thank you, behaving more like robots?
Not likely to visit this coffee shop again, but you may have a better experience than I did.
Kindest regards,
Chris
wow! staff are so friendly and attentive. the best chai latte

Rude member of staff Grace. I asked for a green tea. This came with a large mug of tepid water. There was too much water for the T bag. I asked for water to be taken out she said it wont make any difference. She then offered a T bag which she through across the counter. Not coming back here. Left the drinks as they are.

All staff are lovely and polite whenever I go in. Although, the drink quality can be hit and miss! Sitting in mugs are never filled right up to the top and the cappuccinos are made far too dry. I asked for blonde roast and the drink was made with the regular espresso roast.

New Starbucks. Nice interior. Massive area. Parking. A lot of new products for me. Big screens on the walls behind the tills with beautiful video promotions. Creme brulee(love it). I was at 9.30 pm on Thursday and it was empty. But it is a new place and they opened it just a couple weeks ago. Great team. Very friendly staff. A lot of sitting places. I believe this place will soon become very popular. Recommended for family events.
Clean inside with plenty of seating and spread out so you're not squashed in. Large carpark and decent drive thru. Staff friendly and helpful
Love this new(ish) Starbucks! My go-to every Friday morning at 6am on the way to BNI Masters in Stalybridge

I ordered a cookie frappe and a ice water stood waiting for 15 minutes for a drink. Girl who must of worked there but wasn't on shift was moaning about her drink and he boyfriends and there sorted it straight away while am still stood waiting.
Young lad with blonde hair was so nice. The blonde hair woman Ella who I guess was the manager on shift, looked like couldn't care less rude, and the tone she had to staff especially to the blonde lad the tone of telling him to serve on till!
He was honestly so nice I can't think of his name but the name Dylan comes to mind am not sure

I visited today and it was great experience. I met Nikki,Anna and Wendy. Fantastic customer service, definitely made my morning better...
Thx guys
Michael

Updated review 19dec 2024 ordered a fudge brownie iced chocolate today and to be disappointed would be a understatement,no chocolate whip cream no chocolate sprinkles it was just a milkshake with ice very unsatisfied,had better luck at McDonald's getting a milkshake and the price I paid for my milkshake with ice was terrible had to buy a croissant and some red velvet cake just to build up the carbs my milkshake lacked. Thumbs 👎🏽 for me
Many thanks for being able to stay in and keep warm after we had finished our drinks whilst waiting for the RAC. It was freezing outside. So grateful for the friendly staff.
Very approachable and great service , staff so friendly especially Wendy keep up the work Wendy

Asked for a drink and described the drink, but because I didn't know the exact name of it was told by Charlotte and Danielle who were busy eating behind the counter "we do loads of drinks" then after pointing at the machine they said, oh you mean a frappucino.
Tables sticky and grubby despite no other customers.
Crumbs and dirt on back of counters

Im leaving this review for Bisilia and not the Company! She was very good at hospitality she asked me if I want some tap water whilst I asked if I can wait for my Uber. Definitely give her a tip if she serves you.

Humayra was friendly and efficient when serving me. Didn’t catch the names of the two colleagues also on shift (blonde lady and brunette lad with long hair) but it was lovely seeing people having fun on a busy shift whilst also getting things done

On questioning the preparation of Tiramisu Iced Latte, Taka very patiently explained me how they prepare it and helped me customize the drink according to my taste and preference. Thankful to his service and warm help :)

I stop by here all the time when I’m travelling and the service and coffee is always great. Anna who served me was very friendly and offered great service. Coffee came very quick and was delicious :)))

Incredibly rude staff especially “TY” and an Asian young female. Poor, aggressive attitude throughout the whole transaction. Points are also not taken at this branch. Ordered a large Frappuccino and given a medium drink, when queried all I got was attitude from the Asian female and no resolution. All the other low reviews also state the same about the staff attitude . A lot of attitude for baristas!

This is a nice coffee shop which is away from the main drag. I like it because it is quiet and I can read and study whilst enjoying the coffee.  It seems popular with students busily studying and casualties of the hedonism of the village needing to recharge their batteries.

(Detailed review below)
🍽️ Food/drinks ⭐⭐⭐⭐
♿ Accessibility ⭐⭐⭐⭐
🪴 Atmosphere ⭐⭐⭐
💲 Cost ⭐⭐⭐
🧑🏽‍💼 Service ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

This is a new branch and the location is good and handy. It's your typical Starbucks store with your usual food/drinks. Service was friendly and fast.

♿ From outside street pavement to inside, the floors are all even. It's wheelchair friendly and the layout inside is spread out enough for easy navigation.

🪴 The general vibe is casual and chilled. Quite a number of young adults working away on their laptops. A range of chairs; bar stools, standard, and low comfy sofa types. It's quite stark though with lots of hard surfaces so acoustic isn't great for chatting. Not as cosy as other branches.

Stopped by this Starbucks with the kids during the day. It was pretty quiet and spacious, although a tad on the pricey side. Would've been nice if they wiped the tables after customers left, but overall, the atmosphere was pleasant and I was able to get some work done comfortably.

Came in for a quick drink to take away whilst exploring Manchester.
The staff were honestly really rude. Snappy, unfriendly and couldn’t be less bothered to be there which was very noticeable.
The drinks were very nice and we would have them again.
It's colder inside than outside, which is quite impressive given it's November. Turn the aircon down ! If you want the laptop all day-ers to go away, just speak to them instead
This Starbucks is quite spacious and in a good location. The drinks are usually decent here.

This was honestly one of the worst experiences I’ve had in a long time. From the moment I walked in, there was a clear lack of basic human interaction. I politely asked to use the bathroom and even offered to leave my card as a guarantee, but I was told no and that I had to order first. That alone already felt unnecessary and unwelcoming.

After placing the order, the wrong drink was made, and instead of handling the situation with care, the staff member tried to move cups around in a way that felt careless and unhygienic. What made everything worse was the attitude — the look and body language clearly gave the impression of “I don’t care, you’re not welcome,” which is something no customer should ever feel.

Customer service here really needs serious improvement. Everyone can have a bad day, but professionalism, respect, and basic kindness should never be missing. Sadly, this visit left a very negative impression.
Need the toilet C1346 turn to the left. Wouldn’t let me use the toilet unless I purchased something. So swivel.

This is a fairly large Starbucks located at City Tower. For such a central location, it was surprisingly quiet when I visited. There's a nice contemporary, spacious and airy feel to this branch. I was served fairly quickly, and able to find a seat. Most of the seating areas have a plug nearby. You'll find your own space here, and feel like you can enjoy your time. Ideal place to grab a coffee and use your laptop for work etc.

The coffee was good, but the tall size cups were too large for us and we couldn't finish it, and there were no other options smaller than that. We ordered 2 lattes and one croissant for the amount of £8.

I come every day and this place is getting worse and worse.

There is a tall blonde, young lady who is very helpful and the manager seems quite good too.

But it’s often completely random staff nowadays and they don’t process the internet order until you get there and complain. They also don’t clean the tables. Too many times every table has rubbish on it

Clearly have staff issues that has seen the service here go off a cliff.

There were 3 people working behind the counter. 1 taking orders not sure what the other 2 was doing. Nothing just standing talking waiting for a order to make but honestly the place was a mess. I actually said it out loud enough for the staff to hear so they got the idea  Nearly every table had stuff that needed clearing up even the 1s u don't see until u go past the counter or to the toilet.
Look at the pictures nobody sat at the tables but things that a member of staff should've cleared away.

I had a very disappointing experience today. I came to Starbucks to have breakfast, drink my coffee, and work on my laptop. Just after sitting down, I was asked to leave, along with other customers, and my order was packed “to go.” I was told I could continue my work at another Starbucks nearby.

However, when I arrived there, the staff told me I had to place a new order if I wanted to stay. This felt unfair and disrespectful, especially after being moved from the first location. Not the level of service I expect from Starbucks.

I was craving for my favourite morning coffee from Starbucks which is "Extra Hot Oat Milk Latte with 2 Pumps of Hazelnut" for £4. So, decided to stop by at this place. This Starbucks has sitting area at the front and also at the back. Very nice, ample of sitting space. Sharing some pics.

This place looks completely abandoned! Basically there is nowhere to sit because obviously no one is actually cleaning the tables! 5 people work behind the till however no one cleans the tables! I think they only care about the home deliveries! My banana bread also look like 4 days old!

Starbucks on Mount Street is in a great location within the city, opposite Manchester Central Library and the Midland Hotel, serving St Peter’s Square. This is a nice Starbucks location, which can get pretty busy.

The interior is comfortable and modern, although it can feel a little cramped during busy periods due to the large communal sofa, small tables, and how the queuing can go around the tables.

This location has been open on Christmas Day for the past couple of years, making it a reliable stop to grab a coffee during the festive season. My most recent visit came on Christmas Day, and I ordered an Iced Chocolatey Mousse Latte. Considering how busy the store was, my drink was made in good time and up to a good standard. I like how they still took care to prepare the drink to a good standard rather than falling to the pressure of being busy.

I do find it to be a little expensive here, but this is generally true for most corporate-owned Starbucks stores. Following their recent price rises, £7.15 for a Large version of their festive drinks just seems outrageous. I also find it frustrating that they close at 8 pm, as I like having coffee later into the evening. When the store was open later, they tended to be busy, so I’m confused by this change.

Overall, this is a nice Starbucks location, with generally good standards of service and beverage quality, although overall comfort in busy periods, pricing and their opening hours could be improved.

staff member was so sweet!! (sadly don’t know his name), but he made my and my bfs drinks perfectly! and on top of that he gave us the most wholesome compliment ever and really made our day, Thanks a lot!! Manager needs to see this and reward him😭 ( he wears a a black hat with ears ) x

I visited the Starbucks at Television House in Manchester and really liked the place. It’s in a convenient city centre location, easy to reach and perfect for a quick coffee break or to relax for a while. The café was clean, comfortable, and well-maintained. Staff were friendly and polite, and my order was served quickly.

The atmosphere was pleasant — nice background music, good lighting, and a calm vibe even though it’s usually quite busy during rush hours. There’s free Wi-Fi and enough seating for short stays, though it can get crowded at times.

Overall, a nice spot for a coffee in the heart of Manchester. I’d rate it 4 out of 5 for its service, cleanliness, and location.

At 1.30 pm today, I came in to order a cold brew as I was in a HURRY! & I thought it was a quick and easy one. BUT staff made drinks + a sandwich for '' 3 people '' who came  after me. Check your CCTV
How would you feel if this happened to you? Acceptable? Cheers

Great Starbucks that will often find itself packed due to its proximity to St Peter’s Square. Sugar and serviette counter often has used mugs and cutlery on the side, which is understandable when it’s super busy. Interior design is modern and bright

Visited this branch when we stayed in Manchester.

Not very impressed with the cleanliness of the store, nor the service. They're lacking a customer toilet, and the staff will direct you to use the closest McDonald's (don't).

Coffee to takeaway was okay, but I was served in a rush, and customer service is missing from this particular store.

New to this store and twice I’ve been recently and both times the staff have been amazing, definitely my favourite Starbucks in Manchester due to the service and friendliness of the staff. Second time they went above what was necessary with the Puppachino for my Labrador and we both can’t thank them enough.

Great Starbucks to visit if you want to stand waiting for your food to be put in the oven while the staff send text messages. Staff also like to have loud conversations slating other colleagues in their absence. Whilst the service was poor it was certainly entertaining listening to you talk about a certain staff members 'disgusting drinks' who 'doesn't have a clue what she's doing', whilst I sat and drank my very, below par, iced drink
Nice 👍🏻
Daria and Sobia are very welcoming and kind staff memebers. Very nice atmosphere

The app showed the store closing at 8:30 pm, so I placed my order at 7:59 pm. When I arrived, the store was already closed, although staff were still inside.

When I asked an older staff member what could be done, he responded very rudely, saying “We close” and “No,” and walked away. Another staff member was polite and helped prepare the order. However, the older staff member then appeared angry and behaved aggressively towards me.

I understand this may have been an app error and was happy to cancel the order, but the service attitude was unacceptable.

Fuming just paid over £6.00 for a toffee nut latte which I wait all year to have as it’s my fav drink !!
What I got was a latte with cream and a few sprinkles on the top no syrup no toffee but syrup!
I am raging because of the price you pay for these !! Won’t be getting my service again! The big girl that done my coffee was more interested in looking at everyone rather than paying any attention to what she was doing! Starbucks you have gone right down in my opinion and won’t be spending any more of my hard earned cash for nothing but a basic latte !!!

On my recent visit to your Arndale Store, I was having a difficult day and decided to treat myself to a coffee to help lift my spirits. It was only after leaving the store and returning to work that I noticed a handwritten message on the side of my cup that read, "Have a lovely day ❤️".

​This small, thoughtful gesture lifted my mood and gave me the positive energy I needed to continue with my day. It is a wonderful example of how a caring and genuine attitude can truly make a difference in someone's life.

​Please extend my sincere thanks to this colleague. They are a valuable asset to your team and a true credit to the Starbucks brand.

​Sincerely,
Michael Foley

Today I have been there in the morning with my friend which was her first time of visiting Manchester and the lady who served us , “NADIA” on her shirt tag , had lack of communication and hospitality , and she was rolling her eyes over her head when we asked to pay separately .
This is out of Starbucks service.
Hopefully they learn how to do the job or leave,  so the people who are craving for this position ,take it .
Great staff, friendly and polite. Incredibly welcoming atmosphere. Staff here are what all caffès should aspire to.

I was in the area for work for 2 days and went to get a coffee and get a bit of work done in here. First day I spent maybe 3 hours sorting my emails and what I've seen here was bleak. The baristas making fun of every passing customer, talking behind their back, mimicking them, even a disabled person— making fun of how they talk and walk. It was incredible. I went to get my coffee today and the same baristas, incredibly rude and giving forced labor vibes. Will never be back to this branch. Terrible service.

Had a catch up with an old friend and was very impressed with the staff atmosphere and products!

Special mention to Chris Megson who went above and beyond 🫡

From a person who basically gets Starbucks every other day, I definitely wouldn't visit this place despite it being 2 mins away from my house.

Ordered an "Iced Brown Sugar Oat Shaken Espresso with less ice and hazelnuts syrup" – my standard order ever since Oat shaken Espresso was introduced a few years back.

The barista messed up the order, putting too much ice in it. I did contemplate asking them about it as I'm not that confrontational, and even walked back briefly.

But since it was a cold December day, I politely reminded them that it had too much ice in it while the order mentioned little ice in it.

The Barista to my shock was very much annoyed with this simple request and just poured my coffee into a new cup and gave it back to me. Which wasn't even half the size of the "Tall Drink" that I ordered. (minus the syrup which stayed in the old cup).

I mean, the whole point of ordering oat shaken Espresso is that it's shaken and not mixed like a bad looking cold Nescafe. Forcing myself, I asked them again if this is what I'd be getting. The annoyed barista, snapped back saying this is what I get for ordering without ice. And if I wanted more I should've ordered with ice.

Yeah cool, if I wanted that attitude and this drink, I would've made myself a Nescafe at home. I just don't understand how every other Starbucks has been making it right for the past 3 years.

I mean if this can be called a "Tall Oat 'Shaken' Espresso", what's stopping us from calling the earth flat huh? :) It was 5 pm on a Saturday so, it wasn't even a busy time. (Maybe for Bunny's next door but definitely not here.)

Large spacious cafe, food and drinks were lovely but the facilities were filthy! Considering It was early Sunday morning so only just opened the disabled toilet was disgusting and out of toilet roll, the tables had dried on drinks, chewing gum stuck on wall and the chairs had seen much better days and were so grimy they had grown their own upholstery.
Most of the stuff are aggressive ! They did not attention what’s your order exactly when you asking them is not main the getting angry ! Is not good at all.

I am currently in this Starbucks. Eileen noted the interaction between me and my daughter as she was having a tricky morning. She took the time to chat to me after daughter left, and gave me vouchers for 2 drinks so we could get a drink together in future. I normally try to use independent cafes as I finds chains impersonal. However this interaction has completely changed my opinion. This kind and personal touch has completely changed my day. Many thanks to Eileen.

A really nice instalment of a well known chain of cafe. The staff were all really friendly and welcoming and the inside was very clean. There is plenty of seating throughout as well, one of the nicest Starbucks that I have been to.

3 stars means ok. I ordered the mango dragonfruit refresher, but they don't have dragonfruit. So they replace dragonfruit with strawberry. I gave it a try, and it tastes alright. The customer service representative is very nice. If I don't like the mango strawberry combination,  she will make another one for me. That is very good customer service.

Pumpkin 🎃 cold brew was gorgeous, staff were very nice, this time the WiFi was working which was great! Lots of space and I bought an amazing gold cup even though it was like £20 it was so cool tho!!! ❤❤❤

If you have to ask the barista to make it properly before you order your drink then there is something seriously wrong!! I think they just pour everything in hoping for the best. Please train your staff.

Perfect start to the morning at the Piccadilly Station Starbucks (2nd floor). My drink was spot-on—just the taste and temp I needed. Despite the rush, I was served lightning fast, and the lady in the black apron was super helpful. 5 stars!

I recently visited the Starbucks on Piccadilly station, and it was a delightful experience! The atmosphere was warm and inviting, perfect for relaxing or getting some work done. The staff was incredibly friendly and attentive, making my visit even more enjoyable.

The seating area was clean and well-maintained, and I loved that there were both cozy corners and communal tables. Overall, this Starbucks exceeded my expectations, and I can't wait to return for another coffee break!

The best place to grab your morning fix!!
The staff here make this branch what it is with their energy and efficient service and of course with a beautiful smile and a quick catch up!

Thanks Amy, Alex & co for the great service!
See you tomorrow :)

I have Ruby at the Starbucks at Manchester Piccadilly station to always manages make the effort to be friendly and chatty, even in the busy times. She is always smiling and makes everyone feel welcome. Her fellow staff are members are also lovely and Alex always makes the Starbucks experience great too.

Nestled within the bustling corridors of Manchester Piccadilly Station, Starbucks offers weary travelers and bustling commuters alike a welcome respite amidst the hustle and bustle. My recent visit to this location left a lasting impression, blending convenience with the comforting aroma of freshly brewed coffee.

Upon entering, I was greeted by the familiar sights and sounds characteristic of Starbucks. However, what truly set this experience apart was the warmth exuded by the staff. Despite a bit of a wait due to the rush-hour influx, the baristas remained attentive and accommodating, ensuring that each patron felt valued and appreciated.

As I savored my meticulously crafted beverage, I couldn't help but admire the efficiency with which the staff managed the steady stream of orders. Despite the evident demand, they maintained a level of professionalism that spoke volumes about their dedication to customer satisfaction.

While the wait was admittedly longer than anticipated, it was a testament to the popularity of this particular Starbucks location. Nevertheless, the amiable demeanor of the staff transformed what could have been a mundane wait into an opportunity for pleasant conversation and camaraderie amongst fellow patrons.

The ambiance of the establishment itself was inviting, with ample seating options allowing for both solitude and socialization. Whether seeking a quiet corner to catch up on emails or a communal table to engage in lively conversation, Starbucks at Manchester Piccadilly Station catered to all preferences.

In addition to their signature beverages, the menu boasted an array of delectable treats, perfect for fueling up before a long journey or indulging in a well-deserved treat. From decadent pastries to wholesome snacks, there was something to satisfy every craving.

Overall, my experience at Starbucks Manchester Piccadilly Station was nothing short of delightful. Despite the slight inconvenience of a longer wait, the exceptional service and inviting atmosphere more than compensated for any minor inconvenience. Whether passing through or seeking a moment of reprieve amidst the chaos of travel, this Starbucks location offers a welcome oasis for all.
The guy working 5pm on a Saturday was beyond polite and seemed actually very glad to help with our order. Nice

Went to this Starbucks after going to the museum of science and industry with my kids. The food and drink is to be expected but the staff went above and beyond to be warm and friendly to both my children.

This evening me and my partner went searching for one of our favourites and the lovely barista Oliver delivered exponentially he was a delight to be served by making our experience all the more enjoyable we got our favourite drink that many other stores said they didn’t do made light jokes and commentary honestly best barista experience I’ve had from Starbucks before. Definitely will be going back here again.

Thank you Oliver.

Staff are good but sometimes feel like they're in a rush to get you served and out even when they're quiet. Quick service otherwise. Prices are a little high but very convenient for a quick and convenient caffeine fix
Loud and noisy metropolitan coffee place. I'm sure there are times when you can get quiet time. Good coffee though.

I just want to give a shoutout to the lady who works here with ‘Morgan’ tattooed on her arm - you’re like medicine. Truly a wonderful person and amazing at your job. It’s so true that you never really know what someone’s going through. After having a tough time, my interaction with you today really meant a lot. Thank you
Popped in for a quick shopping break and was served by Pippa! What an angel! A real ray of sunshine. So happy and welcoming. A small interaction but left a big smile on my face!

⸻

I’ve visited this Starbucks several times and Pippa has served me.
Could you please let me know if she’s a manager? Because she definitely has the qualities of one and truly deserves a 100% pay rise 😂
I honestly don’t think this woman could ever be in a bad mood,she’s always so pleasant and amazing.
I was really happy with the service I received.
Thanks to Pippa, I stop by every day before work to grab my coffee.
Thank you, Pippa!

Popped in here for a standard latte after shopping for new clothes. I ended up leaving with a vanilla oat milk flat white which was recommended to me by the barista named maddie! She was extremely polite and friendly despite the busy timing of my visit. Consider me now a regular!

The nicest lady served me I think she was called Maddie - I’m usually not a fan of pumpkin spice but I felt adventurous and she made me one. I’m now a convert! She was amazing at crafting the drink and had such lovely service whilst doing so!! She deserves a raise 💖💖

Scruffy little dump!

Ordered 3 drinks, only two came out, I asked for the third and was told they’d make it but had to wait another 5 minutes and even then they made it wrong. Trying to find a clean, cleared table is like winning the lottery. Asked for a table to be cleared and was told it would be but wasn’t so had to sit a manky one with all food on it.
Wouldn’t mind but £15 for 3 coffees is pathetic anyway but even more so when this is the standard of service. Cheers Starcostalotofbucks
Came in on the 15th December around 11:45am, didn’t catch the name of the young girl working but she was so lovely and attentive. Gorgeous drink and great customer service.

My wife, her best friend and I had a very good coffee here today.  I would especially like to mention the barista Nicole who was very friendly and efficient.  She explained that she worked as relief staff at various outlets and how much she enjoyed the work.  Such a pleasure to meet someone so open, friendly and dedicated to her job.

Thursday afternoon, 2pm, just wanted 2 takeaway hot drinks. So slow. No smiles. Why do people get jobs where they don't want to be there. Realised on the way out the was a self service machine. I'll stop there next time, if there is a next time.

Poor service today we come in here every Monday no food on the shelves asked if he had a breakfast wrap in and then you are approached by a rude manager who asked me my name and then went on to tell me off how I talk to her staff when I am on the phone the last order on just eat was porridge which wasn't warm I said what am I meant to do with that reply was stick it jn the microwave my reply was I don't have one  I have had porridge before ordered this store has gone downhill staff look miserable scruffy tables are never clean no atmosphere I have put a complaint in about her attitude if your looking for a decent coffee shop go to pot kettle black in town smile faces great food and it's clean

Thank you so much to the lovely staff here. I have stayed in the hotel on and off for the past month due to work and home relocation. Always friendly and chatty and such a lovely start to our day!   Today is my last day here before I move to Spain at the end of the month.  Check out the personalised cup in my photos!  Got emotional!! 🥰 Thanks guys! Keep up the good work! 👍🏻💪

My absolute favourite especially around Xmas time. Eggnog latte and cheese twists are a must. Staff, friendly and helpful a warm welcoming atmosphere upon entrance and help with the starbucks app that gives you treats as you go .. Far superior to me than other brands (C.C 👎).
Will never go wrong with a STARBUCKS 😋❤️

Nice little space in the Village hotel Lobby, some comfy seating.
Great service, decent coffee

Great staff. Small Starbucks in the hotel complex. Plenty of room though, including outside seating. It can be quite noisy and has a lot of foot traffic with the hotel, gym, bar and workspace right next to it.

Honestly the worse customer service ever received. Non existent to say the least. Asked the server Millie what was that and in a rude tone just read the label  no friendliness whatsoever, didn’t look like she was bothered to be there. Stood at the till 5 mins while she arsed around and to top things off asked for a mocha and got a latte 👍 won’t go back poor customer service at its finest.

I recently had my first experience at Starbucks, where I ordered two lattes and an oat milk latte with strawberry and vanilla. I was particularly impressed by the staff member, Sacha, who was very engaging and helpful in assisting me with my selection. The coffees were prepared quite promptly, and I was very satisfied with their quality, especially the oat milk latte. My only suggestion for improvement would be to consider accepting cash payments. Nevertheless, well done to Starbucks and the team.

Staff is polite don’t get me wrong but that’s the only decent thing. My order is ALWAYS wrong even when I double specify, I asked for one pump of sugar free hazelnut today and got given 8 pumps of vanilla. No wonder my bill came to £17 with that many pumps that I didn’t even ask for. Always rushed when ordering and never let me finish my order or complete a sentence without interrupting trying to get my order done and gone.

First time in this Starbucks. Stayed to work. It was handy to have plugs and USB sockets that work. Asda parking is only 3 hours.

Ordered gingerbread matcha latte… was told that day there was only 1 machine working so it would take some time, I appreciated the heads up. However when my drink came there was cinnamon just thrown all over it, cup was only 3/4 full, lumps of matcha powder floating in it and couldn’t tell it was gingerbread.

The whole place was really cold so not ideal for sitting there for long. Bathrooms not clean, toilet was gross and the paper dispenser all rusty.

Staff were pleasant enough but clearly quite stressed and rushed.

For what you pay, it wasn’t the best experience I’ve had.

A massive THANK YOU! To DAVID at the Ashton Starbucks who made me the best hazelnut latte (let me taste abit first then absolutely converted me!).  He was absolutely outstanding! Exceptional customer services, real empathy towards my little boy who has autism, understood where i was coming from, accomodated us with upmost respect very pleasant and cheerful to speak with (service with an absolute SMILE!!) and a real aabsolute Starbucks, just what you need thr right kinda staff for the job! (David even came over to us to ask how our drinks were and if there was anything else he could!!) Amazing! Couldn'thave done enough for us made us feel really comfortable and at ease....He deserves an absolute payrise and 5 Stars for his Exceptional customer services! Great comms and fab understanding and listening skills, nice and chatty made our new year ! Definitely coming back here as our first time at this store....Hope to book in 2022 on the back of David personality! Top Man!

Thank again David for your kind pleseant service. We wish you and your staff a very Happy new year!

Much Love

Aisha
Absolutly aweful experience 20 minutes i waited for 2 drinks they were to busy serving all the drive thrus first even though we had placed our orders first they need to sort there priorities out!

The good thing here is that you can get it inside with you while watching which is amazing since I am not big fan to popcorn.
I highly enjoy it with the movie however, it tastes different.. than original store since it seems is not original they are not accepting starbucks card…
drink was extremely overpriced for what it was, contained little to no caramel and tastes completely different to other locations. attached below is a comparison
The girls here were so friendly and were super down to earth best customer service ive seen
I purchased a sausage bap. It tasted like rubber.
staff were lovely and friendly especially adele, however it was freezing in the cafe and we could not sit in due to how cold we were, if warmer it would be a much more pleasant cafe area

Excellent service.
Adam is brilliant, chatty and very kindly brought my orders across to my table for me. Even at busy times Adam was happy to take a moment with each person to speak to them along side taking their orders making service cheery and friendly on a grey wet day.

Building is light and comfortable and staff are happy for you to sit and relax for a while not rushing anyone out.

Parking on site, no restrictions.

I usually come here in the evenings or early mornings, and the two men I often see behind the counter (sorry I don’t know their names!) are always so friendly and welcoming. They’re a real credit to Starbucks and make every visit a pleasant one.

I asked for a caramel latte with whipped cream and caramel drizzle, I get the same drink nearly every day Once a day. I proceeded to just walk around the store having a look never been here before so I wasn’t paying attention to my drink being made. I could’ve done that but I shouldn’t have to get my drink. Proceed to drive off only 10 minutes later after drinking through the cream and drizzle. The drink isn’t right. It’s as thin as water and just tastes like chemicals after one or two drinks, it’s very clear They have decided to just use red milk skimmed And sugar-free caramel syrup, which is just a bottle of chemicals. I just don’t ever remember asking for a sugar-free skinny latte. If the drink was £2 yeah fine what ever but at £7.10 a go absolutely not you will make it right exactly how I asked for it. I blame this kid culture of workers it’s the same with fast food. I made a joke to a friend that this Starbucks only had 1 , 1 star review, here’s your second!
Khadiza took my order today and she was awesome. Super nice, fast, and my drink slapped. 10/10. She was lovely and smiley and made my whole day
The Barista known as Brad is a top-notch fella. Makes beautiful art and a quality coffee!! He needs to be on more, only visit when he's there!

Not dog friendly never had this experience in a Starbucks! Also made the wrong drink for my friend who has intolerance to mint. We asked for chamomile only. It was filthy when we arrived tables not clean. Poor customer service! Everyone said the dogs should be allowed in as well behaved. I wouldnt come here again and don't need to with the lovely independent coffee shops across the way at Radcliffe market we just thought we would try something different for a change but were banished to the cold outside with the wrong drink!

Had a really lovely experience via Drive-Thru this morning. Ordered two bacon rolls, two almond croissants, two coffees. When I was paying, the assistant (think she was the manager) asked if I was treating someone to their breakfast. I said yes, it was my mum’s birthday and she wrote a birthday message on my mum’s cup. She was really friendly and wished me a great day/ happy birthday to my mum.

Food was great, service was efficient, service was lovely. A little thing for them made a big difference to my morning.

With all due respect, hot drinks were served with such unprofessional behavior. The drink was all over the cup and forgot to add 'extras' that were requested. Had to remind and the staff literally opened the lid, threw/wasted some drink, put the topping and handed in the dirty cup.
Always pleasant. Love Jade. Want to take her home! So polite and courteous. All facilities always spotless. Enjoy coming into Starbucks when by daughter has her piano lesson

Staff are miserable
Coffee took ages to make to sit in... priority given to drive through

Milk given in paper espresso cups
Tables dirty

It was a Sunday 2pm with no queue. 3 staff on and only 8 sat down in the cafe.

£15 for 3 drinks I'd expect better. Last trip to Starbucks I'm gonna make.

Great staff! (Harvey, Aoife, Amy & Fraser)Very attentive and went above and beyond! Recommend a way in which to have the Banana Loaf, warm with butter, even warmed my daughters cookie and made it look fancy for her!! The wife now has a new favourite place!
Thanks guys! Will deffo call in again!! 😁

Friendly helpful staff, quick drive thru, always perfectly made coffee and food. Good wi-fi and plug sockets for working. Plenty of seating and table choices. Always clean and tidy. Our favourite!
New: provide your car reg number for free parking.

Asked to sit in and got given take away cups instead. Asked for sleeves but they didn't have any so had to carry scolding hot drinks. Only got given 1 drink even though I ordered 2. Would not recommend coming to this starbucks.

A favourite place for my elderly mum. She loves the large coffee and we take card games to play. On weekdays people bring laptops and work there.
Just beware to put your car registration in the iPad by the till if you stay more than 2 hours otherwise you will receive a fine.

⭐☆☆☆☆ Disinterested Staff – Cold Service, No Warmth

Very disappointed with my recent visit to Starbucks.

From the moment I walked in, it was clear the staff had no interest in engaging or offering even basic courtesy. No greeting, no smile, and barely any eye contact. It felt like I was an inconvenience rather than a paying customer.

There was zero effort to make the experience pleasant—no warmth, no attentiveness, just cold, robotic service. When I asked a simple question about the menu, I was met with a shrug and barely a response.

Starbucks is meant to be a welcoming space, but this location failed completely. If I wanted to be ignored while overpaying for a coffee, I’d stay at home.

Do better.

Today I was driving past Starbucks on Bradford Road Batley and thought I'd give it another go. Usually the waiting time is far too long so I'd not been in for a while for that reason....Today was totally different. I was served by Ellyce, such a lovely person. Ellyce was happy, chatty and did not make you feel like you were just another customer walking through the door. The coffee was also made to perfection. Thank you Ellyce for cheering me up, I wasn't having a good day. I will return to this coffee shop.

I used to come here at the start of the year and the service was shocking so I stopped. Been three or four times recently and it’s vastly improved - the store is miles cleaner and and the staff are all new and much friendlier. I saw another review saying they were closed down too early for your liking, yes, because they close at half 7 and have to be out by 7:45 and do EVERYTHING themselves. Try speaking to the staff and asking what’s going on like I do. I notice said person said they go every week which means there’s been many visits but no good reviews? Just like to moan. Anyways, kudos to the new manager and team! Keep it up!

10.1.26 10am - Shocked by how poor the service was. Staff were rude and dismissive; when she couldn’t process my order, I was told to “respectfully” come round and do it myself. Completely unacceptable.

Missing items, poor attitude, and zero accountability. I won’t be returning.

Poor service tonight.  We come at least once a week to charge the car and today at 18:15 they have already put everything away. Cakes, sandwiches the works.

We placed an order for drinks and they’re to busy trying to close down the place and talking that they forgot about our drinks till we asked about 20 minutes later and WE ARE THE ONLY CUSTOMERS.

Oh and let’s not forget they don’t close till 19:30pm.

So disappointing.

Should be 0. I am utterly appalled by the service of the workers. I was met with some of the rudest people I have experienced in my life. Very disappointed #boycott

I visited today and met Helen and Leah. They were very professional and with a positive attitude. Definitely helps in the early morning hours just like a good coffee.
Thank you guys
Michael

Usually get a coffee with friends on a Monday. When Premium Inflatables visited Starbucks within Village Hotel South - quality service + friendly staff. Clean tidy environment with relaxing decor.

We enjoyed our coffee break at this local shop on our doorstep. Back again soon thanks xx
The staff actually a cussed me of stealing a sandwich ask to look in my bag showing her then ask to look in my jacket was made to feel like a Feef will be taken this matter future bad management
Lovely new refurb, staff are so nice. Helen and Leah make the best lattes!! Best Starbucks I have been to in a long time!

Great starbucks. Good coffee and choice as always. This is a modern airey, light, spacious café. The staff are lovely and very helpful: one of us has mobility issues, so our server bought coffee to our table. 🫶🏻

The loos are clean and decent. There is masses of parking and a wheelchair friendly entrance as well as a loo.

Well behaved dogs are allowed.

Beautiful aesthetics inside. Really spacious and airy. Lots of "separate" areas with their own moods, colours, imagery, really nice touch. Accents with LED lighting. Probably one of the nicest starbucks internally. Staff, 90% are great. One might seen a bit rude and standoffish, not a massive issue, yet.

Great coffee shop! ☕ Super friendly and smiling staff, especially Adie, and the coffee is really delicious. My daughter had a Babyccino, and I tried the Pumpkin coffee – perfect for Halloween! 🎃 Amazing taste, creamy and full of flavour. Clean, cozy place with a great vibe. We’ll definitely be back! ❤️

New store in my local area, used to be a KFC and the effort Starbucks have put into this shop, how it is run and how it looks is amazing. Popped in opening weekend and the new team were so friendly, you get what you pay for and that’s fantastic coffee and lovely staff. Will definitely be back

Popped in on a whim and all I have to say is the welcome from the team members behind the counter was lovely, warm and genuine! The inside of the store is beautifully decorated, music was pleasant and we really enjoyed our visit. If you haven't been I recommend you take some time out for a coffee and cake.

We love our Starbucks and this location did not disappoint. Good customer service and a beautiful atmosphere. Just off the motorway heading out of Leeds, great space for parking and family friendly.
Just look at the smile in me brothers face! I has an ice coffee Frape, with caramel and cream 😋. My first time having that and I loved it.
Great customer service - was served by a lovely barista named Archie, he was very polite and friendly and made my drink quickly despite it being quite busy - will be coming back!

I use this starbucks probably 3 times a week on my way to work. Today I pulled up to the intercom where you order and before I had chance to say anything, a male voice came over saying hello is it....(reels off my usual order)

It's the little things, attention to detail. Thank you

We usually go in thst branch a few times a week and we spend a lotbif money there.
Dusgusting and we wont be back!

I have used this coffee shop a few times. Lovely, friendly and approachable staff. They even helped me use the app that I thought was a bit frustrating at the time! That aside, the interior is clean with tables and seating neatly organised. The toilets are maintained. Food & drink is slightly cheaper than other Starbucks stores I have frequented. They stock a limited supply of merchandise.

Me and my friend popped in for some drinks and we had such a lovely experience. Both Mj and Kee were so friendly and had such a lovely positive energy. My friend had some serious dairy requirements and they were so helpful and really made her feel welcome. Thank you ! xx

Staff are fine but generally dirty, tables or the floor littered with plastic wrappings. Quite loud too. Seating arrangment and the chairs have something off about them and feels odd and uncomfortable but cant quite put my finger on as ro why. I only come here when all other coffee shops nearby are closed and there are no other options.
Kearan and MJ were very helpful with my dairy allergy, great service and friendly faces!

If i could give this a 0 star for service and atmosphere I would. I visited today with a service user. We ordered a caramel mochiata, toasted fruit bread, hot chocolate with oat milk and a chocolate muffin. My service user asked about vegan options and was told they can't tell us what is vegan but it does say on the description of the item (that's fine if you can see). The rest of the cafes around the whiterose were absolutely packed at the time we visited so alarm bells should have rung when we walked in here to find only 2 other couples.
I admit i enjoyed my drink and my toasted fruit loaf but the service was absolutely shocking.

Today I came first time to this coffee shop.
First thing the lady who’s served me was very rude, i asked cappuccino large one with white chocolate syrup 1pump, shes been speaking with herself or something and she said white chocolate mocha, and I said no I won’t white chocolate mocha because you do 2pump syrup and you add cream on top I won’t that, she said that is syrup name(very rude-way) I didn’t know that, and why she needs to tell this if she understands that I want syrup?🤷‍♀️
Second one I asked to use my Starbucks app she told that I can’t use it. Pk thats fine.

They made me feel bad as I asked coffee second one they made coffee not drinkable. Not recommended this place.

“Urvishi is always amazing! She is friendly, polite, and makes every visit to Starbucks feel welcome. Her customer service is excellent, and she always prepares the drinks perfectly. She brings positivity to the place and truly cares about customers. Thank you, Urvishi, for your great service!”

Shoutout to Max who was very helpful and polite, drinks on point apart from the hot chocolate which tasted watered down.
Reason for 2 stars is the baker’s cupboard was heaving with flies, really need to sort this issue out! Max was kind enough to fetch us some from the back storage as we would not dare to eat the ones on display.

Visited here one morning around 9.30am. Place was dead inside and out. Maybe 1 other person in there.
I came with my 16yo and 3yo daughter.
2 members of staff. Took our very simple order of 2 iced white mocha and 1 baby hot chocolate and 2 croissants

Girl that took our order long ginger hair and piercings very standoff ish attitude like she had been dragged out of her coffin to come work.

Stood at counter waiting for drinks and 2 hot drinks placed down and a cup of hot milk. Confused we asked what these where as we had not ordered any of it. Greeted with a disgusting attitude by her while she stormed about muttering we still had no idea what had gone wrong. She rolled her eyes to her colleague and walked out back at which point I said. "Is there something wrong" she immediately fired back you have a problem you've got an attitude. I said don't speak to me like that please get me your manager. At thos point the manager is present and she is still carrying on she was asked to leave and go out back by her manager
She shouted to me you're lucky im on shift.

Manager in disbelief remade our order correct. Refunded the whole thing.
