Wow avoid at all costs as after reading back I think the same member of staff almost have been working there a while as the bad reviews all seem to say the same.

Never experienced such poor service from Starbucks. My cappuccino was the lightest I have ever had from Starbucks. Complained and the lady, she said it was supposed to be to be like that. Never going back there. I know what a cappacino is!!

Pretty young girl in a “Starbucks” cafe had no clue what de caff was! She gave me a Latte! Won’t bore you with details. Can’t see why this is so popular. 2 coffees ( bland ) 2 muffins reasonable, £15. Bring back the old Sainsburys cafe.

This Starbucks has the best staff by a mile! I spend a lot of time travelling and often use Starbucks, but the guys in here are on a different level. They keep the place super clean, they are really friendly, and all of them serve decent coffee!! I couldn't recommend this store enough!!
Great staff and lovely atmosphere and great coffee. Natasha was really lovely to my 3 year old this morning.  Although I couldn’t do her survey as the system seems to be down
Very friendly staff, quick, nice coffee
Free car park, good place for work with laptop

So, I regularly but coffee here on the go & to be fair generally Good all round service but recently I've noticed the following which has lowered your score.
Time taken from ordering a really simple 2 ingredients coffee has taken on average 10 minutes recently - it wasn't exactly full but yet the last 3 visits have been noticeable by the Time Waiting - you weren't like that previously...it's a simple 2 ingredient drink ....Also  No Amex accepted recently? If this is a one off today - I hear you but I use your other branch & use amex - No Amex issue...and tbf they don't keep you waiting 10 mins ....Come on let's get back to previous timings & I will Upgrade my review 💥💥👌

Honestly the best Starbucks I've been to! I've been to many over the years. Jess is honestly the sweetest, has the best customer service skills and made my day! I've been served by Jess 3 times and every time she has a beautiful smile on her face her customer service skills are 10/10!! I was having a pretty rubbish day so thank you Jess! You're amazing, I hope you get everything you want in life xx

Food tends to be nice but very overpriced as you'd expect. Service is usually efficient. Not sure why there's a rating option for the atmosphere. It's a chain coffee shop, so you'd do well to expect the atmosphere to consist of corporate bleary eyed 30-somethings 'plugged in' and doing very important spreadsheets while angrily messaging HR about the new remote working policy which means they're supposed to be in the office that afternoon, all while trying to avoid spilling their heated beverage all over their monogrammed laptop bag. That said, I probably fit right in.

⚠️ Caramel Frappucin I do not recommend it at this point‼️
I've never had this coffee served with so little caramel before - just a little on top of the cream, nothing, not even drops in a cup. ‼️
Disgusting coffee 🤮

As a coffee addict, I couldn't resist checking out the newly opened Starbucks on Crown Point in Leeds, and I'm thrilled I did! The friendly team and exceptional customer service immediately made me feel at home. The quality of their drinks, including my favorites, the hazelnut extra hot latte and soya vanilla latte, was absolutely top-notch.

While the cafe wasn't too crowded during my visit, there was a minor hiccup with the order pick-up section, causing a bit of confusion for both team members and customers.

One small suggestion would be to pay closer attention to the cleanliness of the tables. I noticed that a few were slightly dirty, and some customers took it upon themselves to clean them before sitting down. Nevertheless, these minor issues aside, I thoroughly enjoyed my visit and will definitely be returning for more of their delicious drinks and warm ambiance!

Team were fantastic!
We stopped for a coffee to break up our journey and unfortunately, my Mum’s coffee spilled on her leg. The staff could not have been more kind, brought out napkins, offered first aid, made a new coffee - all out of genuine concern. Thank  you so much, keep being wonderful - you are an asset to the company!

INCREDIBLE - I've got to say this... serious... probably the BEST service I may have EVER recieved by the kind GENT behind the counter - two words - in credible. Simply amazed... now this will go down in the history books.

Pete and Drew were amazing … I randomly put a spin on things by asking for something that wasn’t advertised and they went above and beyond to accommodate… not only that but they were extremely friendly and had enthusiasm despite the time of day it was
Thanks guys you were amazing!!!!

I visit this Starbucks every week, and Jess always makes my day! She’s so smiley, welcoming, and genuinely helpful every single time. No matter how busy it gets, she always greets everyone with such kindness and positive energy. It’s clear she really cares about her customers and takes pride in her work. Jess is a big part of why I keep coming back every week — Starbucks is lucky to have her!

Disappointing doesn’t begin to cover it. The store was virtually empty, yet we were left waiting while staff finished their conversation before even acknowledging us. At 4:45pm the seating area was inexplicably closed — not exactly the Starbucks experience you expect. To top it off, brand loyalty means nothing here: “we don’t accept the app in this store.” Poor service, closed facilities, and a blatant disregard for loyal customers. This feels less like Starbucks and more like greed dressed in green.

Ordered a frappucino and a gingerbread latte on uber eats. Recieved a frappucino and a note with a little smiley face telling me to get a refund for the other drink because they're "out of syrup". Extremely lazy, at best they could've contacted to arrange a replacement, at worse they could've sent another suitable drink. I now have to make a whole new order and pay a seperate delivery charge just to get a drink...

Nice Starbucks, not too busy.
HOWEVER, whoever was playing the music decided it would be a good idea to play Taylor Swift on repeat for 2 hours straight!
Awful DJing!!!!!!!

Horrible place. The staff never clean the place. It looks so untidy. All the used ceramic cups are just there in the spots, and no one takes it (I was there for a long time). I ordered an Americano and the woman Gabby gave me a paper cup without the sleeve. Every Starbucks I go provides a sleeve, if they serve with paper cup. I mean it’s piping hot. I asked for a ceramic cup, the woman says ‘no cups’ while all the cups are lying on the table unwashed. The store was not even busy.
abysmal. the strawberry acai refresher tastes like battery acid and the toastie was literally just bread. not toasted. highly disappointed. extortion. if i could give this 0 stars i would.

Staff were so rude, the guy with a beard and tattoos serving us completely blanked us and had his back to us whilst serving at the drive thru, barely spoke and forgot some of our order with no sorry. Rest of the staff were stood in a circle chatting instead of working, drinks were terrible too. Avoid

This particular shop is not disabled friendly. The main daughter does not have a disabled access button to open the door for wheelchair users.

When you order ahead with the app, you will find you are still waiting 10 minutes for your order most times. I wanna occasion I have to inform the staff behind the counter that I had sent an order and she said she didn’t see the ticket. Very rarely on a morning which high class is busy do you see more than one member of staff. It is very difficult to drive out of the car park which is shared with the garage and to turn onto the busy main road. This is not a drive-through.

I am a loyal Starbucks customer but this particular branch the staff used to be lovely ! Now there is blonde lady with glasses she is so rude … made a mobile order and she simply told me to go get it from the fridge myself and didn’t even ask me if I wanted a cup I had to ask for one… not welcoming nor warming like traditional employees. The place was dirt at 9:00am …
Not a pleasant experience at all. Please bring back the old staff with manners.

Popped in before work to pick up a coffee and Cam and Dawn were absolutely brilliant. Great customer service from them both. Cam was very friendly and Dawn made me a stellar coffee.

Thank you for making my morning. Just the pick me up I needed before going to work!
Just popped in for a Caramel Machiato and must say Cam and Erin made the experience even better. So friendly ☺️ and a great drink. Thanks guys

A Starbucks is a Starbucks, and there are definitely better coffees out there. For any Americano drinkers, I'd recommend the Blonde Roast for a less 'burnt' and smoother tasting brew.

Whilst most Starbucks experiences blend into one, Kai (branch manager) makes Armley stand out. He is super friendly, personable and drives great customer service within his team. Remembering my usual order (even if it's been a while!) and suggestions for new lines are very welcome and appreciated 🤝

I ordered a medium iced coffee for £3.90. The coffee was made quickly but I took maybe 4 sips and the coffee was gone, the whole cup inside turned out to be filled with ice so there was practically no coffee. I understand that it comes with ice, but for this price I thought there would be coffee too. Definitely too much ice. It's dirty inside, the tables aren't cleaned, you can't close the bathroom door because there's no locker.

American style coffee shop, not too good, not too bad, but a good place staying to wait for the movies. Not cheap, but standard quality guarantee. To meet expectation is the most important for the chain coffee shop.

I went in here and asked for a caramel frappe with extra drizzle EXTRA and what I received what less then the normal amount. The drink tasted horrible unlike other places I have been and the workers vibes are just depressing customer service is horrible
Morning coffee with Starbucks with my own cup and the staff forgot to reduce my own cup price. When I asked less ice, the lady attitude was so rude!

(This is a long one unfortunately). I always used to love coming to this Starbucks and have always had a nice experience… up until this evening. My husband had ordered me a Christmas coffee and I shortly joined him after whilst he was waiting. There’s usually a little wait as there’s other drinks being prepared (which of course, we decided to sit down and wait whilst waiting for our drink.) We kept on turning our heads towards the end of the counter for my drink, but after a while, nothing? We queried this with the barista politely and she clearly seemed baffled  and annoyed 🤔 baring in mind that no ticket had been printed for our cup with my partners name on nor was the name of the specific drink announced when ready 🤔 the barista began to insinuate that it was both our faults that it had “disappeared” and that “someone else had taken it”. Whilst we then waited calmly for a new one to be made, the barista (in quite an enraged mood) slamming the milk jug a little more than needed, then stormed over to us with our newly made drink in not a nice manner - if looks could kill. I understand that workers are rushed off their feet at the moment as I have worked in the industry myself, but never would I behave that way towards a customer. If you can’t be nice to a customer, please change your job role and attitude. Merry Christmas.

jordan was so positive and really put a smile on my face and brightened my morning! She is an asset to this starbucks branch!! My white mocha tasted lovely! service was super fast. So lovely to see an interacting worker and actually having conversation instead of then just making them a drink!

I received outstanding service from Jacob! I got my order wrong, and he just was so amazing in how he handled the situation.

Its 'people' that make a place and the service perfect!

I work close by, so will keep coming back! Thank you Jacob for being #awesome

Went for the Christmas chocolate mousse latte paid 6.25 for the drink when opened up there put cream on it went back said where's my chocolate mousse there said non lefted so why dont you say that at the till to people then there know not to order it won't be going back to this place no more not happy
The workers are very friendly and often make the drinks well. However, the upstairs bin is often very full and toilets usually don't have toilet paper.

Jordan was super helpful, I bought the overnight oats (which were ok, it tasted like there was apple or maybe tapioca starch which gave it a weird texture) and a soya hot chocolate and she offered me cream but told me they had vegan cream, which I accepted. There are still places I got that don’t have alternative milks so to be offered a vegan alternative extra was a bonus.
Jordan was super helpful and fast sitting out the rewards card too, so thankyou Jordan👏👏👏👏👏 much appreciated 👍👍👍
I honestly dont know how these chains get away with serving the worst coffee. This is an oat milk cappuccino by the way, not that you could tell!

Had to wait for 10 mins to be served just now while staff were chilling in the kitchen and chatting. When served there was no apology whatsoever and server was also not very polite. Won’t be coming back here ever again

I absolutely loved the recommendation from Antonio to try a blonde roast instead of my usual — a caramel oat iced latte with an extra shot of espresso and 2 extra pumps of syrup. I've not seen him before, maybe a new hire, but this drink was so brilliant I ordered a second one (which I usually don't — I have a thing about saving money).

The atmosphere was perfect for studying, enough background noise to be comforting yet not distracting, and the location means this place is never very messy or loud. Definitely my favourite Starbucks in Leeds, as all the staff are lovely and welcoming.
Clean and plenty of seating at lunchtime. Friendly staff and quick service. A good coffee shop experience even though I drank tea.
This is a nice store. Their frozen drinks were very nice, and this place has a nice and quiet feel. I’d come back here.

Had a bad experience with someone called vinyal or something similar who pretty much shouted at me to speak up when I was speaking at a clear normal volume , if I spoke any louder I’d have been shouting and it wasn’t a busy or loud environment. Was very rude and ruined my morning.

The prices are shocking. It's cheaper to buy coffee in all of the coffee shops in the 'expensive' areas of London I haven't once paid more. Didn't get asked what size I'd like. Barely looked at or spoken to. Not expecting loads from a busy train station, but I felt I was robbed at that price.

James is an exceptional person: he has professionalism in bounds, and is great to see him at Starbucks, Leeds Station after a year. I return to this very Starbucks because of him. Thank you for your service to the many patrons whom enter this establishment.

The worst quality Starbucks I've ever tried. Every time they just ignore when I ask to put less syrup in and every time I end up throwing away the coffee. This is the first negative review I've ever written but it's just such a waste of money. Even if you like Starbucks in general, avoid this one.

The coffee could be better made, really. The tables were dirty despite little traffic, no trash can. Seasonal coffee and tea were completely different from what is on sale. The matcha was not mixed well, I personally think that the staff simply did not want to make this coffee. Only one plus is you can buy a Starbucks cups in this place.

The Place is is excellent. The view over the arcade is great.
Though Starbucks is generally overpriced, the seasonal offerings we had today - Gingerbread Latter and Chocolatey Mousse Latte were quite good.
However, the place is obviously understaffed or poorly managed - all tables were messy and dirty, starting with the desk to get orders and all tables on the first floor. We had to clean up space for us. Yet, the staff taking orders and making coffee were polite.
By the time we left no one from staff appeared to clean the tables.
The service might be much better fur the place which positions itself as above average.

The staff here were really hardworking. They were super friendly and cleared tables quickly, which was great. But the orders kept backing up, so the line to order was quite long. I recommend ordering through the app.
Absolutely lovely team. Great drink, great atmosphere and friendly faces. The message on my cup was a great touch too. Merry Christmas x
Ordered food and coffees..shop relaxed clean and well managed. Staff nice polite and friendly.. nonis
Staff are wonderful when we came on Saturday morning. Quick and friendly service. Great repor with customers and regulars, clean and tidy. Would definitely visit again.

The ladies and gents that work at this Starbucks are always amazing. For my birthday I’d missed my deadline to use my free gift I told the lady literally ready to pay and she let me have it for free!! Another time I came here one of the other Starbucks had accidentally used a free drink and then cancelled it but it still got used and another lady honoured it!!  And then today I went to pay for my drink but they had no change and like a lot of people I don’t get paid till tomorrow so I only had cash and the lady who served me was lovely and she saw that I was trying to gather what shrapnel I had left in my purse and when I told her I’d have to leave it she put the drink through for me!! It’s always an amazing experience here. They are always up for a chat and always have amazing attitudes that make your day! Amazing service highly recommend!!❤️

Lovely little Starbucks on the footbridge at Leeds Station.

Is usually pretty busy, as its in a train station, but my drink always arrives quickly, so it's never a problem for me. Just make sure that you leave plenty of time for yourself if you have a train to catch.

There is also a large selection of snacks, despite the small size of the shop itself. The drinks menu is also pretty big, with lots of choice. There are a couple of tables and chairs overlooking the rail lines, and more chairs along the walkway.

The staff are always lovely and friendly and provide great efficient service! 💚

Such a warm-hearted service. It was a very hot day and I felt dehydrated and wanted to buy a bottle of water but they've just sold out. The person who worked there was so kind and gave me a cup and guided me to where I could refill it with fresh water.A massive thank you to Starbucks people.

Located at the concourse linking platforms inside the ticket gates.

Great views of the station and the rail tracks.

Lots of seating and even though it’s small there is a large selection of food.

It’s the best option if you have gone through the barriers and waiting for a train.

I called in for something #glutenfree for lunch. They only had bananas and Starbucks gf fruit and nut bars. I thought they’d be dry but they were nice and moist. The bananas were fresh and on the greenish side which I prefer. When they’re green they’re lower in sugar and easier to digest if you have IBS. I had a Chai Latte and it hit the spot too, so all in all it was a successful visit for me.

Starbucks Leeds

I went for a seasonal Pumpkin Spice Caramel Macchiato…simply lovely, like autumn in a cup. 🍁

A nice little quiet Starbucks
Easy to find a seat, friendly staff, and clean tables. Exactly what you want for a quick coffee stop. ☕️

The Wi-Fi connection was solid and the coffee was great.

Relaxed vibe, good service, and great coffee. Recommended!

I have used this Starbucks for last five mornings! An American ordering in the UK can be difficult as not all Starbucks items are the same. The staff is friendly and gets to know you asap and your order which is very welcomed! I drink hot and husband drinks cold and they have been right every time. I like this location a lot and easy walk from double tree hotel and train station.

Really nice store, one of my favourite in Leeds. Only gets a business crowd, no kids or shoppers. On weekends it’s lovely and quiet - just people who live locally. Always has a good range of merch and drink quality is always good.
Cleanliness is excellent and on another level compared to other franchised stores in Leeds area.

A lovely big Starbucks - perfect stop in on my way into town or the train station. Staff always have time for you and are so friendly - Mona in particular is amazing and brings such a joy to the place!
The customer service that  Evelyn provided was really amazing. I have never felt delightful with other cafe I have been to. I really appreciate the latte and The current employee Evelyn

i was served by jo, she was lovely! so friendly, she’s an absolute star. the store was clean and tidy, no dirty tables or cups about, the counter was clean and organised, she’s a total credit to the store 💕
Says it’s open until midnight on Sunday. We arrived at 10:00pm- doors locked. Don’t you people know how to update your hours on the internet? Maybe it’s time to do that. Weirdos
Very comfortable open plan Starbucks branch; easy to access from M1 J46

I have just been served by the two most heart warming and kind people ever!
They have truly made my day, I walked in and apologised for leaving it so close to closing, they were patient, took my order, made my drink, they were helpful regarding the Starbucks app and overall; they just had beautiful and loveable customer service.
I didn’t get their names however I ordered at 19.41pm Wednesday 2nd July and my order number is: 2290.
Please give them a great big thank you from me!
I am a very happy girly!

Staff are very friendly and polite.
There is loads of drink and food options.
Very dog friendly. Offered my two dogs a pupachino which they loved.

Unfortunately my drink got spilled over the floor, my friend went in to get me a new one and they re made it for nothing, Noah came out and helped clean it all up he was so lovely and helpful I felt so bad but he made no fuss and was eager to help thank you so much :)

Me and my friend visited Starbucks at The Springs today after our gym session. The staff are lovely, Noah and Holly replaced our drink after an unfortunate spillage. They were both very friendly and eager to help. Appreciated loads :)

Twice now I have been in for a white hot chocolate and been given a mocha. Think the staff need to listen to what I am asking. I do not like coffee which is why I order hot chocolate. I did not have time to take back and change as I had to get to work so I wasted £5 so thanks for that

Really great team. Lovely staff.
My daughter dropped her drink and the lady in charge was so kind, made sure she was okay and made her another drink.
Plus all the free coffee grounds you need for your garden!

Again, as mentioned by someone below. Lovely staff, lovely food.
Can Starbucks please get a grip of all the laptop people sat taking up space.  We counted 9 yesterday all taking over table space, sat working with one drink long since forgotten.  People then coming in and walking out as nowhere to sit.
Also, allowing parents to sit by the big swing door with small kids passing a ball to each other isn't good as someone could easily fall over them.
Lovely staff but maybe needs someone a bit older to take more charge.

Second time here now for a bit or remote working. Not too busy an a comfortable bright atmosphere. The staff are incredibly swift and friendly, a real asset not only to the this store but the brand. A really stand out team, worthy of a review I don’t usually leave for a coffee chain.

We ordered two drinks: a hot chocolate and a cappuccino. Unfortunately, both tasted extremely watered down. The cappuccino barely had any coffee flavour, and the hot chocolate was completely bland. Honestly, even a basic pain chocolat from Sainsbury’s tastes far better than what we were served here. Paying around £13 for drinks of this quality was very disappointing and not worth the price.”

My partner and myself have been visiting this Starbucks every Saturday without fail for over 4 years but after today I won’t be using this store anymore. I entered this morning and felt optimistic that there may be a shorter wait than usual due to extra staff but after waiting at the till for some time without even being acknowledged a member of staff finally took my order. I ordered a flat white and a babychino. I scanned my app and was just about to tap my phone to pay and noticed I was about to be charged £8:00. I questioned this as a babychino has always been free as long as a normal drink is being purchased. I think the girl serving was new so she asked what I only presume to be the manager as she was dressed scruffy and had a very poor demeanour to came over and help. Then with a look of disgust that I’m questioning the change in price she responds in a rude manor, yeah that’s the price and immediately walked off, not allowing me to question why I was being charged £4.00 for 100-150ml of warm milk which was the same price as my flat white. I kindly asked the girl serving to cancel my whole order and left.  This store used to be friendly and welcoming but recently the service has gone massively down hill, and now the price seem to be becoming ridiculous.
My advice is to avoid this store and frequent one of nice cafes on horsforth town street who would be over the moon with your custom and if your set on a coffee from a chain there is Costa.

This Starbucks was terribly understaffed this morning. There was a female staff member who deserves big appreciation for dealing with dozens of customers at once. Management may want to look at arranging for support and extra staffing, esp on a busy Saturday morning, and to massively recognise her efforts.

I visited Statbuck's this morning and asked for a Grande Cappuccino and Signiture Breakfast Sandwich. The cashier charged me £15. When I asked why it cost so much, the cashier said a Cappuccino is £8. I didn't understand the sudden price rise, so I double checked and read on the board a Cappuccino is £4.10. I went back to the cashier and told her she must of over charged me, and asked her why she said a Cappuccino is £8??? She didn't answer me and checked the till. Her reply was, it's double charged you. There was no apology whatsoever, infact I found her extremely rude and unprofessional. If I had not checked, I would have lost £7.50. The cashier's are usually friendly here, but this young woman was appalling. I'm now put off from visiting here again.

I visited today. I met Vikky and  Shirley. They were very professional and polite, just great customer service🙂
Coffee was excellent and I could not ask for more. I had a great break here and I will be back when in this area. Highly recommended, thank you guys...
Michael

If I could give 10 stars for each I would!
And all 10 would go directly to Victoria. What a breath of fresh air she was.
Made our visit fantastic, and even helped with me 95 year old grandmother when she started feeling under the weather!
Goes to show, not all hero’s wear capes!

I had my usual coffee today which was great as usual but the thing that stood out for me was a member of staff Vicky who was really affable and sweet. Thanks!
Also I have to say if you like brownies I recommend from Starbucks (these arey favourite).
Fantastic service. Struggle with loads of various allergies so always a worry getting food/drink on the go but staff member Victoria sorted me out fantastically! I shall be returning

Excellent service quality of the brownies and hot chocolate was made to perfection by such a cheerful staff member Vicky so positive and made the whole experience so much more enjoyable a pleasure to meet her 😁

WARNING ⚠️

Illegally closes at 6 not 7 on Sunday - breaking advertising laws. We were ushered out at 6 after we just got our drinks to sit in! Never seen anything like it. Terrible grumpy staff.

They are being very sneaky in what they’re doing everywhere online says they’re meant to close at 7 on Sunday but they think they can do whatever they want and go home early. Wrong.

Starbucks why on earth are you employing these people Leeds is full of cheerful students desperate for a job. Hire them!!

Reported to head office.

As with some other reviews, this is based on visiting multiple times and being disappointed time and time again. Today was the final straw when my boyfriend kindly ordered a caramel Frappuccino to be delivered by Uber to surprise me while working from home. It turned up as a cup of frozen milk, no coffee, no caramel, no straw to drink it with, literally just frozen blended milk. It wouldn’t be so bad if you weren’t paying £6-£7 a coffee, I’ve had the same thing before with a pumpkin spiced latte which was just a normal latte and when I took it back to address this they just put cream on top rather than caring enough to make it properly. There are way better coffee shops around - Rand for example - I won’t come here again

Man with a streak in his hair served me, name begins with a Z. Couldn’t be bothered speaking to me, didn’t even tell me when the payment machine was ready, didn’t take my name or asked for whipped cream. Usually staff are friendly here but lately service has slipped. Atrocious when you’re paying £7 for a coffee. Staff stood around chatting and not serving

The service in this place is dire they are too busy making on line orders rather than concentrating on their physical customers. The toilets are disgusting. Waited 20 minutes on this visit for two coffees and then only probably got it because we complained at the counter. There seems to be no management overseeing anything.

Wouldn’t recommend. Very loud. Not clean. Staff weren’t welcoming, not even a “hi” or “what would you like” it was “who’s next?”
After finally placing our order. We then waited 10 minutes for our drinks. I had to ask for my drink (Americano no milk) after 10 mins. The girl was rude. Won’t be visiting again.
me and my friend always get a starbucks in the airport, it was nice and quiet today and a lovely lady called Feruze served us and gave us recommendations on our drinks. they were amazing! thankyou Xx

To Feruze. I loved how optimistic you were and would like to see more people like you. From Alex your newest friend❤️. Had to use the cup because I'm not at Starbucks anymore. I hope to see you again Feruze

Seniat makes the best ice frappuccino latte! She is always friendly, hardworking, and dedicated to her job. She treats everyone with kindness and respect, and she works perfectly with both customers and coworkers. Her positive energy and excellent service
Thank you

Sunika and Feruze were an absolute delight at Starbucks Leeds Bradford airport. Such friendly and efficient service. The Ham and cheese sandwich was delicious. They are a credit to the Starbucks brand.
To Feruze. I loved how optimistic you were and I’d like to see more people like you. From Alex your newest friend. ❤️

Staff made the drinks incorrectly for both of us (fine, that happens). However we then asked for them to be changed and were met with “obviously we didn’t mean to give them to you did we”.

A small acknowledgement would of gone a long way

Unfortunately the staff here don’t make drinks as they’re ordered, deciding to hold off on the toppings I had specifically selected in the app, and then when politely requesting that the drink be finished per the order, and for the entirely missing drink from the order, the staff told me they always leave off cream for non dairy drinks even if they’re ordered, then they complained to each other about my order when I was out of ear shot- my dad wasn’t though (I ordered an oat based drink with dairy cream) I don’t have an allergy or an intolerance, I prefer the taste of oat milk in coffee, a lot of people do. I know this because I too serve coffee at my place of work, only I do it with a good attitude, and apologise if I miss something from an order. They also advertise that ordering on the app is “skipping the queue” then proceed to take at least 10 orders from people at the till and serve them long before me. A long way to go to be on par with other Starbucks for customer service and efficiency. Would strongly advise people to visit the Sainsbury’s Upton Starbucks over this one, the staff are fantastic- always polite and efficient.

I left Motoway to buy coffee and it was not accepted because I wanted to pay by cash.
Very disappointed!!
Don't go to this place. The manager lied saying that all Starbucks chains only accept cards, which is a lie! I only buy coffee at Starbucks, they always accept cash.

It was newly opened but incredibly disappointed with my visit today. The service was appalling, with staff more interested with in-jokes and banter across their headsets than providing a basic level of service.
The food was awful and despite being informed we were dining-in, it was freshly thrown into a bag and abandoned on the counter for us to claim.

Like others have said service is terrible, if you want to go somewhere that you can stand and be ignored then this is certainly going to be my new go to place!  Stood at the counter waiting to order when the store was pretty quiet and was basically ignored, not even eye contact from the 3 staff in there despite them having multiple opportunities to ask for my order or say they would be with me in a minute.  Ended up just walking out, life is too short to wait for someone to take my order!

Beaut new Starbucks 😍🩷 Cute chill atmosphere, love the vibe with really comfy seating. Did a mobile order and the staff were really friendly helping me get my coffee grinded. Everywhere was clean with great standards. Will be returning with my Twin 🥰💕✨

Not had a bad coffee from here yet, Just hate they try and up sell the whole menu at the drive-through. If I wanted  food or an extra shot of coffee I would have asked for it. Turns what should a fast and friendly interaction into a squeeze every penny out of you interaction.

Spotless, staff friendly and brought drink to table. Good parking facilities, brand new EV charging points.. However Starbucks are forever dodging taxes in the UK and I'd recommend supporting local coffee shops ideally. But if it can't be helped this place has everything you expect from the soulless corporate coffee franchise

Awful. Sat waiting in the cad for about 15 minutes for a flat white, maybe five customers total in the queue. Coffee tasted awful. Just as bad as Clatterbridge Starbucks. Costa far cheaper and far better!

Just visited the new Starbucks and was really impressed! The place is clean, modern, and has a great atmosphere. The staff were super friendly and efficient, especially Jess. My order was ready quickly and made perfectly. Great service all around.

Just had the most wonderful service at Starbucks in the Village hotel, Bromborough. Nicky and Ange were absolutely fantastic. They were so happy, helpful, and provided the best service I've had in a long time. My coffee was perfect, and the atmosphere was just delightful thanks to their positive energy. Highly recommend!
The service is very slow and does not understand the order. Instead of two coffees ordered, they make one.
Third time they've got the order wrong becoming a joke now, I won't be back.

It is not my usual Starbucks but I was meeting a group of friends for lunch. I was pleasantly surprised how friendly and comfortable it was. The service was great didn’t wait long at all and the server Noel was super friendly and knowledgeable and went over and above to make us all feel comfortable. One of us is a vegetarian and the other had allergies. Noel was really knowledgeable about the products, and so polite and funny with it. We will definitely be back. Really impressed with the 5 star service we got 👍
Noel & Kate are absolutely lovely. A must visit for friendly banter, atmosphere & speed of service. Plus the fact we bagged a snoopy cup….. yay!! 🎉

James was brilliant, he gave me a run down of all the products and helped me choose exactly I needed. I’m very happy with the experience and James would make me return with my business. Thanks James. Please reward James, he made my day when my flight was delayed 2 hours.

After having a stressful morning, I stopped here and wanted to mention Lily who served me who went above and beyond with her customer service. She was really pleasant, friendly, and helped me get my order sorted quickly. Her calm, positive attitude made a big difference during a hectic morning.

Great service, and I really appreciated her kindness. Thanks, Lily!

Couldn’t have asked for a better coffee before my flight. I was greeted with a smile by court who gave me many recommendations when I didn’t have a clue what to order. Luckily she pointed me in the direction of one of the best Starbucks drink I’ve  had. Great chat before my flight nice and tidy area hoping to see the same staff when I go back for my next holiday

I had a great experience at this Starbucks, thanks to Demi. She was friendly, attentive, and made sure everything was just right with my order. It’s refreshing to receive such genuine customer service. Well done, Demi!

After a very stressful and hectic morning all I needed was a decent coffee and a bit of quiet time. Starbucks has long been one of my favourite establishments, nice and reliable. As usual, my mocha was made to perfection and was exactly what I needed. What made this occasion stand out however was the lovely staff at Speke airport Starbucks. I was served by a really sweet red head called Lucy, who really managed to cheer me up after a terrible morning and she put a big smile on my face! Thanks Lucy!!

The place is absolutely filthy. It looks like it hasn’t been cleaned since it opened. Staff were standing around instead of cleaning, even though the restaurant was nearly empty with only about 20% of the tables occupied. The manager should be ashamed.
I've tried not to touch anything and feel like I need a shower after this visit
All good, however the vouchers when your flight is delayed does not work here. But… the coffee is the best !

I had such a lovely experience at Starbucks! The staff were super friendly, polite and welcoming. I had a great chat with Demmy, such a  sweet soul. She made my visit feel personal. Thank you for the great service! 🩵

I stopped by the Starbucks at the airport and I have to say — the highlight of my day was being served by Jorja.she greeted everyone with a smile and handled each order with care and efficiency.

Jorja was friendly, professional, and made my drink perfectly. It’s rare to find such warm, genuine service in a hectic airport environment, but she made the experience feel relaxed and personal. Her positive attitude was contagious — exactly what you need when traveling!

Huge thanks to Jorja for brightening my journey. Starbucks is lucky to have someone like her representing their brand! ☕✈️
They make coffee quickly, but the floor is dirty. The tables are dirty. The tables are sticky with dirt. There's trash everywhere.

Is this the most expensive starbucks in the world?

£7.50 for a venti strawberry acai!! also they dont accept the Starbucks app. Feel like ive been lured in by the starbucks sign to then have the price and lack of app stun me.

Wouldnt choose to come back
They make lovely drinks. However, they're not on the Starbucks app which is annoying. Also, on every occasion I've visited they've had no vegan food. This isn't acceptable.
